title: VETERINARY DRUG PROPORTIONING AND CRUSHING DEVICE

inventors: LUO XIANGMING [CN]; LUO Xiangming
abstract: The invention provides a veterinary drug proportioning and crushing device, which belongs to the technical field of veterinary tools. The device comprises a frame and a crushing cylinder which is provided on the frame and vertically penetrates therethrough; an upper end of the crushing cylinder is connected with a multi-directional extrusion and grinding mechanism, and a lower end of the crushing cylinder is connected with a receiving tank; a hemispherical medicine-crushing groove capable of rotational opening and closing is provided inside the crushing cylinder; the hemispherical medicine-crushing groove extends downward and fits against an inner wall of the hemispherical medicine-crushing groove; an outer wall of the medicine-crushing cylinder is provided with driving assemblies for driving the hemispherical medicine-crushing groove to rotate open and close; powder-cleaning brushes are provided inside the hemispherical medicine-crushing groove, and the powder-cleaning brushes fit against the inner wall of the hemispherical medicine-crushing groove. The veterinary drug proportioning and crushing device provided by the invention enables precise control of drug proportions and achieves efficient pulverization of medicines through multi-directional grinding and pressing, thereby effectively solving the problem of medicine residue.

title: 3D printer for construction
assignee: FURMAN INNA ANATOLIIVNA [UA]; Фурман Інна Анатоліївна
inventors: FURMAN INNA ANATOLIIVNA [UA]; PAPETA ARTEM OLEHOVYCH [UA]; NOVIKOV OLEKSANDR OLEKSANDROVYCH [UA] et al.
abstract: 3D printer for construction comprises a base on which a vertical guide column is mounted, a replacement unit mounted on the guide column, a main jib attached to the replacement unit support and rotation mechanism, mounted so as to allow vertical movement and rotation in the horizontal plane, an auxiliary jib mounted on the outer end of the main jib and capable of rotating in the horizontal plane; and an extrusion unit secured to the outer end of the auxiliary jib and connected via a solution supply line to a mixing unit. The guide column is collapsible. The guide column, main jib, and auxiliary jib are made of square-section structural members. Replacement unit for vertical movement consists of a carriage; equipment for preparing the mixing unit solution mounted on a swivel support on the side opposite the one where the main jib is located. The base consists of an X-shaped four-legged frame, with an automated support mounted at each of its extended ends. Each support contains a lifting mechanism mounted inside the housing, which includes a stepper motor connected to an encoder; a gearbox is connected to the stepper motor, the shaft of which is connected to one end of the lead screw of the actuator, which also includes a movable plate with sliders mounted on the gearbox, and a support nut mounted on a flange that is rigidly secured to the lower part of the housing. The other end of the lead screw is connected to the support plate via a ball support, and the space between the support plate and the lower part of the housing is enclosed by a corrugated protective cover. The stepper motor is connected to the control and data processing unit.

title: COMPOSITIONS AND METHODS FOR TASTE ENHANCEMENT OF BRAZZEIN
assignee: GREENLAB INC [US]; GREENLAB, INC.
inventors: HOWARD JOHN A [US]; WATANABE MUNEAKI [US]; HOWARD, John A. et al.
abstract: Compositions and methods for producing an enhanced sweetener comprising brazzein and a monovalent and/or a divalent salt are described. The monovalent and/or divalent salt increases a relative sweetness intensity of brazzein up to 5-fold compared to brazzein without the monovalent and/or divalent salt. According to the disclosure, concentrations of divalent salts in the enhanced sweetener can be about 5mM to about 30mM to increase the relative sweetness intensity of the brazzein.

title: PROCESS TECHNOLOGY AND METHOD FOR PREPARING BIO-INGREDIENTS, FOODS AND BEVERAGES IN ABSENCE OF OXYGEN
assignee: MIRANDA LUIZ DE [CA]; Miranda Luiz De
inventors: MIRANDA LUIZ DE [CA]; Miranda, Luiz De
abstract: [0000]    A method and processing technology for preparing baked products from raw materials is disclosed. The method includes at least one baking or roasting step in which the raw materials are processed in the absence of atmospheric air, achieved through a vacuum, vacuum-compensated, or pressure—the latter two employing an inert atmosphere. A sealed rotary roasting drum (or processing compartment) is supplied with pre-heated inert gas while heating and rotating the raw materials, and the inert gas is optionally recycled for reuse. Additional unit operations such as milling, cooling, spraying, extraction, and storage are also performed in the absence of atmospheric air, to preserve product quality and prevent oxidation. Optional steps include cryogenic pre-milling, sweetener addition to generating a “torrefacto” effect, and supercritical fluid extraction of oils for later incorporation into the baked products. The disclosed technology enables continuous production of baked products with improved aroma, stability, and self-life, by maintaining an oxygen-free environment throughout processing.

title: CHEWABLE FEXOFENADINE TABLETS
assignee: OPELLA HEALTHCARE GROUP SAS [FR]; OPELLA HEALTHCARE GROUP SAS
inventors: CAVALARI DANIELA MALDONADO [FR]; LEYDET DAMIA [FR]; MAILLIEZ JIMMY CLAUDE [FR] et al.
abstract: This disclosure is also based on the discovery that it is possible to eliminate the sweetener from a fexofenadine zwitterion dihydrate suspension and still achieve satisfactory taste masking by including the sweetener solely in the external phase. In addition, this disclosure is based on the discovery that it is possible to use an inert matrix containing only mannitol when turning suspensions of fexofenadine zwitterion dihydrate into granules. Accordingly, this disclosure is directed to sugar-free chewable fexofenadine tablets comprising sprayed and dried fexofenadine granules comprising a mannitol matrix and a composition devoid of a sweetener, said composition comprising fexofenadine zwitterion dihydrate, a wetting agent, a binder, an alkalizing agent, and a buffer; and an external phase comprising a flavoring agent, a disintegrant, the wetting agent, a diluent, a sweetener, and one or more lubricant. The disclosure also includes methods of making these tablets. In one embodiment, the method of producing a sugar- free chewable fexofenadine tablet includes: generating fexofenadine granules by spraying and drying a liquid fexofenadine suspension devoid of a sweetener comprising fexofenadine zwitterion dihydrate, a wetting agent, a binder, an alkalizing agent, and a buffer onto a mannitol matrix; and compressing the fexofenadine granules with an external phase comprising a flavoring agent, a disintegrant, the wetting agent, a diluent, a sweetener, one or more lubricant.

abstract: 다양한 실시예들에 따르면, 식품 소재에 대한 분말을 제조하기 위한 제조 장치로서, 열풍 흡입 장치; 상기 열풍 흡입 장치에 연결되는 필터; 상기 필터의 아래에 배치되며 내부 공간이 형성되는 제1 몸체; 상기 제1 몸체에 형성되는 투입구를 통해 상기 내부 공간 방향으로 제공되는 제1 에어 노즐 및 제2 에어 노즐;을 포함하고, 상기 제1 에어 노즐과 상기 제2 에어 노즐은 서로 다른 분사 특성을 가지고, 상기 제1 몸체에 연결되며 상기 식품 소재에 대한 과립이 제공되는 제2 몸체; 및 상기 제2 몸체에 연결되는 열풍 제공 장치;를 포함하고, 상기 열풍 제공 장치와 상기 열풍 흡입 장치에 의해 발생되는 외기에 의해 상기 제2 몸체에 배치되는 과립이 유동되어, 상기 제1 몸체의 상기 내부 공간에 유동층 과립이 형성되고, 상기 형성된 유동층 과립으로 상기 제1 에어 노즐 또는 상기 제2 에어 노즐 중 적어도 하나를 통해 스위트너를 포함하는 현탁액이 분사됨에 따라 상기 과립에 코팅층이 형성됨에 기반하여, 상기 식품 소재에 대한 분말이 제조되고, 상기 코팅층은 나노 단위이고 상기 분말의 입경은 마이크로 단위인, 제조 장치가 제공될 수 있다.

assignee: FERTIN PHARMA AS [DK]; FERTIN PHARMA A/S
inventors: CARLSSON RUNE FAURBY [DK]; NIELSEN KENT ALBIN [DK]; NIELSEN BRUNO PROVSTGAARD [DK] et al.
abstract: An orally disintegrating nicotine tablet for fast nicotine craving relief is disclosed, the tablet comprising nicotine, disintegrant, and a filler, wherein the filler comprises no more than 10% by weight of sugar alcohol. Further, an oral nicotine tablet is disclosed, the oral nicotine tablet comprising the orally disintegrating nicotine tablet as a first module and further comprising a second module, wherein the second module is different in composition compared to the first module.

title: NICOTINE BASED GUM FORMULATION
assignee: MEHTA BHARAT [IN]; MEHTA BHARAT
inventors: MEHTA BHARAT [IN]; MEHTA, BHARAT
abstract: The present invention is related to a nicotine-based gum formulation. The present invention is particularly related to a nicotine-based gum formulation comprising nicotine, a gelling agent, plasticizer, release control agent, acidifier, acid regulating agent, flavouring agent, sweetener, thickening agent and colouring agent. The present invention also relates to the process for preparing the nicotine-based gum formulation.

title: AGENT FOR SUPPRESSING UNPLEASANT TASTE, FLAVORING COMPOSITION FOR SUPPRESSING UNPLEASANT TASTE, AND METHOD FOR SUPPRESSING UNPLEASANT TASTE
assignee: TAKASAGO PERFUMERY CO LTD [JP]; 高砂香料工業株式会社
inventors: HO KHIN WAI [SG]; FURUKAWA KAEDE [JP]; ホー　キン　ワイ et al.
abstract: The present invention relates to an agent for suppressing an unpleasant taste stemming from a high-intensity sweetener, said agent containing one or more active ingredients selected from the group consisting of lauric acid, trans-2-decenal, dodecanal, decanoic acid, anethole, nerol, tarragon essential oil, delta undecalactone, methyl cinnamate, gamma heptalactone, sweet fennel essential oil, 5-methyl-2-phenyl-2-hexenal, cassia essential oil, massoia lactone, 2-methylundecanal, thyme essential oil, trans-2-undecenal, and hedione.

title: FOOD/BEVERAGE
assignee: SUNTORY HOLDINGS LTD [JP]; サントリーホールディングス株式会社
inventors: TERAMOTO YUKI [JP]; YAMASHITA JUMPEI [JP]; 寺本　由紀 et al.
abstract: There is a demand for a new composition capable of improving the flavor of a food/beverage, and a food/beverage containing the same. According to one embodiment of the present invention, provided is a food/beverage containing a sweetener, 1,2-propanediol, and at least one compound selected from the group consisting of acetic acid, nonanal, propionic acid, and triacetin. The 1,2-propanediol is included at 50-20000 ppm, and the content ratio between the 1,2-propanediol and the at least one compound falls within a prescribed range.

title: Beverage Delivery Device
assignee: DAVID G HOPPER THE TRUSTEE FOR THE QUIKSTIX FOUNDATION [AU]; DAVID G. HOPPER, THE TRUSTEE FOR THE QUIKSTIX FOUNDATION
inventors: HOPPER DAVID; Hopper, David
abstract: Patents Act 1990 COMPLETE SPECIFICATION PATENT APPLICATION BEVERAGE DELIVERY DEVICE Abstract Applicant and Inventor: David G. Hopper The Trustee for The Quikstix Foundation Title: Beverage Delivery Device The following statement is a full description of this invention, including the best method of its use known to me: Patents Act 1990 COMPLETE SPECIFICATION PATENT APPLICATION BEVERAGE DELIVERY DEVICE Abstract Applicant and Inventor: David G. Hopper The Trustee for The Quikstix Foundation Title: Beverage Delivery Device The following statement is a full description of this invention, including the best method of its use known to me: ug u g h e r u s t e e f o r h e u i k s t i x o u n d a t i o n Complete Patent Beverage Delivery Device - Abstract Rev 0924.docx page 2 © David G. Hopper A beverage delivery device is disclosed. The device makes a convenient, quick and consistent plunger/press quality beverage in any location, from a single serve tube type packaging divided into two sections. A micro perforated section of the tube is preloaded with the primary ingredient such as coffee or tea while the second, sealed handle section with its tear off end tag contains the other ingredients such as milk and/or sweetener. The handle of the device can be printed with branding and identification. To use this product, take the desired beverage delivery device, such as a white coffee with one sugar, tear off the handle end tag and tip the milk and sugar into a cup and add hot water. Then immerse the micro perforated section into the water and stir to infuse the coffee and mix the drink. Stir longer for a stronger beverage. The device functions as separate single serve ingredient packaging, infuser and stirrer all in the one device, making a quick and convenient plunger/press quality beverage from the one standalone package. title: FILLINGS FOR BAKERY AND CONFECTIONARY PRODUCTS
assignee: CARGILL INC [US]; CUBIQ FOODS S L [ES]; CARGILL, INCORPORATED et al.
inventors: FOSCHIA MARTINA [US]; GOTTWALD SUSEN [US]; REVILLA SANCHEZ RAQUEL [ES] et al.
abstract: It relates to a filling composition comprising, a sweetener, one or more hydrocolloids, a plant protein, water and fat, and the fat is present in an amount of from 5 to 20 wt.%, and the water is present in an amount of from 20 to 60 wt.% based upon the weight of the filling composition; and the plant protein is pea protein. The sweetener is present in an amount of from 25 to 60 wt.%. The one or more hydrocolloid is present in an amount of from 0.5 to 2 wt.%. The plant protein is present in an amount of from 0.1 to 1 wt.%. It further relates to a food product comprising at least one food ingredient and the filling composition, wherein the food product is a bakery product, a confectionary product, or a frozen dessert.

title: STABLE CANNABIDIOL ORAL FORMULATIONS
assignee: A2W PHARMA LTD; A2W Pharma Limited
inventors: MIZZI JOHN PAUL [MT]; GURRADO DOMENICO [MT]; MIZZI, John Paul et al.
abstract: A stable oral composition comprising of: a) Cannabidiol; b) DL-α tocopherol; c) a cosolvent selected from Diethylene glycol mono ethyl ether (Transcutol-HPR) or the surfactant agent Lecithin; d) a synthetic sweetener; e) a flavoring agent and; f) Corn oil as a solvent. A stable oral composition comprising of (i) cannabidiol (CBD) at a concentration of from about 95 mg/ml to about 105 mg/ml, (ii) Diethylene glycol mono ethyl ether at a concentration from about 4.5 mg/ml to about 5.5 mg/ml or Lecithin at a concentration from about 0.45 mg/ml to about 0.55 mg/ml, (iii) DL-α tocopherol at a concentration from about 0.54 mg/ml to about 6.6 mg/ml, (iv) synthetic sweetener at a concentration from about 0.018 mg/ml to about 0.022 mg/ml, (v) Flavoring agent at a concentration from about 0.9 mg/ml to about 1.1 mg/ml, and (vi) corn oil q.s. to about 1.0 ml.

title: FILLINGS COMPRISING EMULSION
assignee: CARGILL INC [US]; CUBIQ FOODS S L [ES]; CARGILL, INCORPORATED et al.
inventors: GOTTWALD SUSEN [US]; REVILLA SANCHEZ RAQUEL [US]; GOTTWALD, Susen et al.
abstract: The present invention relates to emulsion-based filling comprising, a sweetener, and an oil-in-water emulsion, wherein the oil-in-water emulsion is comprising a plant protein and one or more hydrocolloids and a lipid phase in a water phase; wherein the oil-in-water emulsion is present in an amount of 30 to 70 wt.% based on the weight of the filling; and wherein the plant protein of the oil in water emulsion is pea protein. The sweetener is present in an amount of 25 to 60 wt.% based on the weight of the filling. The process for preparing the filling is described. It further relates to a food product comprising at least one food ingredient and the claimed filling wherein the food product is a bakery product, a confectionary product, or a frozen dessert.

title: FROZEN DESSERT COMPOSITIONS
assignee: MARS INC [US]; MARS, INCORPORATED
inventors: ALAMU-LUMOR ENYAM [US]; MEHTA DIPAKKUMAR [US]; CISNEROS ANDREA [US] et al.
abstract: This disclosure generally relates to frozen dessert compositions, and methods of preparing frozen desserts. The frozen dessert compositions include a plant protein component, a plant-based milk, a dairy lipid alternative, a sweetener, a stabilizer, and water. The plant protein component includes black gram lentil protein.

title: Kinetic method for rapidly sensing sweetness of sweetener by detection cells
assignee: UNIV ZHEJIANG GONGSHANG; 浙江工商大学
inventors: CHEN ZHONGXIU; WEI XUELIN; LI MIAN et al.
abstract: The invention provides a kinetic method for rapidly sensing the sweetness of a sweetening agent by detection cells. The method comprises the following steps: S1, determining a fluorescence signal of interaction of the sweetening agent and sweet recipient cells by adopting a staying fluorescence spectrophotometer; a Ca < 2 + > fluorescent probe is added into the sweet recipient cells; s2, performing data processing on the fluorescence signal to obtain an apparent rate constant kobs; s3, based on the apparent rate constant kobs, calculating a receptor isomerization rate constant k3, a receptor deisomerization rate constant k4 and the retention time tau of the sweetening agent in sweet recipient cells; and S4, judging the sensory result of the sweetening agent according to the calculation result of S3. According to the method for analyzing the sweetener activation cell signal by detecting the sweetness based on the stay spectrum, some sensory information of the sweetness can be rapidly obtained, and compared with traditional sensory evaluation, the method is more efficient and more economical.

title: Fruit and grain mixed peptide solid beverage and preparation method thereof
assignee: GUANGZHOU JISHAN JIASHANGEN ECOLOGICAL AGRICULTURE CO LTD; 广州吉善家善根生态农业有限公司
inventors: WANG JIA; 王嘉
abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of food processing, and discloses a fruit and grain mixed peptide solid beverage and a preparation method thereof, the solid beverage comprises the following components by weight: 35-55 parts of composite peptide, 3-8 parts of functional polysaccharide, 8-15 parts of a wall material, and 5-15 parts of a sweetener. Wherein the composite peptide is prepared by compounding cereal peptide and fruit and vegetable peptide according to a specific weight ratio; the micromorphology of the solid beverage is composite microcapsule particles coated with peptide and polysaccharide, the average particle size is 10-50 [mu] m, and the water activity of the product is not higher than 0.28. The preparation method and the application are applied to the solid beverage. Through component design and process control, the product has excellent instant solubility, high-activity embedding rate and long-term storage stability, and effectively solves the common technical problems of easy activity loss, dissolution layering and short shelf life of peptide solid beverages.

title: Construction method and application of skin aging cell model
assignee: NANJING INSTITUTE OF PRODUCT QUALITY INSPECTION NANJING QUALITY DEVELOPMENT AND ADVANCED TECH APPLIC; 南京市产品质量监督检验院（南京市质量发展与先进技术应用研究院）
inventors: YANG MIAO; ZHANG CHI; QIANG YUWEI et al.
abstract: The invention discloses a construction method and application of a skin aging cell model, and belongs to the technical field of cell models. According to the method, the skin aging cell model can be constructed by culturing cells with a complete culture medium containing an artificial sweetening agent. According to the invention, saccharin is used as a chemical inducer for skin aging for the first time, the common sweetening agent widely used for low-sugar and sugar-free food has a biological effect of inducing skin aging for the first time, and the blank of the component in aging model research is filled. Experimental results show that only 24-hour saccharin treatment is needed for one time, and the induction effect can reach the level of 48-hour treatment of a classic H2O2 induction model. The invention not only provides a brand-new special research tool for revealing the unknown mechanism of the artificial sweetener in skin aging, but also provides a standardized and high-throughput in-vitro screening platform for evaluating the skin health risk under the background of sugar-free diet and developing related anti-aging components.

title: Room-temperature storable room-shaped box yoghourt beverage and preparation method thereof
assignee: BRIGHT DAIRY & FOOD CO LTD; 光明乳业股份有限公司
inventors: LI WEI; YU PENG; ZHU JUNYI et al.
abstract: The invention relates to the field of dairy product processing, in particular to a room-shaped box yoghourt beverage capable of being stored at normal temperature and a preparation method thereof. The preparation method comprises the following steps: (1) mixing reconstituted milk and raw milk, sterilizing, cooling, inoculating a leavening agent for fermentation, demulsifying and cooling to obtain a yoghourt base material; (2) performing dry mixing on white granulated sugar, a high-power sweetener and a stabilizer, adding the mixture into hot water, performing high-shear dispersion, and cooling to obtain a mixed solution; (3) mixing the yoghurt base material with the mixed solution, homogenizing and sterilizing; and (4) carrying out hot filling on the sterilized feed liquid into a house-shaped box, immediately inverting the package, sterilizing, and cooling. Through cooperation of hot filling and sterilization after inversion, on the premise of not depending on sterile packaging and production line transformation, the problem of microorganism control in a non-sterile house type box filling environment is effectively solved, the product reaches a commercial sterile state, normal-temperature stable storage as long as 6 months is achieved, and meanwhile good flavor and texture are kept.

title: Electronic atomized liquid formula and optimization method thereof
assignee: DONGGUAN HONGFU BIOLOGICAL TECH CO LTD; 东莞市鸿馥生物科技有限公司
inventors: HU LEI; ZHI YIHONG; LIU CUI et al.
abstract: The invention provides an electronic atomized liquid formula and an optimization method thereof. The method comprises the following steps: preparing a plurality of electronic atomized liquid samples with different sweetener concentrations; determining a sensory score of each electronic atomized liquid sample; detecting the atomization rate of each electronic atomized liquid sample; and determining the sweetener concentration formula of the electronic atomized liquid according to the sensory score and the atomization rate of the electronic atomized liquid sample. According to the electronic atomized liquid formula optimization method provided by the invention, sensory scores and atomization rates under different sweetening agent concentrations are respectively determined, so that a scientific and quantitative evaluation system is established, and an optimal sweetening agent concentration interval for balancing sensory sweetness and physical properties at the same time is explored on the basis. Therefore, the formula of the electronic atomized liquid can ensure the sweetness, the atomization rate is maximized, and the economical efficiency and the stability of the electronic atomized liquid product are further improved.

title: METHOD FOR PRODUCING DRY SOLUBLE MIXTURE BASED ON WHEY PROTEIN ISOLATE FOR ENTERAL NUTRITION OF INDIVIDUALS WITH CARBOHYDRATE METABOLISM DISORDERS
assignee: STATE UNIV OF TRADE AND ECONOMICS [UA]; ДЕРЖАВНИЙ ТОРГОВЕЛЬНО-ЕКОНОМІЧНИЙ УНІВЕРСИТЕТ
inventors: PRYTULSKA NATALIIA VOLODYMYRIVNA [UA]; ASLANIAN SERHII ARMENAKOVYCH [UA]; ANTIUSHKO DMYTRO PETROVYCH [UA] et al.
abstract: Method for producing dry soluble mixture based on whey protein isolate for enteral nutrition of individuals with carbohydrate metabolism disorders consists of four main stages and the addition of components per 100 kg of product, according to which: at the first stage, the raw materials are sieved through a sieve; at the second stage, trituration is performed, involving the addition of riboflavin, pyridoxine, beta-carotene and 100 g of whey protein isolate, followed by mixing for 10–15 minutes, at the third stage, preliminary mixing is performed, during which 48.0 kg of whey protein isolate, coenzyme Q10, zinc gluconate and the mixture obtained from the previous trituration are added and mixed for 15–20 minutes, at the fourth stage, the remaining specified amount of whey protein isolate, isomaltulose, medium-chain triglycerides of plant origin from palm kernel oil, fructose, L-glutamine, sunflower lecithin, inulin, L-glycine, chamomile extract, chicory root extract, ascorbic acid, rutin, calcium lactate, magnesium citrate, glucosamine hydrochloride are added to the mixer with the mixture obtained after preliminary mixing and mixed for 15–20 minutes.

title: METHOD FOR PREPARING A TRADITIONAL CHINESE MEDICINE EXTRACT FOR REGULATING GLUCOSE AND LIPID METABOLISM
assignee: UNIV GUANGDONG PHARM [CN]; GUANGDONG PHARMACEUTICAL UNIVERSITY
inventors: WANG JIANFAN [CN]; CHEN JIAHAO [CN]; LIN SHAOQIANG [CN] et al.
abstract: The present invention belongs to the technical field of extracting and isolating active ingredients from compound traditional Chinese medicines (TCM), and specifically relates to a method for preparing a TCM extract for regulating glucose and lipid metabolism. The method includes the steps of: mixing mulberry leaf powder and pueraria root powder, adding an ethanol solution, adjusting a pH value to below 2, heating for extraction, filtering the mixture, recovering the filtrate, subjecting the filtrate to column chromatography, eluting to remove impurities, collecting the eluate, concentrating and drying to obtain the TCM extract for regulating glucose and lipid metabolism. The obtained TCM extract for regulating glucose and lipid metabolism includes 2-4 mg/g of 1-deoxynojirimycin, 40-80 mg/g of quercetin, and 150-200 mg/g of puerarin. The present invention has effects including lowering blood glucose, regulating blood lipids, and protecting pancreatic islets.

title: Process for the sequential monotopic synthesis of β-ethylene acetals of 1-(phenacyl-, acetonyl) isatins
assignee: INSTITUTIA PUBLICA UNIV DE STAT DIN MOLDOVA [MD]; ПУБЛИЧНОЕ УЧРЕЖДЕНИЕ ГОСУДАРСТВЕННЫЙ УНИВЕРСИТЕТ МОЛДОВЫ
inventors: MACAEV FLIUR [MD]; STÂNGACI EUGENIA [MD]; SUCMAN NATALIA [MD] et al.
abstract: The invention relates to organic chemistry, in particular to a process for synthesizing heterocyclic compounds based on isatin, which can be used in the field of pharmaceutical industry.The process for the sequential monotopic synthesis ofβ-ethylene acetals of 1-(phenacyl-, acetonyl) isatins with the formula:according to the invention, includes the interaction of isatin with chloroethanol in dimethylformamide medium in the presence of potassium carbonate at room temperature for 25...35 hours. After which an equimolar amount relative to isatin of phenacyl halide or chloroacetone dissolved in dimethylformamide is added dropwise to the reactant mixture, the mixture being heated at a temperature of 55...70°C for 1.5...2.5 hours, then the resulting mixture is diluted with water, extracted with ethyl acetate, from which the target product is isolated and purified by standard procedures in organic chemistry.

title: Family of heme binding proteins that increase chelated iron content and improve flavor of nutritional supplements and food products
assignee: SHIRU INC [US]; Shiru, Inc.
inventors: AKIVA EYAL [IL]; FARWELL CHRISTOPHER [US]; MADONNA MICHAEL [US] et al.
abstract: This disclosure provides materials and methods for improving the nutritional value of food products by increasing the content of chelated iron. Heme binding proteins (designated as PX90 proteins) that have not previously been used as food additives are manufactured by recombinant expression, and then included in food products during manufacture or preparation. PX90 proteins may also impart a meat-like flavor or aroma, either coincidentally or by design. Subcategories of PX90 proteins are structurally related to THAP4-like heme-binding beta-barrel domain containing proteins, indoleamine 2,3-dioxygenase (IDO), DyP-type peroxidase, ferritins, and hemopexins. The bioavailable iron in nutritional supplements and food products of this disclosure is especially beneficial for consumers who have manifestations of iron deficiency, low blood hematocrit, anemia, and other hematological abnormalities.

title: Hydroxyl functional fluorinated monomers as combustion aids for solid fuel ramjet fuels
assignee: MCDONALD BRIAN A [US]; RICE JEREMY R [US]; PRUETT TERRY [US] et al.
inventors: MCDONALD BRIAN A [US]; RICE JEREMY R [US]; PRUETT TERRY [US] et al.
abstract: [0000]    The application relates to a SFRJ fuel comprising metallic particles selected from the group consisting of boron carbide and aluminum particles; the metallic particles being encapsulated in a fluorinated coating which aids in combustion; wherein the fluorinated coating is selected from the group consisting of 1,1,1,3,3,3 hexafluoro-2-propanol, 2,2,2 trifluoroethanol, and 3-hydroxybenzotrifluoride.

title: A PREPARATION METHOD FOR PURE NATURAL POLYPHENOL-RICH FLOUR FROM BLACK WHEAT.
assignee: HENAN AGRICULTURAL UNIV [CN]; HENAN AGRICULTURAL UNIVERSITY
inventors: FENG JIANCHAO [CN]; MA DONGYUN [CN]; FENG Jianchao et al.
abstract: The present invention relates to a preparation, processing method for a pure natural polyphenol-rich flour from black wheat. A method for preparing pure natural polyphenol-rich flour from black wheat includes the following steps: collecting unripe black wheat grains with colored outer skins after flowering; steaming the grains for 20 to 30 minutes; cooling the steamed grains to room temperature, absorbing surface moisture; freeze-drying the steamed grains; pulverizing, milling the dried grains to obtain the pure natural polyphenol-rich flour. She fully utilizes the advantages of black wheat resources to produce truly pure natural polyphenol-rich flour. While maximizing the retention of nutritional components in the grains, it avoids the influence of the bran of conventionally harvested mature wheat on the edible quality, improves the edible quality of the grains. The total phenol content, antioxidant activity TEAC, and DPPH in the prepared polyphenol-rich flour are significantly higher than those prepared by regular method.

title: Application of apple polyphenols in delaying postharvest deterioration quality of pummelo (Citrus maxima Merr.) fruit
assignee: UNIV JIANGXI AGRICULTURAL [CN]; JIANGXI AGRICULTURAL UNIVERSITY
inventors: CHEN CHUYING [CN]; CHEN JINYIN [CN]; ZHANG YAJIE [CN] et al.
abstract: This invention provides an application of apple polyphenols in delaying the decline of postharvest quality deterioration of pummelo (Citrus maxima Merr.) fruit, belonging to the technical field of postharvest storage and preservation of fruits. Experiments prove that pre-storage apple polyphenol treatment can effectively reduce postharvest decay and quality deterioration of ‘Jinshayou’ pummelo (Citrus maxima Merr.) fruit. Pre-storage immersion of 1.0% apple polyphenol can maintain significant levels of high antioxidant activity and free radical scavenging ability of harvested ‘Jinshayou’ pummelo fruit, as a result of reducing senescence-induced oxidative stress, and play a remarkable role in balancing ROS homeostasis in pummelo juice sacs. Therefore, ‘Jinshayou’ pummelo (Citrus maxima Merr.) fruit treated with 1.0% apple polyphenols can be stored at room temperature for a maximum of 90 days, moreover, it can inhibit the peel coloration and the albedo soften, and also reduce fruit decay index, weight loss and nutritional quality deterioration. <Figure 1>

title: ANTIBIOTIC DETECTION KIT FOR ANIMAL-DERIVED FOOD
assignee: CHANGSHA CENTER FOR DISEASE CONTROL AND PREVENTION CHANGSHA HEALTH COMPREHENSIVE SUPERVISION AND LAW [CN]; CHANGSHA CENTER FOR DISEASE CONTROL AND PREVENTION (CHANGSHA HEALTH COMPREHENSIVE SUPERVISION AND LAW ENFORCEMENT BUREAU)
inventors: WANG QIONG [CN]; WANG Qiong
abstract: The present invention discloses a kit for detecting antibiotics in animal-derived food, which belongs to the field of food safety detection. The kit comprises microencapsulated indicator bacterium particles, a detection solution, an antibiotic synergist, an animal- derived food sample extraction solution, and a control group; the indicator bacterium is Escherichia coli (CICC23657). The present invention establishes a PVA-sodium alginate- boric acid-sodium tetraborate microencapsulation technology suitable for microbial colorimetry, which provides a stable environment for target microorganisms in the immobilized carrier, allowing their quantity and activity to be maintained and enhancing stability. Adding an antibiotic synergist to the detection system amplifies the effect of antibiotics on sensitive bacteria, making the detection results more obvious and more accurate. Compared with existing methods for detecting antibiotic residues, the present invention is more convenient to operate, low in cost, accurate in results, and allows judgment of antibiotic residues based on color development with the naked eye.

title: Serum-Protein Coated Fusogenic Lipid Particles For Targeted Drug Delivery
assignee: RE3B THERAPEUTICS UG I G [DE]; RE3B Therapeutics UG (i.G.)
inventors: HOFFMANN BERND [DE]; CSISZÄR AGNES [DE]; HERSCH NILS [DE] et al.
abstract: The invention is based on the finding that fusogenic lipid particles, when coated with serum proteins such as apolipoproteins, retain their fusogenic properties. By coating fusogenic particles with serum proteins such as apolipoproteins, the inventors provide protein-coated fusogenic lipid particles that can be used for targeted drug delivery. The invention pertains to said protein-coated fusogenic lipid particles, their method of manufacturing and therapeutic use, und to methods for targeted delivery of drugs and of the fusogenic lipid particles that rely on the coating of the fusogenic lipid particles with serum proteins. In particular embodiments, the protein-coated fusogenic particles of the invention comprise a polyphenol.

title: Verwendung eines Gallussäure-Esters zur Stabilisierung thermoplastischer Kunststoffe mit niedriger Migration
assignee: GROSSMAAS GERRIT [DE]; Großmaas, Gerrit
abstract: Verwendung eines thermoplastischen Polymermaterials, insbesondere HDPE, umfassend 0,15 Gew.-% eines chemisch modifizierten Polyphenols, bevorzugt eines Gallussäure-Esters, wobei das Polyphenol kovalent an das Polymer gebunden oder vernetzt ist, zur Stabilisierung gegen thermo- und photo-oxidativen Abbau, mit einer maximalen Migrationsrate von ≤ 1 ppm.

title: MICROCAPSULES WITH OECOPETALUM MEXICANUM SEED OIL AS A FUNCTIONAL ADDITIVE
assignee: COLEGIO DE POSTGRADUADOS [MX]; COLEGIO DE POSTGRADUADOS
inventors: HERNANDEZ MORA ALEJANDRO ESLI [MX]; GÓMEZ MERINO FERNANDO CARLOS [MX]; HERRERA CORREDOR JOSÉ ANDRÉS [MX] et al.
abstract: The present invention belongs to the technical field of phytochemistry for health nutrition. The proposal of this invention relates to the formulation and process for the development of Oecopetallurgm mexicanum seed oil microcapsules, characterized by containing polyunsaturated fatty acids, phenolic and nutritional compounds (elements), known for their health benefits. The microencapsulation process implemented ensures the protection and stability of the bioactive components, resulting in microcapsules with a significant profile of unsaturated fatty acids. This profile includes a high concentration of essential fatty acids such as oleic acid, linoleic acid and alpha-linolenic acid, which are fundamental for the maintenance of cardiovascular health and cognitive function. One of the advantageous aspects of this invention is the ability of the microcapsules to inhibit oxidative reactants, which translates into greater oxidative stability of the encapsulated oil. In addition, the microcapsules present a nutritional composition relevant to the human organism, benefiting the consumer as a source rich in important minerals such as nitrogen, phosphorus, potassium, calcium, magnesium, sulfur, iron, copper, nickel, manganese, molybdenum and zinc. On the other hand, they have a low humidity and water activity, crucial features for extending the useful life of the product during storage. The cohesiveness of the microcapsules is another significant attribute, as it provides a robust and stable structure that facilitates its handling and transportation without compromising the integrity of the content. Also, these properties render the microcapsules ideal for incorporation into a variety of food products, providing not only nutritional but also functional benefits, by improving the stability and quality of the final product.

title: Conversion device for sake jars of different beer varieties
assignee: ZHENGZHOU KINGSTAR BEER CO LTD; 郑州金星啤酒有限公司
inventors: ZHANG XU; WANG GANGGANG; LI JIANLI et al.
matched_tags: Alternative proteins brewer spent grain valorization
abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of beer production, in particular to a different-beer-variety clear wine tank conversion device which comprises a supporting table, no less than two clear wine tank bodies for storing different beer varieties are installed on one side of the top end of the supporting table, a liquid outlet pipe with a valve is installed at a liquid outlet of each clear wine tank body, and a liquid outlet pipe with a valve is installed at the liquid outlet of each clear wine tank body. And a sliding adjusting mechanism is mounted on one side, positioned on the sake tank body, of the supporting table. Through the cooperative design of the sliding adjusting mechanism, the switching mechanism and the cleaning mechanism, the bright beer tank bodies for storing different varieties of beer can be switched and butted on a semi-automatic beer filling production line; rapid butt joint of the sake tanks for storing different varieties of beer and the filling production line is achieved in an automatic disassembly and assembly and cleaning mode, tedious operation of manual disassembly and assembly and butt joint is avoided, and therefore the conversion and butt joint efficiency of the sake tanks for storing different varieties of beer is improved, and efficient filling production of different varieties of beer is facilitated.

title: A PREPARATION METHOD AND APPLICATION OF ACIDIC POLYSACCHARIDES FROM PYRUS SINKIANGENSIS YU
assignee: XINJIANG MEDICAL UNIV [CN]; XINJIANG MEDICAL UNIVERSITY
inventors: TAOERDAHONG HAILIQIAN [CN]; TAOERDAHONG Hailiqian
abstract: The present invention discloses a preparation method and application of acidic polysaccharides from Pyrus sinkiangensis Yu., belonging to the technical field of Pyrus sinkiangensis Yu. acidic polysaccharides. The method comprises the following steps: (1) Removing the cores of Pyrus sinkiangensis Yu. fruits, slicing them, air-drying naturally, pulverizing, defatting, and drying; (2) Adding distilled water to the Pyrus sinkiangensis Yu. powder, performing reflux extraction twice, filtering, collecting the filtrate, and concentrating it; (3) Mixing the concentrated filtrate with ethanol for alcohol precipitation, filtering, and collecting the precipitate as the crude polysaccharide of Pyrus sinkiangensis Yu.; (4) Performing preliminary separation to obtain neutral polysaccharides and acidic polysaccharides from Pyrus sinkiangensis Yu.; then, subjecting the acidic polysaccharides to three elution separations to obtain PSAP-1 and PSAP-2, two types of acidic polysaccharides from Pyrus sinkiangensis Yu. The invention found that the acidic polysaccharides PSAP-1 and PSAP-2 from Pyrus sinkiangensis Yu. can alleviate inflammatory responses.

title: A Method for Preparing Zirconia-Loaded Friedel's Salt Using Dealumination Waste Liquid and its Application in Fluoride Removal
assignee: JIANGSU UNIV OF TECHNOLOGY [CN]; JIANGSU UNIVERSITY OF TECHNOLOGY
inventors: LI ZHONGCHUN [CN]; LI Zhongchun
abstract: The present invention discloses a method for preparing zirconia-loaded Friedel's salt using dealumination waste liquid as a raw material and its application in fluoride removal, belonging to the technical fields of wastewater treatment, resource utilization, and environmental functional material preparation. The invention addresses the issues of improving the selectivity and adsorption capacity of existing Friedel's salt for fluoride ions. The invention utilizes aluminum in the dealumination waste liquid from retired crystalline silicon solar cells for synthesizing Friedel's salt. By adding calcium hydroxide to adjust the calcium-to-aluminum molar ratio, the waste liquid is resourcefully utilized. Subsequently, zirconium salt hydrolysis is employed to load zirconium precursors, followed by high-temperature calcination to produce zirconia-loaded Friedel's salt composite material. This composite material possesses abundant anion exchange sites, effectively adsorbing fluoride ions. When used as a fluoride removal agent for fluoride-containing wastewater, it demonstrates excellent defluorination efficiency, achieving both waste resource utilization and contributing to environmental protection and resource recovery.

title: EDIBLE FRUIT PRESERVATIVE AND ITS METHOD OF USE AND APPLICATION
assignee: UNIV ZHEJIANG A&F [CN]; ZHEJIANG A&F UNIVERSITY
inventors: QI YIYU [CN]; QI Yiyu
abstract: The present invention discloses an edible fruit preservative, prepared from the following raw materials in parts by weight: 10–30 parts of film-forming polysaccharide; 5–15 parts of natural antioxidant; 3–8 parts of plant essential oil; 2–6 parts of thickener; 1–5 parts of composite functional auxiliary agent; and water to make up the balance. The composite functional auxiliary agent is a compound of fructo-oligosaccharide and nano-silicon dioxide, with a mass ratio of 3:1–5:1. The natural antioxidant is a compound of tea polyphenols, vitamin C, and anthocyanins from black wolfberry, with a mass ratio of 1:1:0.5–1:1:1, so as to achieve synergistic enhancement among tea polyphenols, vitamin C, and black wolfberry anthocyanins. The thickener is at least one of gum arabic and xanthan gum. Through the synergistic effect of the composite preservation system, vitamin C in the natural antioxidant can effectively regenerate the oxidized tea polyphenols and, together with black wolfberry anthocyanins, construct a multi-level, renewable antioxidant network, which greatly prolongs the duration of antioxidant protection and effectively inhibits enzymatic browning and nutrient loss of fruits.

title: METHOD FOR SELECTING HIGH-YIELDING GENOTYPES FOR OZONE TOLERANCE FOR SWEET PEPPER BREEDING
assignee: INSTITUTE OF CLIMATE SMART AGRICULTURE OF THE NAT ACADEMY OF AGRARIAN SCIENCES OF UKRAINE [UA]; ІНСТИТУТ КЛІМАТИЧНО ОРІЄНТОВАНОГО СІЛЬСЬКОГО ГОСПОДАРСТВА НАЦІОНАЛЬНОЇ АКАДЕМІЇ АГРАРНИХ НАУК УКРАЇНИ
inventors: KNYSH VOLODYMYR IVANOVYCH [UA]; KOSENKO NADIIA PAVLIVNA [UA]; SHABLIA OLEKSANDR SERHIIOVYCH [UA] et al.
abstract: Method for selecting high-yielding genotypes for ozone tolerance for sweet pepper breeding involves determining tolerant lines at the seedling stage. Seedlings of breeding lines at the 3–4 true-leaf stage are exposed to ozonation at a concentration of 250 mg/m³ for ten days, with an exposure time of seven hours per day. Next, the content of total chlorophyll in the leaves of the breeding lines is determined before and after ozonation. The coefficient of relative sensitivity to elevated ozone doses is calculated and genotypes with the highest resistance are selected with the ability to determine the genotypes most adapted to growing conditions for breeding new stress-resistant varieties of sweet pepper.

title: Autonomous drone swarm system with AI-driven coordination and multi-modal sensor integration
assignee: DRONE OPERATIONS LLC [US]; Drone Operations LLC
inventors: THOMPSON NICHOLAS [US]; Thompson, Nicholas
abstract: [0000]    An autonomous drone swarm system and method utilizing artificial intelligence for coordinated operations comprises command drones equipped with large language model processors and subordinate drones coordinated through a hierarchical Queen-Worker architecture. The system processes natural language commands, generates autonomous mission plans, and coordinates multi-drone operations through an encrypted self-healing mesh communication network utilizing laser, radio frequency, and visual communication channels. Multi-modal sensor integration including electro-optical, infrared, LiDAR and photogrammetry, radio frequency, and chemical detection provides comprehensive environmental awareness while federated learning algorithms enable distributed coordination in signal-denied environments. The system implements configurable operational modes spanning tactical (15 minutes-2 hours over 2 to 5 square kilometers), operational (6-24 hours over 20 to 50 square kilometers), and strategic (7-30+days over 200 to 500 square kilometers) mission profiles for military and commercial applications. Fault-tolerant protocols ensure continued operation despite individual failures through automatic task redistribution and leader election procedures.

title: BALLOON DEVICE FOR RIGID BRONCHOSCOPY
assignee: HO AN [US]; STEIN DAVID [US]; Ho An et al.
inventors: HO AN [US]; STEIN DAVID [US]; Ho, An et al.
abstract: A balloon device for a rigid bronchoscope includes a balloon shaft member; a balloon member connected to the balloon shaft member; and an inflation device operably connected to the balloon shaft member and the balloon member. The inflation device configured to adjust an inflation level of the balloon member. The inflatable and adjustable balloon device is configured to fit snugly on the outside of the rigid bronchoscope. This enables better ventilation of patient's undergoing rigid bronchoscopy and prevents back bleeding into the lung. Once the balloon is inflated, improved jet ventilation can occur with better resulting aeration.

title: Underwater Sediment Purification Robot with Terrain-Adaptive Microbubble Injection Control Function
assignee: NTQ CO LTD [KR]; 엔티큐 주식회사
inventors: KIM SUNG [KR]; KIM YONG GU [KR]; 김 성 et al.
abstract: [0001a]    [본 발명은 지형지물 변화에 따라 붐대 및 헤드의 위치를 실시간으로 조정함으로써 불규칙한 지형에서도 헤드가 상시 수중 지면에 밀착되도록 제어하고, 센서 기반 환경 인식 및 학습 알고리즘에 기인하여 수중의 흐름, 지형 경사, 퇴적 특성 등에 맞춰 마이크로 버블의 분사량과 압력을 자동으로 조절할 수 있을 뿐 아니라, 이를 통해 퇴적물의 비산 손실을 최소화하고, 흡입 효율을 극대화하는 등 기존과 차별화된 구조로부터 비롯되는 취급과 사용, 유지 및 관리 보수의 용이함 등으로 인해 사용의 편의성 내지 효율성이 극대화 유도되는 지형 적응형 마이크로버블 분사 제어 기능을 갖는 수중 준설 차량에 관한 것으로, 유압공급유닛이 내부에 탑재되어 수집된 퇴적물을 임시 수용하는 로봇(100);과, 로봇에 설치되며, 유압 작용 및 스프링의 연동에 의해 불규칙한 지형에서도 안정적으로 주행 가능한 한 쌍의 무한궤도식 차륜(200);과, 로봇의 상부에 회전 가능하게 설치되는 회전체(300);와, 회전체에 연결되며, 수중에서 흡입된 퇴적물을 로봇으로 이송하는 붐대(400);와, 붐대의 선단에 설치되며, 마이크로 버블을 분사하여 수중 퇴적물을 처리하고, 부유하는 퇴적물을 흡입하는 헤드(500);로 구성된다.]

title: Plasma Microbubble Pressurized Flotation Wastewater Treatment Plant
assignee: HWANG JEONG HA [KR]; 황정하
inventors: HWANG JEONG HA [KR]; HWANG GYU AE [KR]; 황정하 et al.
abstract: 본 발명은 플라즈마 마이크로버블 가압부상 폐수처리장치로서, 더욱 상세하게는, 마이크로버블을 발생시키는 산기관 내부에 전극을 배치하고, 전극에 전압을 인가하여 산기관 내부에 플라즈마를 생성하고, 이를 통해 OH라디칼을 발생시킴으로써 OH라디칼을 포함한 마이크로버블을 통해 폐수를 가압부상 처리하는, 플라즈마 마이크로버블 가압부상 폐수처리장치에 관한 것이다.

title: System for preparing dimethyl 1, 4-cyclohexanedicarboxylate
assignee: NANJING ANLIGE CO LTD; 南京安立格有限公司
inventors: ZHANG ZHIBING; YANG GAODONG; WANG BAORONG et al.
abstract: The utility model provides a system for preparing 1, 4-cyclohexanedicarboxylic acid dimethyl ester. The system comprises a first feeding pipeline, a second feeding pipeline and a hydrogenation reactor, the first feeding pipeline is communicated with the hydrogenation reactor through the bottom of the hydrogenation reactor; a reinforced mass transfer device is arranged in the hydrogenation reactor, microbubble outlets are formed in the upper end and the lower end of the reinforced mass transfer device, and the number of the microbubble outlets in the upper end is smaller than that of the microbubble outlets in the lower end; the second feeding pipeline is connected with the enhanced mass transfer device; the hydrogenation reactor is a slurry bed reactor, a material outlet of the hydrogenation reactor is higher than the reinforced mass transfer device in the vertical direction, and the material outlet is lower than the liquid level in the hydrogenation reactor in the vertical direction; a baffle is arranged in the hydrogenation reactor close to the material outlet, and the top of the baffle is located between the material outlet and the liquid level of the hydrogenation reactor in the vertical direction; the bottoms of the baffles are obliquely arranged close to the side wall of the hydrogenation reactor. The system can effectively increase the phase boundary mass transfer area of the gas phase and the liquid phase.

title: Transparent alcohol brewing system
assignee: 4TH WAVE CRAFT LLC [US]; 4th Wave Craft LLC
inventors: ARENA JULIAN [US]; Arena, Julian
abstract: [0000]    Provided by aspects of the present inventive concept are a brewing system including at least one vessel utilized therein, for example, a grist case; a mash/lauter tun; a recirculation vessel; a boil kettle; a hopback; a whirlpool; and/or at least one fermenter that is transparent. Also provided by the inventive concept are a process of using the brewing system, and beverages prepared using the brewing system and/or process.

title: A Food-grade Coffee Ground Adsorption Pack and Its Preparation Method and Application
assignee: GUANGZHOU CITY POLYTECHNIC [CN]; GUANGZHOU CITY POLYTECHNIC
inventors: JIANG JINJIN [CN]; JIANG Jinjin
abstract: The present invention discloses a food-grade coffee grounds adsorption pack, which belongs to the field of environmental engineering technology. The coffee grounds adsorption pack comprises the following parts by weight: 10-20 parts of porous starch, 0.5-1.0 part of coffee powder flavoring, and 80-90 parts of coffee grounds. The coffee grounds are dried and mixed with porous starch and coffee flavoring, then packed. The coffee grounds refer to the residue obtained after grinding, extracting, or brewing coffee beans. The present invention is low-cost, and all raw materials are food-grade, making it safe and effective, providing a new approach for the removal and adsorption of odors.

title: METHOD FOR PRODUCING DRINKING MILK WITH ENHANCED ANTIOXIDANT STABILITY
assignee: POLTAVA STATE AGRARIAN UNIV [UA]; ПОЛТАВСЬКИЙ ДЕРЖАВНИЙ АГРАРНИЙ УНІВЕРСИТЕТ
inventors: IVANOV OLEH MYKOLAIOVYCH [UA]; KUZMENKO LARYSA MYKHAILIVNA [UA]; SLYNKO VIKTOR HRYHOROVYCH [UA] et al.
matched_tags: Pulsed electric field PEF beer pasteurization
abstract: Method for producing drinking milk with enhanced antioxidant stability, comprising reception and preparation of raw materials, purification, standardization, homogenization, pasteurization and cooling, bottling, packaging, labeling, and storage. Prior to pasteurization, tocopherol (vitamin E) is added in an amount of 0.005-0.01%, which is first dissolved in a portion of purified, standardized, and homogenized milk at a temperature of 35-45 °C, followed by mixing.

title: METHOD FOR SAUCE PRODUCTION
assignee: NAT UNIV FOOD TECHNOLOGIES [UA]; НАЦІОНАЛЬНИЙ УНІВЕРСИТЕТ ХАРЧОВИХ ТЕХНОЛОГІЙ
inventors: HREK OLENA VIKTORIVNA [UA]; PSHENYCHNA TETIANA VOLODYMYRIVNA [UA]; LISNIUK VOLODYMYR LEONIDOVYCH [UA] et al.
matched_tags: Pulsed electric field PEF beer pasteurization
abstract: Method for sauce production includes preparation of normalised milk mixture, homogenization, pasteurization at a temperature of 90-95 °C for 2-10 minutes, souring and ripening at a temperature of 40-45 °C, cooling of yogurt, and mixing with flavoring agent , wherein plant fiber from rye bran is used as filler in an amount of 1.5-3.5%, which is subjected to expansion in pasteurized milk whey, taken in a ratio to said filler of (2.5-3.5):1, prior to mixing with yogurt.

title: METHOD FOR OBTAINING HEAT-STABLE EMULSION SYSTEM
assignee: STATE BIOTECHNOLOGICAL UNIV [UA]; ДЕРЖАВНИЙ БІОТЕХНОЛОГІЧНИЙ УНІВЕРСИТЕТ
inventors: YANUSHKEVYCH OLEKSANDR IVANOVYCH [UA]; HRYNCHENKO NATALIA HENNADIIVNA [UA]; RADCHENKO ANNA EDUARDIVNA [UA] et al.
matched_tags: Pulsed electric field PEF beer pasteurization
abstract: Method for obtaining heat-stable emulsion system based on milk raw materials, where whey protein concentrate is used as milk raw material. In the first stage, emulsion is prepared at a temperature range of 60-65 °C, followed by stabilization of emulsion system in the second stage by introducing fatty suspension of rapidly dissolving hydrocolloids - xanthan gum and modified starch - followed by pasteurization at 87-90 °C for 10 minutes.

title: METHOD FOR YOGURT SAUCE PRODUCTION
assignee: NAT UNIV FOOD TECHNOLOGIES [UA]; НАЦІОНАЛЬНИЙ УНІВЕРСИТЕТ ХАРЧОВИХ ТЕХНОЛОГІЙ
inventors: HREK OLENA VIKTORIVNA [UA]; PSHENYCHNA TETIANA VOLODYMYRIVNA [UA]; LISNIUK VOLODYMYR LEONIDOVYCH [UA] et al.
matched_tags: Pulsed electric field PEF beer pasteurization
abstract: Method for yogurt sauce production includes preparation of normalised milk mixture, homogenization, pasteurization at a temperature of 90-95 °C for 2-10 minutes, souring and ripening at a temperature of 40-45 °C, cooling of yogurt, and mixing with flavoring agent. Additionally, 3-5% of dietary fiber and wheat bran mixture is added in a ratio of 1:(10-15), which, prior to mixing with yogurt, is subjected to expansion in milk whey at a temperature of 38....42 °C for 5-10 minutes, taken in a ratio of 3.5:1 relative to dietary fiber mixture.

title: METHOD FOR ARTISANAL CREAM CHEESE PRODUCTION
assignee: POLTAVA STATE AGRARIAN UNIV [UA]; ПОЛТАВСЬКИЙ ДЕРЖАВНИЙ АГРАРНИЙ УНІВЕРСИТЕТ
inventors: KUZMENKO LARYSA MYKHAILIVNA [UA]; SLYNKO VIKTOR HRYHOROVYCH [UA]; USENKO SVITLANA OLEKSIIVNA [UA] et al.
matched_tags: Pulsed electric field PEF beer pasteurization
abstract: Method for artisanal cream cheese production involves milk reception, filtration, and pasteurization; cooling to a specified temperature; inoculation with mesophilic Lactococcus and Leucococcus cultures; addition of rennet preparation and milk coagulation; separation of whey and pressing of curd; cooling curd, adding salt, shaping finished product, packaging it in airtight containers, and storing it at low temperatures. Combination of four strains of mesophilic bacteria is used for souring: Lactococcus lactis subsp. cremoris, Lactococcus lactis subsp. lactis, Leuconostoc mesenteroides subsp. cremoris, and Lactococcus lactis subsp. diacetylactis. Coagulation is carried out at a temperature of 30±2 °C for 22-24 hours. Rennet is added directly to soured milk. Cheese balls with a diameter of 2 cm are formed, rolled in pre-pasteurized spices, placed in glass containers with a volume of 250330 ml, and topped with sunflower oil.

title: METHOD OF ICE CREAM PRODUCTION
assignee: NAT UNIV FOOD TECHNOLOGIES [UA]; НАЦІОНАЛЬНИЙ УНІВЕРСИТЕТ ХАРЧОВИХ ТЕХНОЛОГІЙ
inventors: MYKHALEVYCH ARTUR PETROVYCH [UA]; SVIATNENKO ROMAN SERHIIOVYCH [UA]; POLISHCHUK HALYNA YEVHENIIVNA [UA] et al.
matched_tags: Pulsed electric field PEF beer pasteurization
abstract: Method of ice cream production includes preparation of raw materials, mixing, pasteurization, cooling, and freezing. Secondary dairy raw materials are used - hydrolyzed whey concentrate with an acidity of 80–100 °T, which is filtered during preparation of raw materials, yeast β-glucan and whey protein isolate are additionally used, which are sifted together with white sugar, pumpkin puree is strained, mixing of dry raw materials and pumpkin puree is carried out in preheated hydrolyzed whey concentrate at a temperature of 40–45 °C. Pasteurization of the mixture is carried out at a temperature of 75...85 °C for 3...5 min, the resulting mixture after cooling is subjected to maturation at a temperature of 0 °C for 2...4 h.

title: SPREADABLE GOAT CHEESE PREPARATION WITH OLIVE OIL AND METHOD FOR PRODUCING SUCH A PREPARATION
assignee: AGROKTIMA AMALTHEIA MONOPROSOPI ANONYMI ETAIREIA PROTYPOS AIGOTROFIKI MONADA ME D T AGROKTIMA AMALTH [GR]; ΑΓΡΟΚΤΗΜΑ ΑΜΑΛΘΕΙΑ ΜΟΝΟΠΡΟΣΩΠΗ ΑΝΩΝΥΜΗ ΕΤΑΙΡΕΙΑ ΠΡΟΤΥΠΟΣ ΑΙΓΟΤΡΟΦΙΚΗ ΜΟΝΑΔΑ με δ.τ. ΑΓΡΟΚΤΗΜΑ ΑΜΑΛΘΕΙΑ ΜΟΝΟΠΡΟΣΩΠΗ Α.Ε.,
inventors: MINOPOULOS DIMITRIOS CHRISTOU [GR]; ΜΗΝΟΠΟΥΛΟΣ, ΔΗΜΗΤΡΙΟΣ ΧΡΗΣΤΟΥ
matched_tags: Pulsed electric field PEF beer pasteurization
abstract: The present invention relates to the preparation of an innovative spread made from goat cheese and olive oil, produced under ideal conditions and through a specialized methodology that resulted from continuous research over several years and extensive experimentation. The method involves the use of goat milk as the raw material and comprises the following stages:  Reception of the milk in a cooling tank.   Standardization of the milk Passage through a deodorizer, followed by pasteurization Addition of mesophilic cultures and rennet Curd incubation until the stabilization of Active Acidity Reheating and mechanical stirring Cooling and stirring with the simultaneous addition of flower of salt and relative reheating Second cooling stage Curd incubation for 32 hours Addition, under stirring, of olive oil and potassium sorbate Packaging.

title: INTELLIGENT ADAPTIVE CONTROL SYSTEM FOR STERILIZATION AND PASTEURIZATION PROCESSES IN AUTOCLAVES FOR THE PRODUCTION OF VEGETABLE PRESERVES
assignee: MEGAHRAN 2015 EOOD [BG]; "МЕГАХРАН 2015" ЕООД
inventors: MANDOVA MILKA PETKOVA [BG]; Мандова, Милка
matched_tags: Pulsed electric field PEF beer pasteurization
abstract: The present utility model relates to an intelligent adaptive control system for sterilization and pasteurization processes in autoclaves and pasteurizers used in a vegetable canning production facility, including the production of chutney and other vegetable mixtures packaged in glass jars or metal containers. The intelligent adaptive control system for sterilization and pasteurization processes in autoclaves for the production of vegetable preserves according to the utility model comprises a technological data acquisition module (1), an automated control and software analysis module (2), an adaptive sterilization process control module (3), in communication with an autoclave and pasteurizer module (4), as well as a steam and power supply control module (5). By continuously measuring and analyzing temperature, pressure, processing time, product type, product volume, and packaging type, the intelligent adaptive control system for sterilization and pasteurization processes in autoclaves for the production of vegetable preserves used in the vegetable canning production facility, according to the utility model, calculates in real time an optimal sterilization or pasteurization regime and automatically adjusts the duration and process parameters, thereby ensuring microbiological safety with minimal energy consumption and without compromising product quality.

title: METAL-ORGANIC FRAMEWORK-CONFINED NANOSCALE CONJUGATED POLYMER COMPOSITE, PREPARATION METHOD THEREFOR, AND APPLICATIONS THEREOF
assignee: MINJIANG UNIV [CN]; MINJIANG UNIVERSITY
inventors: MENG DONGLI [CN]; MENG Dongli
abstract: The present invention provides a metal-organic framework (MOF)-confined nanoscale conjugated polymer (CP) composite, a preparation method therefor, and applications thereof, falling within the technical field of photocatalysis. For the MOF-confined nanoscale CP composite, an ultrasonic cavitation effect is utilized to induce ordered alignment of monomer molecules adsorbed within channels along a channel direction, facilitating subsequent oriented polymerization. A polymerization reaction is strictly confined to MOF nanochannels through sonochemically confined polymerization, ensuring precise and controllable growth of CP chains and forming CP nanostructures with controlled size and morphology. Furthermore, the MOF-confined CP composite exhibits significantly enhanced mass transfer efficiency and overall photocatalytic performance, providing innovative insights and effective solutions for advancing photocatalytic technology.

title: Solvent-less System and Method for Emulsion Breaking and Viscosity Reduction in Crude Oil and Bitumen Using Disc Atomizer, Water Curtain, Horizontal FWKO, and Ultrasound
assignee: PEREZ SIMON; Perez, Simon
inventors: PEREZ SIMON; Perez, Simon
abstract: Abstract The invention relates to a solvent-less system and method for breaking stubborn water-in- oil emulsions and reducing viscosity in crude oil and bitumen froth, particularly from oil sands extraction. The system comprises a high-speed rotary disc atomizer that mechanically disintegrates the froth into fine particles and thin films, an annular water curtain that provides high-shear impact to strip fines and promote coalescence, and a horizontal free-water knock-out (FWKO) vessel configured to receive the quenched mixture submerged in a water pad for efficient gravity separation. In preferred embodiments, ultrasound transducers apply acoustic energy to further disrupt residual emulsions and reduce bitumen viscosity through cavitation. The process operates without chemical diluents or solvents, achieving clean bitumen overflow with low water and solids content. The invention offers an environmentally friendly, cost-effective alternative to conventional solvent-based froth treatment. Abstract solvent-based froth treatment.20 eb b s t r a c t e b s o l v e n t - b a s e d f r o t h t r e a t m e n t

title: Pet Food for Improving the Antioxidant and Anti-Aging Capacity of Dogs and Cats and Preparation Method Thereof
assignee: XIAN YUANZHISHENG BIOTECHNOLOGY CO LTD [CN]; XI'AN YUANZHISHENG BIOTECHNOLOGY CO., LTD.
inventors: CHEN XINYAN [CN]; CHEN LEI [CN]; CHEN Xinyan et al.
abstract: The invention provides a pet food for improving the antioxidant and anti-aging capacity of dogs and cats and a preparation method thereof, aiming to prolong their healthy lifespan and improve overall vitality. The pet food, by weight, comprises 3–5 parts of Lentinus edodes, 2–4 parts of Agaricus bisporus, and seven kinds of mushrooms in total, together with Aronia melanocarpa fruit, raspberry, beef heart powder, broccoli sprouts, turmeric, Codonopsis pilosula, and other ingredients. The mushrooms provide ergothioneine as an anti-aging component, Aronia melanocarpa fruit supplies high-activity anthocyanins, and broccoli sprouts contribute sulforaphane, all of which synergistically enhance antioxidant and anti-aging effects. The preparation method includes raw material pretreatment (cleaning, drying, and grinding), mixing, and forming/packaging, wherein a low-temperature process (45– 60 °C) is adopted to retain bioactive compounds. The resulting pet food is safe, easily absorbed, and effective in scavenging free radicals, protecting organ function, boosting immunity, and delaying cellular aging in dogs and cats.

title: Polyethylene glycol terephthalate hydrolase PmPETase and application thereof
assignee: UNIV JIANGSU OCEAN; 江苏海洋大学
inventors: YANG GUANG; HUANG XUEPING; KONG HUILIN et al.
abstract: The invention discloses polyethylene glycol terephthalate hydrolase PmPETase and application thereof.The hydrolase PmPETase is protein with the amino acid sequence shown in SEQ ID NO.1. An expression system suitable for the PmPETase is constructed, recombinase protein with catalytic activity is obtained, and the polyethylene glycol terephthalate hydrolase PmPETase can be used for preparing the polyethylene glycol terephthalate hydrolase PmPETase. The substrate specificity, the catalytic property and the potential plastic degradation capacity of the PET degrading enzyme are comprehensively analyzed, and a new theoretical basis and application reference are provided for development and utilization of the PET degrading enzyme and a high polymer material green treatment technology.

title: Marine metagenome-sourced low-temperature salt-tolerant hydrolase for efficiently degrading PET (polyethylene terephthalate) plastic and application thereof
assignee: SOUTH CHINA SEA INST OCEANOLOGY CAS; 中国科学院南海海洋研究所
inventors: TIAN XINPENG; GUO QIAOQIAO; LIU YUQING et al.
abstract: The invention discloses low-temperature salt-tolerant hydrolase sourced from marine metagenome and capable of efficiently degrading PET (Polyethylene Terephthalate) plastic and application thereof. The hydrolase NH937 can degrade polyethylene glycol terephthalate (PET) at the temperature of 40 DEG C, the catalytic efficiency of the hydrolase NH937 is dozens of times higher than that of reported IsPETase, and the hydrolase NH937 has remarkable PET degradation activity in a 0-5.3 M NaCl buffer solution with the wide PH range of 5.0-11.0 and natural seawater and is a PET hydrolase with high salt resistance in a low-temperature environment at present. The NH937 can change the surface morphology of PET, can enable the surface of a PET film to show obvious holes, and can be used as a candidate enzyme for marine in-situ degradation of PET plastics. The PET hydrolase disclosed by the invention is high in activity, low-temperature-resistant and high-temperature-resistant, is a seawater environment-like PET plastic, and can provide theoretical guidance and technical support for degradation of marine micro-plastics in the future.

title: Nanocomposite for degrading organic contaminants
assignee: IMAM MOHAMMAD IBN SAUD ISLAMIC UNIV [SA]; IMAM MOHAMMAD IBN SAUD ISLAMIC UNIVERSITY
inventors: OMRAN MOHAMED KHAIRY ABDEL FATTAH [SA]; ABDULKHAIR BABIKER YAGOUB ELHADI [SA]; Omran, Mohamed Khairy Abdel Fattah et al.
abstract: A method of photocatalytic degradation utilizes a particulate crystalline nanocomposite with a radiation having a wavelength of 100 to 800 nm. The particulate crystalline nanocomposite includes a tetragonal calcium molybdate (CaMoO4) crystalline phase, a calcium silicate (CaSiO3) crystalline phase, and a graphitic carbon nitride (C3N4) crystalline phase, where at least a fraction of the graphitic-C3N4 is in the form of mesoporous nanosheets.

title: Composite Microbial Agent for Alleviating Enteritis and Preparation Method Thereof
assignee: HEBEI UNIV OF ECONOMICS AND BUSINESS [CN]; HEBEI UNIVERSITY OF ECONOMICS AND BUSINESS
inventors: ZHANG HONGNA [CN]; ZHANG Hongna
abstract: A composite microbial agent for alleviating enteritis and a preparation method thereof, Potentilla glabra, Clerodendranthus spicatus, and Polygala tenuifolia are pulverized and subjected to reflux extraction, wherein the obtained plant extract is mixed with a polypeptide polymer containing polypeptide growth factors, and the prepared natural anti-inflammatory agent kills pathogenic bacteria in the intestine, inhibits the occurrence of inflammation, and promotes the growth and repair of intestinal epithelial cells; a substrate mixture with a reticular structure is obtained through heating modification, wherein the substrate mixture is mixed with an absorption-promoting anticoagulant and a penetration enhancer, to reversibly lyse the lipids between intestinal epithelial cells, improve the permeation rate of the preparation, and increase the blood flow rate in intestinal microvessels; the composite microbial agent for alleviating enteritis enhances the intestinal mucosal defense capacity and improves the intestinal self-healing capacity; the prepared composite microbial agent for alleviating enteritis has universality in the treatment of enteritis, achieves faster and more thorough therapeutic effects, and has no side effects on organs of the body.

title: DOG WASTE BAG CARRIER DEVICE
assignee: BARNES BRADLEY [US]; Barnes Bradley
inventors: BARNES BRADLEY [US]; Barnes, Bradley
abstract: A dog waste bag carrier device is provided. The device is designed to provide a sanitary, discreet, and hands-free solution for temporarily storing used dog waste bags until proper disposal is available. The device comprises a collapsible, accordion-style body made from silicone for flexibility, durability, and ease of cleaning. A base section is attachable via snap-fit or twist-lock mechanisms and serves as an optional secondary compartment for treats, water, or additional waste bags. The lid assembly includes a two-section design, with one section securing to the body and the other housing a roll of waste bags, which are dispensed through an integrated slot. The waste bags are preferably biodegradable and may include an odor-barrier film or fragrance for enhanced user experience. Silicone gaskets ensure an airtight and watertight seal to prevent odor and leakage. The device attaches easily to a leash, belt, or bag via a carabiner, for convenient transport.

title: BIODEGRADABLE PIEZOELECTRIC NERVE-GUIDANCE CONDUIT FOR PROMOTING REGENERATION OF SEVERED NERVE AND METHOD FOR MANUFACTURING THE SAME
assignee: UIF UNIV INDUSTRY FOUNDATION YONSEI UNIV [KR]; UIF (University Industry Foundation), Yonsei University
inventors: KIM SANG WOO [KR]; JEON SERA [KR]; KIM DABIN [KR] et al.
abstract: An aligned nanofiber-based nerve-guidance conduit is provided which acts as a structural guide for assisting regeneration of a damaged nerve, and which provides an environment suitable for nerve regeneration through a porous channel. The nerve-guidance conduit is made of a material having biodegradability so that no additional removal surgery is required even after nerve regeneration is completed. In addition, the nerve-guidance conduit is composed of a piezoelectric material that generates electricity during deformation. Thus, a scheme for promoting the regenerative ability of nerve cells through electrical stimulation generated when the guidance conduit is deformed is proposed.

title: ARTICLES CONTAINING COMPOSTABLE HOT MELT ADHESIVES
assignee: HENKEL AG & CO KGAA [DE]; CHEN JINYU [US]; HENKEL AG & CO. KGAA et al.
inventors: CHEN JINYU [US]; HU YUHONG [US]; BRAAM KEVIN BERNARDUS [NL] et al.
abstract: The present invention relates to articles (such as disposable absorbent articles) that include one or more substrates and a compostable hot melt adhesive composition.

title: LIGHTWEIGHT WINTERIZED LAMP
assignee: FORMOSAWIDE IND INC [PH]; Formosawide Industries Inc.
inventors: TANG KUO-LIANG [TW]; TANG, Kuo-Liang
abstract: A lightweight winterized lamp, including: a snap-on bottom cover; a lamp main body base, including a first side to receive a light bulb, and a second side to engage the snap-on bottom cover, to define a closed internal space within the lightweight winterized lamp, wherein a portion of an external conductive wire is restrained inside the closed internal space by an engagement between the snap-on bottom cover and the lamp main body base; and a winter-resilient mechanism, disposed in the closed internal space or the light bulb, or on at least one of the snap-on bottom cover and the lamp main body base, to mitigate luminous degradation possibility of the lightweight winterized lamp attributable to freezing temperatures and/or icing on the lightweight winterized lamp.

title: LIGHTWEIGHT CONTAINMENT SYSTEM
assignee: FULLWAVE TOWER & BROADCAST LLC [US]; Fullwave Tower & Broadcast, LLC
inventors: RUEDLINGER JAMES [US]; RUEDLINGER, James
abstract: A lightweight containment system for aerial structures includes an adaptable support structure that can attach to different configurations of aerial structures, a membrane surrounding part of the aerial structure to contain contaminants, and an attachment system securing the support structure to the aerial structure.

title: LIGHTWEIGHT SOLUTION FOR REMOVABLE ROOF PANELS
assignee: FCA US LLC [US]; FCA US LLC
inventors: BHAT RAMACHANDRA [US]; PAUL ABHISHEK [US]; SHARMA NITIN [US] et al.
abstract: A vehicle roof has a framework with longitudinal rails that extend between a front windshield area and a rear window, hatch or door area. The rails are spaced from one another to form an opening between the rails to receive one or more removable roof panels. The removable roof panels have an inner skin and an outer skin. A honeycomb core is sandwiched between the inner and outer skins. The honeycomb core is a non-porous material with strength and lightweight characteristics such as aluminum, polypropylene or the like.

title: LIGHTWEIGHT PHOSPHORESCENT STRIP
assignee: PEXCO AEROSPACE INC [US]; Pexco Aerospace, Inc.
inventors: REBAR VICTORIA [US]; HOWARD CHRIS [US]; SUBLETT DON [US] et al.
abstract: [0000]    A phosphorescent composition is provided. The composition includes clear polymer and phosphorescent pigment dispersed in the clear polymer. About 5% to about 40% of the phosphorescent pigment is loaded in the clear polymer.

assignee: TAYLOR MADE GOLF CO [US]; Taylor Made Golf Company, Inc.
inventors: HARBERT CHRISTOPHER JOHN [US]; HOFFMAN JOSEPH HENRY [US]; ROLLINS CHRISTOPHER [US] et al.
abstract: [0000]    A golf club head having discreet regions of specific mass relationships, including a lightweight forward portion, to achieve specific mass properties and performance.
