assignee: NXP BV [NL]; NXP B.V.
inventors: SCHNEIDER TOBIAS [AT]; BRONCHAIN OLIVIER [BE]; AZOUAOUI MELISSA [DE] et al.
abstract: [0000]    A method is proposed to improve the resistance to fault attacks.

title: A COMPOSITE WIND TURBINE
assignee: SOLTANMORADI ALI [IR]; ALMASI AMIR REZA [IR]; RAOUF ABOLFAZL [IR] et al.
inventors: SOLTANMORADI ALI [IR]; ALMASI AMIR REZA [IR]; RAOUF ABOLFAZL [IR] et al.
abstract: The invention of a composite wind turbine based on flexible polymer volumes for clean energy production is a vertical-axis wind turbine featuring a lightweight, modular design that utilizes a vertical shaft composed of three connected sections. Inflatable rings provide structural rigidity, which can be deflated for compact storage. Five aerodynamic U-channel blades capture wind efficiently, creating differential forces that cause rotation. The blades are stabilized by flexible deployable rings and metal wires, ensuring structural integrity. The turbine starts rotating even with minimal wind due to its lightweight design, allowing for electricity generation in light breezes. An artificial intelligence based braking system controls speed during high winds, while a battery storage unit ensures power availability even when wind conditions fluctuate.

title: SYSTEM AND METHOD OF ON THE BOX ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE PRODUCTIVITY TOOL ORCHESTRATING AND MAINTAINING CONTINUOUS USER CHAT THROUGHOUT BOOT UP INTO A BASIC INPUT OUTPUT SYSTEM
assignee: DELL PRODUCTS LP [US]; Dell Products LP
inventors: KONDAPI SRIKANTH [US]; MALLURU PURUSHOTHAMA R [US]; MINK JACOB [US] et al.
abstract: An information handling system executing computer readable code instructions for an on the box artificial intelligence productivity tool comprising a hardware processor receiving a user query input within a current chat session with a user, executing computer-readable code instructions to perform a semantic similarity search at a main operating system (OS) level comparing a generated query input intent value to capability intent values generated from natural language descriptions of secondary OS capabilities and other software capabilities to identify a best match capability for the received user query input having a highest semantic similarity search score, storing the best match secondary OS capability in a non-volatile shared memory mailbox location, rebooting into a secondary lightweight OS with a secondary OS AI productivity tool retrieving the best match secondary OS capability for execution by a secondary lightweight OS and continuing the current chat session with a secondary OS conversational interface.

title: SYSTEM AND METHOD OF ON THE BOX ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE PRODUCTIVITY TOOL ORCHESTRATING AT AN OPERATING SYSTEM LEVEL DISK WIPING REQUIRING BOOT UP INTO BASIC INPUT OUTPUT SYSTEM
assignee: DELL PRODUCTS LP [US]; Dell Products LP
inventors: KONDAPI SRIKANTH [US]; MALLURU PURUSHOTHAMA R [US]; MINK JACOB [US] et al.
abstract: An information handling system executing computer readable code instructions for an on the box artificial intelligence (AI) productivity tool comprising a hardware processor receiving a user query input requesting erasing a drive memory of the information handling system, executing computer-readable code instructions to perform a semantic similarity search at a main operating system (OS) level comparing a generated query input intent value to capability intent values generated from natural language descriptions of secondary OS capabilities and other software capabilities to identify a best match secondary OS capability for the received user query input having a highest semantic similarity search score, storing the best match secondary OS capability in a non-volatile shared memory mailbox location, rebooting into a secondary lightweight OS executing a secondary OS AI productivity tool to retrieve the best match secondary capability for execution by the secondary lightweight OS to erase the drive memory.

title: PROACTIVELY DETERMINING SECURITY RISKS AND DEPLOYMENT IMPACTS ACROSS CLOUD COMPUTING ENVIRONMENTS
assignee: MICROSOFT TECHNOLOGY LICENSING LLC [US]; Microsoft Technology Licensing, LLC
inventors: COPTY FADY [IL]; ELDAN AVIV DAVID [IL]; NAKASH ASAF [IL] et al.
abstract: This disclosure describes a proactive deployment impact system that detects and addresses the security impact of candidate code-based infrastructure changes before they are deployed in a production environment within a cloud computing system. The proactive deployment impact system implements a lightweight preemptive security framework, based on runtime resource information, to determine whether a requested candidate code-based infrastructure change would introduce new security risks, attack patterns, or breach vulnerabilities. Furthermore, the proactive deployment impact system can actively block the deployment of negatively impacting candidate changes, report potential security breaches, and/or automatically modify the candidate changes to eliminate security vulnerabilities.

title: LOCOMOTION VIA VIBRATION OF SOFT, TWISTED BEAMS WITH AN UNDER-ACTUATED QUADRUPED
assignee: AUKES DANIEL [US]; JIANG YUHAO [CN]; CHEN FUCHEN [US] et al.
inventors: AUKES DANIEL [US]; JIANG YUHAO [CN]; CHEN FUCHEN [US] et al.
abstract: [0000]    A lightweight, under-actuated, compliant, quadrupedal robot employing twisted beams as legs, actuated by controllable one-directional vibration force to achieve diverse maneuvering modes. Adjusting the actuator's shaking frequency and direction, the robot can execute various maneuvers such as forward movement, lateral movement, and turning via the coupled, resonant response of the legs. The quadrupedal robot includes a body plate having a shape defining at least four corners; four legs, each leg coupled to one of the at least four corners of the body plate; and a dual-motor actuator coupled to the body plate. The body plate is rigid, and each leg includes a twisted beam formed of a flexible polymeric material.

title: High Power and High Energy Supercapbattery Device and Method of Making Same
assignee: RAM MANOJ KUMAR [US]; RAM Manoj Kumar
inventors: RAM MANOJ KUMAR [US]; RAM, Manoj Kumar
abstract: The invention is about energy storage device “supercapbattery” which acts both like supercapacitor and battery. The supercapbattery consists of first electrode (cathode), second electrode (anode) and between electrolyte socked with and without separator. The supercapbattery consists of cathode electrode is based on composite of conducting polymer composite with transition metal sulfide. The second electrode (anode) which is the pyrolyzed composite of phytolith coated with conducting polymer. The electrolyte is the gel polyvinyl alcohol or separator socked ionic liquid or the inorganic salt in organic solvent. The supercapbattery is packed using adhesive polymer after the connection of electrodes are made. The supercapbattery offers lightweight ‘high power and energy’ storage that can save space and weight in wearable equipment used for the military and medical applications. The high power and energy densities in the SCB, the flexible structure allows for a more efficient and ergonomic design of the equipment with greater cost-effectiveness.

title: Roller Wagon Device
assignee: HINOJOSA BENJAMIN [US]; GARZA ROMEO [US]; Hinojosa Benjamin et al.
inventors: HINOJOSA BENJAMIN [US]; GARZA ROMEO [US]; Hinojosa, Benjamin et al.
abstract: [0000]    A roller wagon device is provided comprised of a wagon designed for efficient movement of items over challenging terrains, particularly for outdoor activities like camping and beach outings. The device comprises a high-capacity, stable wagon body supported by a foldable frame made of lightweight materials, allowing easy storage and transport. The body includes multiple fasteners for securing additional items, pockets for organizing smaller items, and optional dividers for customizing the interior space. For maneuverability, the wagon features a handle with a non-slip grip. Equipped with specialized roller assemblies, including self-cleaning brushes, the device maintains smooth movement across sand and other uneven surfaces. An optional motorized version includes an electric motor powered by a rechargeable battery, which can be solar charged, allowing minimal physical effort during transport. Additionally, a wireless remote provides control over speed and direction, enhancing ease of use, particularly when managing heavy loads across extended distances.

title: PROMPT-BASED PROACTIVE CONVERSATION SUPPORT
assignee: SAMSUNG ELECTRONICS CO LTD [KR]; SAMSUNG ELECTRONICS CO., LTD.
inventors: YOON JIHYEOK [KR]; SONG MOO CHAN [US]; JAIN PRITI [US] et al.
abstract: A method includes receiving a conversation history from a messaging interface, extracting relationship information involving one or more users based on the conversation history, generating, using a first large language model (LLM), a personalized prompt based on the relationship information. To generate the personalized prompt, the method includes predicting user interactions based on real-time chat context and historical interaction patterns using a dynamic pre-fetching model. The method further includes generating, using a second LLM, an initial reply suggestion based on the personalized prompt. Generating the initial reply suggestion includes asynchronously transmitting partial pre-processed data from the first LLM to the second LLM using a streaming interface and generating the initial reply suggestion using a lightweight language model (LM) of a latency-aware fallback model in response to detecting of a processing delay of the second LLM.

title: LIGHTWEIGHT POLYMER CONCRETE PANEL
assignee: CONCRETE PRODUCTS OUE [EE]; Concrete Products OÜ
inventors: KALLASTE VILJAR [EE]; Kallaste, Viljar
abstract: The invention concerns a thin and large-format panel made of lightweight polymer concrete and a method and composition for vertical manufacture of the panel in a vertical casting mould formed from a vertical casting fixture.

title: HOLDER INSERT, ITEM HOLDER, AND METHODS FOR ASSEMBLING AND USING THE SAME TO SUPPORT AND SEPARATE ITEMS WITHIN A CARTON
assignee: WESTROCK PACKAGING SYSTEMS LLC [US]; WESTROCK PACKAGING SYSTEMS, LLC
inventors: PADILLA JESUS A [US]; PADILLA, Jesus A.
abstract: A holder insert is disclosed, comprising a first end section and a second end section, with at least one upwardly extendable divider section positioned between them. The divider section is configured to support and separate items placed on the holder insert, and includes a first panel and a second panel separated by a fold line. When supporting items, the divider section exerts an outward lateral force toward the first and second end sections. To resist this force, a pair of locking tabs extend inwardly from the first and second end sections, engaging each other to form a secure connection. The holder insert is formed from a foldable material, providing a versatile and eco-friendly solution for separating and supporting items during transport or storage.

title: ECOSYSTEM SCALING AND FRIENDLY METAL LOSS ESTIMATION FOR WIRELESS POWER TRANSFER
assignee: APPLE INC [US]; Apple Inc.
inventors: PAIS BRANDON RUSSEL MARIAN [NZ]; YUAN ZHAO [US]; Pais, Brandon Russel Marian et al.
abstract: [0000]    Estimating friendly metal losses (P<FM>) associated with power transfer from a wireless power transmitter (PTx) to a wireless power receiver (PRx) can include determining P<FM >based on one or more circuit parameters; subtracting an effect of one or more voltage or current measurements from the determined P<FM >to derive a modified P<FM>; and determining ecosystem scaling parameters based on the modified P<FM>. The ecosystem scaling parameters can include scale factors based on operation of the PTx with a reference PRx; operation of the PRx with a reference PTx; and/or operation of the reference PRx with the reference PTx. Estimating P<FM >can further include adding the effect of at least one of the one or more voltage or current measurements from the determined P<FM >to derive one or more loss coefficients; and performing foreign object detection based on a P<FM >model including the derived loss coefficients.

title: ENVIRONMENT-FRIENDLY THERMOPLASTIC RESIN COMPOSITION AND ARTICLE PRODUCED THEREFROM
assignee: LOTTE CHEMICAL CORP [KR]; 롯데케미칼 주식회사
inventors: JEON JI YOON [KR]; KIM NAM HYUN [KR]; WOO EUN TAEK [KR] et al.
abstract: A thermoplastic resin composition of the present invention comprises: about 100 parts by weight of a base resin comprising about 15 to about 45 wt% of a polycarbonate resin, about 45 to about 75 wt% of a recycled polycarbonate resin including polymethyl methacrylate, and about 1 to about 20 wt% of an aromatic vinyl-cyanide vinyl-based copolymer resin; about 1 to about 30 parts by weight of a phosphorus-based compound; about 1 to about 15 parts by weight of a rubber-modified vinyl-based graft copolymer; and about 0.1 to about 2.5 parts by weight of an ethylene-methyl acrylate copolymer. The thermoplastic resin composition has excellent environment-friendliness, excellent impact resistance, excellent flame retardancy, excellent moldability, and an excellent balance of these properties.

title: VENTURI ASSISTED BI-CONICAL CHAMBER, A TOROIDAL VENTURI VORTEX SYSTEM AND A METHOD OF COOLING
assignee: UNITECH SYNERGIES LTD [GB]; UNITECH SYNERGIES LIMITED
inventors: BUDHDEO SHAMIR PRAVINCHANDRA [GB]; Budhdeo, Shamir Pravinchandra
abstract: [0000]    The present invention relates to a toroidal venturi vortex system (TOVENVORS) designed for cooling without employing traditional refrigerants. The TOVENVORS utilizes a vortex tube to bifurcate compressed air into cold and hot streams, providing efficient cooling through a fridge box while simultaneously generating electricity via a turbine module. The system aims to be environmentally friendly and energy-efficient by utilizing the generated electricity to power the compressor module, promoting a sustainable approach to cooling.

title: METHOD OF PRODUCING LITHIUM COMPOUNDS FROM LITHIUM-ION BATTERY WASTE
assignee: SEM INC [KR]; SEM Inc.
inventors: CHUNG WOOK JIN [KR]; NISOLA GRACE [KR]; EDWARD SIO JOHN [KR] et al.
abstract: [0000]    The present disclosure relates to a method of producing lithium compounds from lithium-ion battery waste, and products such as LiOH anhydride, LiOH hydrate or Li<2>CO<3 >may be obtained through, after separating black mass, performing alkali washing, thermal treatment, acid leaching and conversion thereon. The method reduces the amount of water used and increases a yield of the products through increasing thermal treatment and acid leaching efficiency, thereby providing an environment-friendly lithium-ion battery recycling method.

title: Device for Storing, Organizing, and Dispensing Solid Dose Medications
assignee: ALI NABEEL RUSTAM [US]; Ali Nabeel Rustam
inventors: ALI NABEEL RUSTAM [US]; Ali, Nabeel Rustam
abstract: [0000]    A cylindrical storage-organizer-dispenser device for solid dose medications, arranged in a 7-day by time-interval-dose matrix, specifically invented to offer a simple, user-friendly, and secure way for people who need to take multiple daily medications on a weekly basis. The device permits to visually see what medications have been already taken and implicitly indexes to the next upcoming dose; this helps to avoid missing a dose or taking dangerous double doses. Additionally the device provides secure storage for emergency medication, specific patient information and/or medication instructions, and includes a feature to securely carry it around.

title: BIO-TRANSISTOR
assignee: UNIV TOHOKU [JP]; 国立大学法人東北大学
inventors: FUKUHARA MIKIO [JP]; SAMOTO TETSUO [JP]; HASHIDA TOSHIYUKI [JP] et al.
abstract: [Problem] To provide a bio-transistor that uses a bio-material made of a natural material that is friendly to the global environment and less harmful to living organisms. [Solution] A bio-transistor comprising a bio-material 11 formed from a cellulose composed mainly of wood or plant fibers (pulp). The bio-material 11 is preferably a semiconductor. Moreover, the bio-transistor is preferably a field-effect transistor (FET), and in that case, is preferably a metal-semiconductor field-effect transistor (MESFET), a metal-oxide-semiconductor field-effect transistor (MOSFET), or a junction field-effect transistor (JFET).

title: ELDER FRIENDLY DEVICE TO IMPROVE HAND EYE CO-ORDINATION USING AN ADAPTIVE GAMING TECHNIQUE
assignee: TATA CONSULTANCY SERVICES LTD [IN]; Tata Consultancy Services Limited
inventors: RADHAKRISHNAN ANILRAJ [IN]; KUPPUSAMY SANTHANAM SIVAKUMAR [IN]; SIVAN VISHNU [IN] et al.
abstract: Existing therapeutic methods lack interactivity and adaptability to individual needs. The present disclosure retrieves from a database, a hardware component design as an interactive table comprising a grid of sensor(s) to detect input(s) from a user. The detected one or more inputs from user are passed to a gaming engine connected to the hardware component. Reflex time of user is recorded, when user provides the inputs to the sensors. Reflex time is compared with predefined time Tn and at least one of following is performed based on comparison that includes incrementally changing position of object, resetting timer, increasing timer with a first delta value and moving position of object closer to initial position with a second delta value. An average response time, a progression metric and adjustments to timer are calculated. A cognitive function to assess the severity of cognitive decline of user is derived.

title: FREEZABLE CHUM SPHERE
assignee: ONEID CESAR [US]; Oneid Cesar
inventors: ONEID CESAR [US]; Oneid, Cesar
abstract: The present invention provides a freezable chum sphere designed to improve fishing efficiency in attracting marine species by ensuring controlled dispersal of chum to attract fish throughout the water column. The sphere includes chum as the primary attractant, negatively buoyant material for weight, a bulk enhancer for texture and uniform mixing, and honey as a natural binder. The honey enables the sphere to maintain structural integrity when frozen and facilitates gradual breakdown upon contact with water, allowing for even distribution of the bait. Optional additives, such as edible glitter and powdered fish or shrimp extracts, enhance visual appeal and scent targeting. The sphere is molded into a durable form for ease of freezing, storage, transport, and deployment, offering an environmentally friendly and practical solution for anglers.

title: METHIONINE SULFOXIDE REDUCTASE B1 INHIBITOR AND ANTICANCER COMPOSITION COMPRISING SAME
assignee: UNIV KOREA RES & BUS FOUND [KR]; 고려대학교 산학협력단
inventors: LEE BYUNG CHEON [KR]; 이병천
abstract: The present invention relates to a methionine sulfoxide reductase B1 inhibitor and an anticancer composition comprising same. More specifically, the present invention relates to 4-[3-(4-ethylphenyl)-5-(4-hydroxyphenyl) -4,5-dihydro -1 H-pyrazol-1-yl]benzene-1-sulfonamide or 6-chloro-10-(4-ethylphenyl)-4-hydroxypyrimido[4,5-b]quinolin-2(10H)-one, which is a MsrB1 inhibitor, and an anticancer composition comprising same. The MsrB1 inhibitor of the present invention has been confirmed to inhibit differentiation into tumor-friendly M2 macrophages and to suppress tumor growth. In addition, the MsrB1 inhibitor of the present invention was found to exhibit anticancer effects through immune regulation within the tumor microenvironment, and thus can be usefully applied as a composition for cancer treatment.

title: MAGNETIC CLASP SHOWER CURTAIN HANGER
assignee: SANFORD MARJORIE [US]; Sanford Marjorie
inventors: SANFORD MARJORIE [US]; Sanford, Marjorie
abstract: [0000]    The present invention relates to an advanced shower curtain hanger system featuring a magnetic snap-apart and curtain retention mechanism, enabling quick and effortless attachment and removal of shower curtains. The system utilizes integrated neodymium magnets within durable body structures, eliminating the need for traditional clasps or hooks. Additionally, the hanger incorporates various curtain retention systems, including frictional surfaces, elastic tensioning, weighted elements, and inherent material grip properties, to prevent lateral movement and ensure stability. The hanger body may be formed from materials such as plastic, wood, metal, silicone, or composite materials and can take various shapes, including circular, horseshoe-shaped, unibody, or other suitable geometric configurations. The neodymium magnets may be coated with some durable, water resistant composite to prevent any degradation. This versatile design offers user-friendly solutions for maintaining and cleaning shower curtains with minimal effort while providing aesthetic and functional benefits.

title: VEHICLE DOOR-MOUNTED ADJUSTABLE FIREARM HOLDER
assignee: READY TO SHOULDER LLC [US]; Ready to Shoulder LLC
inventors: BROUSSARD MICHAEL [US]; CLARKE MATTHEW [US]; Broussard, Michael et al.
abstract: A vehicle door gun mount for muzzle-down storage of long-barreled firearms is disclosed. The mount comprises an adjustable clamp for attachment to a door handle, a rotatable locking mechanism, and a sliding rod with U-shaped rests. The clamp uses paddles and knobs for secure, non-damaging installation. The rotatable locking mechanism allows angle adjustment of the sliding rod, which can be locked in place. The U-shaped rests may incorporate features for improved grip, stability, and customization. The mount is constructed from durable materials selected for strength, corrosion resistance, and environmental resilience. Installation requires no tools and avoids permanent vehicle modifications. The muzzle-down configuration and adjustable components improve safety and versatility compared to traditional gun mounts. This user-friendly design addresses key issues with existing mounts, offering a more adaptable and safety-conscious solution for firearm transportation in vehicles.

title: FOUR-PHASE DIRECT CURRENT MOTOR AND GENERATOR
assignee: FORCE EQUALS MASS TIMES ACCELERATION INC [US]; Force Equals Mass Times Acceleration, Inc.
inventors: NAVARRO THOMAS [US]; NAVARRO ZACHARY J [US]; NAVARRO TIFFANY J [US] et al.
abstract: The disclosure relates to a four-phase motor and generator device with increased efficiency for generating electrical energy. The device features a stator wall with eight stator slots and four pole groups, and an armature rotatable within the stator wall. The eight stator slots are divided into four pole groups of opposing stator slots; the two opposing stator slots include an N (North) stator slot and an S (South) stator slot. N and S stator slots are alternatively activated in response to the rotation of the armature. The activation of the armature pole groups results in armatures rotating the magnetic field within the stator wall, and only four of the eight poles are actively coupled in any given configuration. The disclosure also includes a method of operating the motor for generating electrical energy with increased efficiency and in an environmentally friendly manner compared to conventional motors.

title: RENEWABLE BIO-POLYMER BASED SOLID-STATE GAMMA RADIATION DETECTOR-DOSIMETER
assignee: PURDUE RESEARCH FOUNDATION [US]; Purdue Research Foundation
inventors: TALEYARKHAN RUSI P [US]; Taleyarkhan, Rusi P.
abstract: [0000]    Methods of measuring a radiation dose implement and/or comprise measuring a first value of a mass of a sample, wherein the sample includes a polylactic acid (PLA) resin, and wherein the sample has been subjected to the radiation dose; immersing the sample in a solvent at a predetermined temperature for a first predetermined period of time; removing the sample from the solvent after the first predetermined period of time has elapsed; measuring a second value of the mass of the sample; and outputting a measurement of the radiation dose based on the first value and the second value.

title: BOTTLE ACCOMMODATING APPARATUS AND BOTTLE ACCOMMODATING METHOD
assignee: TOKYO ELECTRON LTD [JP]; Tokyo Electron Limited
inventors: KOGANEZAWA TAKARA [JP]; OOZONO AKIRA [JP]; TSUCHIYAMA MASASHI [JP] et al.
abstract: A bottle accommodating apparatus includes: a bottle mounting stage on which a bottle storing a processing liquid for manufacturing a semiconductor device is mounted; and a switcher configured to switch between a first state in which a space around the bottle mounting stage is closed and a second state in which the space is open so that the bottle is delivered to and from the bottle mounting stage.

title: ELECTRIC MOTOR, IN PARTICULAR BRUSHLESS DC MOTOR
assignee: BROSE FAHRZEUGTEILE SE & CO KG WUERZBURG [DE]; BROSE FAHRZEUGTEILE SE & CO. KOMMANDITGESELLSCHAFT, WÜRZBURG
inventors: BOZICKOVIC VLADIMIR [RS]; OGNJENOVIC VELJKO [RS]; BHOSALE YOGESH [IN] et al.
abstract: The invention relates to an electric motor (1), comprising a motor support (5) having an electronics compartment (6), into which phase lines (19) connected to a stator winding (3) are guided via seals (21) to motor electronics (8), wherein: the phase lines (19) are held on a fixing element (22) with a screw opening (28); the phase lines (19) engage through plate openings (30), corresponding to connection passages (29) in the fixing element (22), of a printed circuit board (7); and the fixing element (22) is screwed to the motor carrier (5) by means of a fastening screw (23).

title: BACTERIUM HAVING IMMUNORESTORATIVE ACTIVITY AND COMPOSITION CONTAINING SAME
assignee: KIRIN HOLDINGS KK [JP]; キリンホールディングス株式会社
inventors: HORI SHOTA [JP]; HIROSE YU [JP]; 堀　将太 et al.
abstract: This bacterium binds to at least one lectin selected from the group consisting of PNA, MPL, PHA-E, HHA, ASA, NPA, UEA-II, GNA, RS-Fuc, PHA-P, BC2L-A, AAL, LcH, PSA, PHA-L, STL, GRFT, SAMB, Calsepa, Lentil, Discoidin II, Lotus, BanLec, SNA-II, SNA-I, BC2LCN, GS-I, SBA, WGA, PALA, DBA, MAA, Jacalin, Gal2, GS-II, ECA, BPA, WFA, Con A, PSL1a, UDA, Gal9, LBA, DSA, Malectin, PA-IIL, PPL, ACG, Discoidin I, Gal3C-S, CNL, and PTL.

title: Dual-Pole Aluminum-Air Fuel Cell
assignee: LAFE OLURINDE EBENEZER [US]; FUEL CELLS GLOBAL LTD [US]; Lafe Olurinde Ebenezer et al.
inventors: LAFE OLURINDE EBENEZER [US]; Lafe, Olurinde Ebenezer
abstract: [0000]    A method and apparatus for generating electricity using an electrochemical dual-pole fuel cell with a coiled aluminum wire disc as the anode, dual air-cathodes, and dual bioplastic electrolyte discs. The invention teaches the use of inexpensive materials and simplified dual-pole fuel cell construction and assembling of fuel cells into modules, and modules into electricity generators.

title: Biodegradable pellets containing mud cake and bioplastic panels containing the same and the manufacturing method
assignee: 주식회사 에코썸코리아

title: RECOMBINANT MICROORGANISM HAVING ABILITY TO PRODUCE PHA COPOLYMER, AND METHOD FOR PRODUCING PHA COPOLYMER USING SAME
assignee: UNIV EWHA IND COLLABORATION [KR]; KOREA ADVANCED INST SCI & TECH [KR]; 이화여자대학교 산학협력단 et al.
inventors: PARK SI JAE [KR]; SONG HYEMIN [KR]; SON JIN-A [KR] et al.
abstract: The present invention relates to a recombinant microorganism having the ability to produce a polyhydroxyalkanoate (PHA) copolymer, and a method for producing a PHA copolymer using same. More particularly, the present invention relates to a recombinant microorganism having the ability to produce a PHA copolymer containing 3-hydroxyalkanoate (3-HHx) as a monomer, in which a gene encoding a PHA synthase derived from an Aeromonas sp. strain is introduced or amplified, and to a method for producing a PHA copolymer using same.

title: PLA-aPHA RESINS AND PRODUCTS
assignee: CORNING INC [US]; CORNING INCORPORATED
inventors: CANNON MADELINE STAVRIANA [US]; KENDER LAURA BRIDGET [US]; MARTIN GREGORY ROGER [US] et al.
abstract: Disclosed herein are biodegradable polymer compositions including, based on the total weight of the polymer composition, between 0.1 wt.% and 40 wt.% aPHA and between 60 wt.% and 99.9 wt.% PLA. The composition may optionally include PHA in a weight, based on the total weight of the polymer composition, between 0.1 wt.% and 35 wt.% PHA. However, when both PHA and aPHA are in the composition, the total combined weight of the PHA and aPHA based on the total weight in the polymer composition is 40 wt.% or less. The compositions may have additives included in them, such as colorants, optical brighteners, or radiation stability agents, or combinations thereof. Articles formed from the polymer compositions disclosed herein have improved mechanical properties compared to an article formed from PLA alone.

title: Carbon-Sequestering Bioplastics
assignee: OCEANS PLASTIC MAT CORPORATION [US]; Oceans Plastic Materials Corporation
inventors: CRINNION DAVID [US]; Crinnion, David
abstract: [0000]    A carbon-sequestering algal bioplastic, comprising polyhydroxyalkanoate (PHA), sodium alginate, and biochar.

title: ENGINEERED BACTERIA TO PIGMENT POLYHYDROXYALKANOATES
assignee: NEOX PUBLIC BENEFIT LLC [US]; NEOX Public Benefit LLC
inventors: OXMAN NERI [US]; WALKER KENNETH [US]; WESTLIE ANDREA H [US] et al.
abstract: In general, the present disclosure is generally directed to a method for producing a filament. The method includes providing an engineered bacterial culture comprising a pigment. Additionally, the method includes extracting the pigment from the engineered bacterial culture by contacting the engineered bacterial culture with a solvent mixture.Also, the method includes mixing the extracted pigment with a polyhydroxyalkanoate (PHA) to form a pigment PHA mixture. Further, the method includes extruding the pigment PHA mixture as a filament.

title: ENVIRONMENTALLY FRIENDLY FILLABLE AND REFILLABLE MULTI-FUNCTIONAL GOLF TEE
assignee: MITCHUM JR CHARLES DWIGHT [US]; Mitchum, JR. Charles Dwight
inventors: MITCHUM JR CHARLES DWIGHT [US]; Mitchum, JR., Charles Dwight
abstract: An environmentally friendly functional golf tee comprising a prefilled, filled and/or refillable hollow tee stem having a top and a bottom. The functional golf tee also includes a removable cap mechanically connected to the top of the tee stem. The bottom of the tee stem comprises a pointed and/or pointed and threaded tip. The bottom of the tee stem may be permanent or removable. The cap is configured to retain a beverage ranging from ⅛ OZ to 3 liquid ounces within the hollow tee stem. The top of the hollow tee stem and the cap are each configured to accept a golf ball for teeing. The functional golf tee comprises a composite material selected from at least one of a bio-degradable plastic, carbohydrate-based polymeric plastic, a compostable plastic, a bioplastic, a wheat straw, or a sustainably sourced paper product.

title: CONTINUOUS PH ADJUSTMENT METHOD
assignee: SARTORIUS STEDIM BIOTECH GMBH [DE]; Sartorius Stedim Biotech GmbH
inventors: STARK OLIVER [DE]; STEINWEDEL TOBIAS [DE]; KÜHNEL CHRISTIAN [DE] et al.
abstract: The invention relates to a method for adjusting the pH of a process liquid in a continuous process, comprising:(a.) providing the process liquid in a first volume flow having a first flow rate (f1),(b.) providing at least one treatment liquid in a second volume flow having a second flow rate (f2),(c.) mixing the at least one treatment liquid with the process liquid to produce a pH-adjusted process liquid,wherein the second flow rate is composed of a predetermined portion (fp) and a variable portion (fv), and wherein the variable portion (fv) is controlled based on at least one liquid parameter (pHa) of the pH-adjusted process liquid.

title: RECYCLING OF PETROCHEMICAL PLASTICS INTO PHA
assignee: DANIMER IPCO LLC [US]; DANIMER IPCO, LLC
inventors: LEGGETT CAROL G [US]; VAN TRUMP PHILLIP [US]; LEGGETT, Carol G. et al.
abstract: The present disclosure provides a method for forming a PHA which includes mixing a mixing a petroleum-derived polymer or partially petroleum-derived polymer with a depolymerase enzyme and reacting the polymer with the depolymerase enzyme to produce a second mixture which includes a plurality of polymer degradation products. The depolymerase enzyme is denatured and the polymer degradation products are mixed with microorganisms which include polyhydroxyalkanoate-accumulating bacteria and fermented so that the microorganisms consume at least a portion of the polymer degradation products and intercellularly synthesize at least one polyhydroxyalkanoate.

title: METHOD TO PRODUCE COLORED BIOPLASTICS USING MICROBES
assignee: ZHAN ANGELA [US]; Zhan Angela
inventors: ZHAN ANGELA [US]; Zhan, Angela
abstract: [0000]    The present invention introduces an innovative approach for the manipulation of microorganisms to generate colored bioplastics. This is achieved by concurrently expressing genes responsible for pigment production and genes involved in bioplastic synthesis within a microbial host. These genes can be synthesized, obtained from a different host through cloning, or naturally occurring within the host organism. The resultant color compounds become encapsulated within the extended bioplastic polymers within the cells, resulting in the formation of naturally pigmented bioplastics.

title: DEVICE AND METHOD FOR DIAGNOSING INFECTIOUS DISEASE USING LENS-FREE SHADOW IMAGING TECHNOLOGY BASED ON T CELL RESPONSE
assignee: METAIMMUNETECH INC [KR]; 주식회사 메타이뮨텍
inventors: JUN HYUN SIK [KR]; SEO SUNG KYU [KR]; JANG YU YEON [KR] et al.
abstract: The present invention relates to a composition and imaging technology for evaluating the immune response of T cells, and in particular, to the technological field of T cell activation analysis and infectious disease diagnosis using lens-free shadow imaging. According to the present invention, activation of T cells can be effectively induced through a T cell activation composition composed of a specific component combination (PHA, PMA, ionomycin, etc.), and T cell activation-specific image parameters (MMD_SD etc.) can be acquired from the activated T cells through lens-free shadow imaging technology. Moreover, since a T cell activity analysis device and method using these parameters exhibit significant performance in diagnosing the presence or absence of latent tuberculosis infection, the present invention has the effect of providing a biological composition that can be used for T cell functional analysis, creating a non-labeling immunodiagnostic platform, and presenting a novel analytical index for LTBI diagnosis.

title: Vehicle lamp bezel with bioplastic and composite material
assignee: DY CO LTD [KR]; 주식회사 디와이
inventors: LEE MIN HO; 이민호
abstract: [0001a]    [본 발명은 바이오플라스틱과 복합소재를 이용하여 인장강도, 내습성, 내수성을 만족할 수 있는 바이오플라스틱과 복합소재를 적용한 차량용 램프 베젤에 관한 것으로, 전방에 일정 공간을 형성하는 렌즈 및 전면에 배치되는 헤드램프를 구비하는 차량용 램프 베젤에 있어서, 사출 가능한 폴리머로 이루어지는 사출용 베이스 재료인 폴리부틸렌테레프탈렌(polybutyleneterephthalate : PBT)과, 상기 폴리부틸렌테레프탈렌과 혼합되며 전도성질을 가지는 통전재료인 탄소 섬유(Carbon Fiber)와, 상기 탄소 섬유와 혼합되는 폴리젖삿(Poly Lactic Acid : PLA) 및 상기 폴리부틸렌테레프탈렌 및 상기 통전재료인 탄소 섬유와 혼합되며 전류 인가 시 발열성능을 가지는 금속재료인 니켈 파우더(Nickle Powder)를 포함하는 것을 특징으로 한다.]

title: A method of producing a bioplastic comprising woody biomass and starchy biomass a film sheet or container made therefrom bioplastics produced thereby and films sheets or containers made therefrom
assignee: FINE CO LTD [KR]; 주식회사 파인
inventors: OH JIN HYEON [KR]; 오진현
abstract: 본 발명은, (단계 1) 목질계 바이오매스 및 전분계 바이오매스를 가소제의 존재 하에 100∼130℃의 온도에서 열 기계적으로 혼합 또는 혼련하여, 바이오매스 가소화 복합체를 제조하는 단계; (단계 2) 상기 바이오매스 가소화 복합체, 중합체 및 결합제를, 80 내지 150℃의 온도에서 1000 내지 2500 rpm의 고속으로 분쇄하는 1차 저온 분쇄단계; (단계 3) 1차 저온 분쇄된 분말을 -20 내지 0℃의 온도에서 1000 내지 2500 rpm의 고속으로 분쇄하는 2차 냉결 분쇄 단계 및 (단계 4) 2차 냉결 분쇄된 분말을 길이-직경비(LD비) 60 이상의 이축압출기에 일정한 속도로 공급하고, 130 내지 170℃의 온도에서 발생되는 수증기를 감압 하에 배출하면서 압출하는 압출 단계를 포함하는, 목질계 바이오매스 및 전분계 바이오매스를 함유하는 바이오플라스틱의 제조 방법에 관한 것이다. 본 발명에 따르면, 목질계 및 전분계 바이오매스의 탄화, 산화 등으로 인한 변성을 방지하면서 중합체의 강도를 포함한 물성을 저하시킴이 없이 목질계 및 전분계 바이오매스와 중합체를 혼합 및 복합화하여 바이오플라스틱을 제조할 수 있고, 이로부터 물성이 우수한 친환경 필름, 시트 또는 용기를 제공할 수 있다.

title: Method for manufacturing plant-based bioplastic pellets and injection products using non-edible raw materials
assignee: FINE CO LTD [KR]; 주식회사 파인
inventors: OH JIN HYEON [KR]; 오진현
abstract: [0001a]    [본 발명은 비식용계 원료를 이용해 제조한 식물체 바이오 매스 펠렛 및 이를 이용한 사출 제품 제조방법에 관한것으로, 보다 상세하게는 식용으로 쓰고 남은 식물체 껍질을 사용하여 폐자원을 다시 사용하는 동시에 적절한 물성을 지니는 플라스틱 펠렛을 제조하고, 이를 사용하여 사출제품을 제조한다. 사출제품을 제조할 때, 각각 비식용계 원료의 물성에 따른 특성을 이해하고 2~3종 비식용계 원료와 타이타니아, 지르코니아, 실리카계열의 바인더와 혼합하여 제품으로서의 터치감과 색상이 좋은 사출제품을 만드는 제조방법에 관한 것이다.]

title: Polyhomoarginine (PHA) Polymers And Uses Thereof
assignee: SINGAPORE HEALTH SERV PTE LTD [SG]; Singapore Health Services Pte Ltd
inventors: LAKSHMINARAYANAN RAJAMANI [SG]; MEHTA JODHBIR SINGH [SG]; THET TUN AUNG [SG] et al.
abstract: [0000]    The present invention relates to the use of polyhomoarginine comprising 6-26 homoarginine residues or a pharmaceutically acceptable salt thereof, in the treatment of an infection, wherein the infection is a fungal infection, a bacterial infection or a combination thereof. The present invention also relates to the use of polyhomoarginine comprising 6-26 homoarginine residues or a pharmaceutically acceptable salt thereof in a formulation or in a contact lens.

title: METHOD FOR PROMOTING THE GROWTH OF MICROALGAE BY MEANS OF NANOPLASTICS
assignee: UNIV MEXICO NAC AUTONOMA [MX]; UNIVERSIDAD NACIONAL AUTÓNOMA DE MÉXICO
inventors: RODRIGUEZ HERNÁNDEZ ANA GUADALUPE [MX]; MAGDALENO ESQUER SHEILA SORAYA [MX]; VÁZQUEZ DUHALT RAFAEL [MX] et al.
abstract: The present invention relates to a process for improving the growth of microalgae in controlled crops, for biotechnological applications. The process for promoting said growth consists in the administration of plastic or bioplastic nanoparticles in a concentration of 5 and 100 micrograms per milliliter, this as a supplement to microalgae cultures under the usual conditions that a person skilled in the art knows and manages routinely.

title: Environment-friendly degradable antibacterial tough polylactic acid-based elastic fiber and preparation method thereof
assignee: JIXIANG SANBAO HIGH TECH NEW MAT CO LTD; 吉祥三宝高科新材料有限公司
inventors: ZHANG LI; MA XIAOFEI; ZHANG ZHICHENG et al.
abstract: The invention provides an environment-friendly degradable antibacterial tough polylactic acid-based elastic fiber and a preparation method thereof, and relates to the technical field of fiber materials, the environment-friendly degradable antibacterial tough polylactic acid-based elastic fiber comprises the following components by mass: 55-80 wt% of polylactic acid, 13.7-17.5 wt% of polyhydroxyalkanoate, 0.5-5 wt% of a metal antibacterial agent, 5-20 wt% of a thermoplastic polyurethane elastomer, and 0.8-2.5 wt% of a star hyperbranched compatibilizer; the molecular structure of the star-shaped hyperbranched compatilizer comprises a polylactic acid oligomeric chain segment, a polyethylene glycol chain segment and a catechol group; the PLA provides the degradability and basic strength of the matrix; pHA enhances toughness, degradability and processability; the metal antibacterial agent is endowed with an efficient and broad-spectrum antibacterial function; the thermoplastic polyurethane elastomer contributes to excellent elasticity and flexibility, and the star hyperbranched compatilizer improves the compatibility of the fiber system; all the components have a synergistic effect under the proportion, and a multifunctional foundation of an antibacterial function, good elasticity and environment-friendly degradability is laid for the fiber.

title: SUSTAINABLE TUBULAR CONTAINER FOR CONSUMER PRODUCTS
assignee: VERITIV PACKAGING SOLUTIONS [US]; VERITIV PACKAGING SOLUTIONS
inventors: BRADLEY CHRIS [US]; CRARER ALAN [US]; TILLEY JEFF [US] et al.
abstract: A sustainable tubular container that is fully recyclable by curbside recycling, repulpable and home compostable and is easy to use, prevents undesired leakage of the consumer product material, can withstand repetitive usage, and overcomes deficiencies of existing all paper consumer product container systems. The tubular container is primarily paper based that may be recycled easily in the existing paper recycling stream with minimal non-paper parts that also are easily biodegradable, recyclable curbside or home compostable. Such a consumer product container preferably is made of paper-based materials with an inner liner or a coating and otherwise, it is made of PHA, PHB and/or other compostable moldable materials.

title: COVER BOARD FOR THERMALLY JOINED ROOFING ASSEMBLIES
assignee: CARLISLE CONSTRUCTION MAT LLC [US]; CARLISLE CONSTRUCTION MATERIALS, LLC
inventors: MOUNTAIN GREGORY [US]; MOUNTAIN, Gregory
abstract: A roofing cover board, having: a top layer having a greater affinity to bond with TPO than PVC; a core layer including recycled material; and a bottom layer having a greater affinity to bond with PVC than TPO.

title: METHOD FOR REUSING POLYURETHANE MATERIALS
assignee: RE SPORT S R L [IT]; RE-SPORT S.R.L.
inventors: NANNI ALESSANDRO [IT]; NANNI, Alessandro
abstract: Method for reusing polyurethane-based materials starting from articles or materials to be recycled. The method provides at least to dissolve a polyurethane fraction of such articles or materials in a polar solvent, thus obtaining a diluted polyurethane solution.

title: RECYCLABLE ERGONOMIC SEAT
assignee: MIEN COMPANY [US]; MiEN Company
inventors: BERGSMA REMCO [US]; LEVIN AVRON [US]; Bergsma, Remco et al.
abstract: [0000]    A seat includes a cushion structure having an inner foam layer including polyethylene foam and an outer cushion layer including recycled carpet fiber material. A removable outer covering encases the cushion structure. The outer covering includes an upper section and a lower section joined by a releasable fastener. The lower section includes a non-slip surface that extends up a portion of the sides of the seat. The inner foam layer may include a plurality of foam layers stacked atop one another. The outer cushion layer may include a top layer, a bottom layer, and a sleeve that surrounds the sides of the inner foam layer. The sleeve may be formed from a rectangular sheet of recycled carpet fiber material with opposed ends secured together to form a continuous loop.

title: CHARGE SWITCHABLE FILTRATION MEMBRANE, POLYMERIC ADDITIVE, POLYMER BLEND, AND KIT FOR MANUFACTURING SAME, METHODS OF MANUFACTURING AND OF USE
assignee: SOCPRA SCIENCES ET GENIE SEC [CA]; SOCPRA SCIENCES ET GÉNIE S.E.C.
inventors: FARNIA FARHAD [CA]; ZHAO YUE [CA]; ZAMANIAN NILOOFAR [CA] et al.
abstract: A filtration membrane comprising a hydrophobic host polymer and a polymeric additive dispersed within the host polymer is provided. The membrane and the polymeric additive undergo reversible transitions of their charge from positive to neutral to negative. The polymeric additive is an amphiphilic block copolymer comprising a hydrophobic block and a hydrophilic block comprising repeat units bearing positively ionizable weak base and negatively ionizable weak acid functional groups. A polymer blend, a kit, and a method for manufacturing the membrane relying on phase inversion via immersion precipitation are provided. Use of the membrane for filtering a feed is also provided. It advantageously uses membranes that have an isoelectric point that is about that of a contaminant and/or foulant to be removed, which involves tuning the isoelectric point of the membrane by adjusting the ratio of repeat units bearing positively ionizable weak base and negatively ionizable weak acid functional groups.

title: TECHNOLOGICAL PROCESS FOR OBTAINING ANTICARIES CHEWING GUM BASED ON A BLEND OF OILS AND PLANT EXTRACTS
assignee: TASSO DE OLIVEIRA ALVES GERMANO [BR]; TASSO DE OLIVEIRA ALVES, Germano
inventors: TASSO DE OLIVEIRA ALVES GERMANO [BR]; TASSO DE OLIVEIRA ALVES, Germano
abstract: The present invention relates to the field of food processing, with emphasis on the production of chewing gum with anticaries properties, using a blend of: chamomile oil (Chamomilla Recutita Flower Oil), lemon balm extract (Melissa Officinalis Leaf Extract), rosemary extract (Rosmarinus Officinalis Extract), clove extract (Eugenia Caryophyllus (Clove) Flower Extract), eucalyptus oil (Eucalyptus Globulus Leaf Oil), thyme essential oil (Thymus Vulgaris Flower/Leaf Oil), black jack seed extract (Bidens Pilosa Extract), mugwort extract (Artemisia Vulgaris Extract), malic acid (Malic acid), citric acid (Citric Acid), activated charcoal (Charcoal Powder), glycerol, xylitol, maltitol, powdered flavouring, anti-humectant and gum base. The invention also relates to products for promoting oral health.

title: POLYMER PROCESSING AIDS
assignee: EXXONMOBIL TECHNOLOGY & ENGINEERING COMPANY [US]; ExxonMobil Technology and engineering Company

The methods can include extruding a polymer composition, optionally with a masterbatch, wherein the polymer composition and/or the masterbatch comprises a fluorine-free PPA to make a polymeric film. The PPA comprises a mixture of one or more polyamides and one or more polyphosphites.

title: PROTON CONDUCTOR FOR ELECTROLYTE MEMBRANE OF SOLID POLYMER FUEL CELL, ELECTROLYTE MEMBRANE FOR SOLID POLYMER FUEL CELL, MEMBRANE ELECTRODE ASSEMBLY, SOLID POLYMER FUEL CELL, MANUFACTURING METHODS THEREFOR, AND PROTON CONDUCTOR FOR ELECTROLYTE MEMBRANE OF SOLID POLYMER WATER ELECTROLYSIS DEVICE
assignee: UNIV YAMAGATA NAT UNIV CORP [JP]; OJI HOLDINGS CORP [JP]; 国立大学法人山形大学 et al.
inventors: MASUHARA AKITO [JP]; MATSUO YOSHIMASA [JP]; KOYANAGI HINAKO [JP] et al.
abstract: The present invention relates to: a proton conductor for an electrolyte membrane of a solid polymer fuel cell, the proton conductor making it possible to obtain an electrolyte membrane for a solid polymer fuel cell, the electrolyte membrane having excellent proton conductivity at high temperatures and being unlikely to decrease in proton conductivity at high temperatures; an electrolyte membrane for a solid polymer fuel cell, the electrolyte membrane containing said proton conductor; a membrane electrode assembly having said electrolyte membrane for a solid polymer fuel cell; a solid polymer fuel cell having said membrane electrode assembly; manufacturing methods for a proton conductor for an electrolyte membrane of a solid polymer fuel cell, an electrolyte membrane for a solid polymer fuel cell, a membrane electrode assembly, and a solid polymer fuel cell; and a proton conductor for an electrolyte membrane of a solid polymer water electrolysis device.　This proton conductor for an electrolyte membrane of a solid polymer fuel cell contains the following component (A) and component (B).　Component (A): fine fibrous cellulose having a fiber width of 1,000 nm or less. Component (B): a polymer compound having one phosphorus oxoacid group.

title: FABRICATION, COMPOSITION AND APPLICATION OF CONDUCTIVE POLYMER / RUBBER COMPOSITE
assignee: AIRBOSS OF AMERICA CORP [CA]; AIRBOSS OF AMERICA CORP.
inventors: YIN LU [CA]; VAHIDIFAR ALI [CA]; CHOLEWINSKI ALEXSANDER [CA] et al.
abstract: A conductive coating composition may be produced by forming a conductive polymer in situ in a rubber latex. The conductive polymer may be polypyrrole. The coating may be crosslinked. The composition may further include a peroxide-containing crosslinking agent, an epoxy-containing crosslinking agent, a carbodiimide crosslinking agent, and/or an aziridine-containing crosslinking agent.

title: SALT OF CARBOXYL GROUP-CONTAINING CROSSLINKED POLYMER AND USE OF SAME
assignee: TOAGOSEI CO LTD [JP]; 東亞合成株式会社
inventors: YOSHIMORI KENICHI [JP]; HASEGAWA TAKASHI [JP]; 吉森　健一 et al.
abstract: Disclosed is a salt of a carboxyl group-containing crosslinked polymer, the salt containing an amine salt of a carboxyl group-containing crosslinked polymer, wherein an amine that constitutes the amine salt has a nitrile group. The salt of a carboxyl group-containing crosslinked polymer has a value (Z) calculated by mathematical formula (1) of 0.5 to 100 inclusive.　(1): Z = N1/N2 × 100 N1: am amine salt of a carboxyl group-containing crosslinked polymer (mol%) N2: an amine salt of a carboxyl group-containing crosslinked polymer and an alkali metal salt of a carboxyl group-containing crosslinked polymer (mol%)

title: CONDUCTIVE POLYMER ENHANCED SOCKET
assignee: ADVANCED MICRO DEVICES INC [US]; Advanced Micro Devices, Inc.
inventors: BERGE LAYNE ALBERT [US]; NEALLY SCOTTY [US]; REFAEE CAMERON ROBERT [US] et al.
abstract: [0000]    Disclosed herein are a socket, an electronic device having a socket, and methods for communicating between a printed circuity board (PCB) and an integrated circuity (IC) die through a socket. In one example, a socket is provided that includes a base plate, a ground connector coupled to the base plate, and a plurality of electrical signal connectors coupled to the base plate. A first electrical signal connector of the plurality of electrical signal connectors includes an IC chip contact portion extending above the base plate, and a board contact portion extending below the base plate. The ground connector includes an IC chip ground pad contact portion extending above the base plate. The IC chip contact portion is formed from a polymer that is conductive and/or coated by a conductive material.

title: VINYL CHLORIDE-BASED POLYMER, RESIN COMPOSITION COMPRISING SAME AND PREPARATION METHOD THEREFOR
assignee: LG CHEMICAL LTD [KR]; 주식회사 엘지화학
inventors: YOUK KYUNG SEOG [KR]; KIM KUN JI [KR]; KIM HYUN CHUL [KR] et al.
abstract: The present invention relates to a vinyl chloride-based polymer, a resin composition comprising same and a preparation method therefor, the vinyl chloride-based polymer having a degree of polymerization of 2800-5000, and having a peak in a region between 17 minutes and 18 minutes of retention time in a graph obtained as a result of pyrolysis-gas chromatography analysis.

title: POLYMER MACROMOLECULE, AND GEL DISPERSION LIQUID AND GEL MASS EACH USING SAME
assignee: GEL COAT BIOMATERIALS INC [JP]; 株式会社Ｇｅｌ　Ｃｏａｔ　Ｂｉｏｍａｔｅｒｉａｌｓ
inventors: ITOH MAKI [JP]; YOSHIDA SHIN [JP]; TAKAI MADOKA [JP] et al.
abstract: The purpose of the present invention is to provide: a polymer macromolecule in which the particle diameter of gel particles that are formed when the polymer macromolecule is formed into a hydrogel is fine; and a gel dispersion liquid and a gel mass each using the polymer macromolecule. The polymer macromolecule is a homopolymer that is composed of a monomer unit (A) having a zwitterionic group, or a copolymer that is composed of the monomer unit (A) and another monomer unit (B). The polymer macromolecule has a weight average molecular weight of 400,000 or less as determined by gel permeation chromatography using a mixed solvent of water and methanol as an eluent and using polyethylene glycol as a standard sample. It is preferable that the other monomer unit (B) contains an N-succinimide ester group. The gel dispersion liquid and the gel mass are obtained by adding water to the polymer macromolecule.

title: VINYL CHLORIDE-BASED POLYMER, RESIN COMPOSITION CONTAINING SAME, AND METHOD FOR PREPARING SAME
assignee: LG CHEMICAL LTD [KR]; 주식회사 엘지화학
inventors: KIM KUN JI [KR]; YOUK KYUNG SEOG [KR]; SEO EUN BYEOL [KR] et al.
abstract: The present invention relates to a vinyl chloride-based polymer, a resin composition comprising same, and a method for preparing same, wherein the vinyl chloride-based polymer has a peak in a region corresponding to a retention time of 1.4 minutes to 2 minutes in a graph obtained by liquid chromatography/photodiode array detector analysis.

title: POLYMER ELECTROLYTE MEMBRANE FOR LITHIUM SECONDARY BATTERY AND LITHIUM SECONDARY BATTERY INCLUDING THE SAME
assignee: SK ON CO LTD [KR]; NAT UNIV GYEONGSANG IACF [KR]; SK ON CO., LTD. et al.
inventors: LEE HAN SOL [KR]; PARK MYUNG SOO [KR]; KIM KI HYUN [KR] et al.
abstract: A polymer electrolyte membrane for a lithium secondary battery according to the present disclosure includes a copolymer. The copolymer include a main chain including a first repeating unit and a second repeating unit, a fluoroalkyl group bonded as a side chain to the main chain, and a polymer segment bonded as a side chain to the main chain and containing oxygen. A lithium secondary battery according to the present disclosure includes the polymer electrolyte membrane for a lithium secondary battery.

title: VINYL CHLORIDE-BASED POLYMER, RESIN COMPOSITION COMPRISING SAME, AND METHOD FOR PREPARING SAME
assignee: LG CHEMICAL LTD [KR]; 주식회사 엘지화학
inventors: CHOI HEUNG YEAL [KR]; HA HYUN KYOU [KR]; YOUK KYUNG SEOG [KR] et al.
abstract: The present invention relates to a vinyl chloride-based polymer, a resin composition comprising same, and a method for preparing same, the vinyl chloride-based polymer having a degree of polymerization of 2800-5000, and a ratio (Mz/Mw) of a relative z-average molecular weight to a relative weight-average molecular weight of 2.6-5.5, the relative weight-average molecular weight being obtained using gel permeation chromatography (GPC) analysis with polystyrene as a reference material.

title: VINYL CHLORIDE-BASED POLYMER, RESIN COMPOSITION COMPRISING SAME, AND METHOD FOR PREPARING SAME
assignee: LG CHEMICAL LTD [KR]; 주식회사 엘지화학
inventors: CHOI HEUNG YEAL [KR]; HA HYUN KYOU [KR]; YOUK KYUNG SEOG [KR] et al.
abstract: The present invention relates to: a vinyl chloride-based polymer wherein the degree of polymerization is 2800-5000, and in a relative molecular weight graph obtained using gel permeation chromatography (GPC) analysis with polystyrene as a reference material, the ratio of the weight-average molecular weight in the upper 10% molecular weight region based on the cumulative mass fraction to the weight-average molecular weight in the lower 10% molecular weight region based on the cumulative mass fraction is 45-90; a resin composition comprising the vinyl chloride-based polymer; and a method for preparing the vinyl chloride-based polymer.

title: VINYL CHLORIDE-BASED POLYMER, RESIN COMPOSITION COMPRISING SAME, AND PREPARATION METHOD THEREFOR
assignee: LG CHEMICAL LTD [KR]; 주식회사 엘지화학
inventors: YOUK KYUNG SEOG [KR]; HA HYUN KYOU [KR]; KIM KUN JI [KR] et al.
abstract: The present invention relates to a vinyl chloride-based polymer, a resin composition comprising same and a preparation method therefor, the vinyl chloride-based polymer having a degree of polymerization of 2,800-5,000, and having a polydispersity index of 3.5 or more, calculated from a weight average molecular weight and a number average molecular weight which are obtained through gel permeation chromatography (GPC) analysis by using polystyrene as a standard according to US EPA 3640A: 1994.

title: CURABLE RESIN COMPOSITION, COATING LAYER, AND FILM
assignee: SEKISUI CHEMICAL CO LTD [JP]; 積水化学工業株式会社
inventors: UCHINO SHINYA [JP]; ONO MASAKI [JP]; 内野　慎也 et al.
abstract: One purpose of the present invention is to provide a curable resin composition with which it is possible to obtain a cured product having exceptional hardness, adhesion, and discoloration resistance even if exposed to a high temperature, high humidity environment. Another purpose of the present invention is to provide a coating layer and a film that are formed using said curable resin composition. The present invention is a curable resin composition that contains a curable resin, a coupling agent, and a polymerization initiator. The curable resin includes a curable resin that has two or more epoxy groups per molecule and is free of aromatic rings. The coupling agent includes a coupling agent that has one glycidyl group per molecule. The amount of the coupling agent that has one glycidyl group per molecule is 10-50 parts by mass per 100 total parts by mass of the curable resin as a whole and the coupling agent as a whole.

title: TRANSFER FILM
assignee: TORAY ADVANCED FILM CO LTD [JP]; 東レフィルム加工株式会社
inventors: OSHIKIRI TAKAHITO [JP]; TSUKAMOTO KOICHI [JP]; SUZUKI TOSHIFUMI [JP] et al.
abstract: Provided is a transfer film that suppresses the occurrence of optical unevenness and film deformation. The present invention pertains to a transfer film comprising an active energy ray-curable resin layer peelably layered on a base material, wherein the active energy ray-curable resin layer has, in the infrared spectrum, an IR peak absorbance ratio (T810/T830) between the absorbance (T810) of an IR peak at 810 cm-1 and the absorbance (T830) of an IR peak at 830 cm-1 of 0.60 to 1.20.

title: FILM REMOVAL DEVICE, FILM REMOVAL METHOD, STORAGE MEDIUM, AND FILM REMOVAL SYSTEM
assignee: TOKYO ELECTRON LTD [JP]; 東京エレクトロン株式会社
inventors: MACHIDORI SHINICHI [JP]; HAMADA MASAHITO [JP]; 待鳥　真一 et al.
abstract: A film removal device according to the present disclosure comprises: a placement part where a rectangular substrate having a film formed on the surface thereof is placed; a processing part that removes the film from an edge part of the surface of the substrate, and that comprises a processing liquid supply port which supplies a processing liquid for dissolving the film to the edge part, and an exhaust port which exhausts gas around the edge part in order to remove the dissolved product of the film; a detection part for detecting vertical-direction and horizontal-direction positions at a plurality of locations in the edge part of the substrate placed on the placement part; and a movement part that, in order to remove the film along the edge part of the substrate, moves the processing part which supplies the processing liquid from the processing liquid supply port in the vertical direction and the horizontal direction on the basis of data regarding the vertical-direction inclination and the horizontal-direction inclination of the substrate acquired from the positions.

title: LOW-E FILM TO WHICH ELECTROMAGNETIC WAVE TRANSMISSION PATTERN IS APPLIED
assignee: LG ELECTRONICS INC [KR]; 엘지전자 주식회사
inventors: WOO SEUNGMIN [KR]; PARK BYEONGYONG [KR]; 우승민 et al.
abstract: Various embodiments of the present disclosure relate to a low-E film to which an electromagnetic wave transmission pattern of a specific frequency is applied. The low-E film comprises: an insulating layer made of an insulating material; and a metal coating layer including a metal or metal oxide coated on one surface of the insulating layer. The metal coating layer has a first pattern formed by removing a portion of the metal coating layer, and the first pattern includes a pattern having a plurality of oval surfaces of an identical shape within a rectangular unit cell, and the pattern having the plurality of oval surfaces is arranged with the long axes of the respective oval surfaces at constant angles, and the long axes of the pattern having the oval surfaces or the extension lines of the long axes meet at one intersection point located at the middle point of the unit cell.

title: ANTIGLARE AND ANTIREFLECTION FILM AND METHOD FOR MANUFACTURING ANTIGLARE AND ANTIREFLECTION FILM
assignee: HIGASHIYAMA FILM CO LTD [JP]; 東山フイルム株式会社
inventors: KURUMIZAWA TAKUYA [JP]; 胡桃沢　卓彌
abstract: Provided are an antiglare and antireflection film that exhibits a good antiglare property and has excellent antireflection performance, and a method for manufacturing such an antiglare and antireflection film.　An antiglare and antireflection film 10 comprises: a base material film 12; a hard coat layer 14 formed on a surface of the base material film 12; an optical adjustment layer 16 formed on a surface of the hard coat layer 14; an antiglare layer 18 formed on a surface of the optical adjustment layer 16; and a low refractive index layer 24 formed on a surface of the antiglare layer 18. The refractive index (nAG) of the antiglare layer 18 is 1.60-1.81 at a wavelength of 550 nm. At the wavelength of 550 nm, the refractive index (nAG) of the antiglare layer 18, the refractive index (nHC) of the hard coat layer 14, and the refractive index (nOA) of the optical adjustment layer 16 satisfy relationships of expressions (1) and (2), and the film thickness of the optical adjustment layer 16 is 60-150 nm.　(1): nAG-nHC ≥ 0.08 (2): nHC < nOA < nAG

title: LOW-EMISSIVITY FILM WITH FREQUENCY-SELECTIVE TRANSMISSION OR SHIELDING PATTERNS FOR ELECTROMAGNETIC WAVES
assignee: LG ELECTRONICS INC [KR]; 엘지전자 주식회사
inventors: WOO SEUNGMIN [KR]; PARK BYEONGYONG [KR]; 우승민 et al.
abstract: Various embodiments disclosed herein relate to a low-E film using patterns for selectively transmitting or blocking electromagnetic waves according to frequency, the low-E film comprising: an insulating layer made of an insulating material; and a metal coating layer obtained by coating one surface of the insulating layer with a metal or metal oxide. The metal coating layer includes a plurality of unit cells having a polygonal shape and repeatedly arranged in rows and columns, and each of the plurality of unit cells includes patterns formed by partially removing the metal coating layer. The patterns include: a shielding pattern that forms a shielding region including the center of the unit cell in order to block electromagnetic waves in a specific frequency band; and a transmission pattern that is formed in a transmission region, which is a region of the unit cell other than the shielding region, in order to transmit electromagnetic waves in frequency bands other than the specific frequency band.

title: METHOD FOR PRODUCING BIAXIALLY STRETCHED LAMINATED FILM, BIAXIALLY STRETCHED LAMINATED FILM, AND PACKAGE
assignee: DOW MITSUI POLYCHEMICALS CO LTD [JP]; 三井・ダウポリケミカル株式会社
inventors: HASHIMOTO HIDENORI [JP]; GONOHE HISAO [JP]; IKEDA TAKAYA [JP] et al.
abstract: A method for producing a biaxially stretched laminated film, the biaxially stretched laminated film (10) containing an ionomer resin layer (A) containing an ionomer of an ethylene-unsaturated carboxylic acid copolymer, a polyethylene resin layer (B1) provided on one surface of the ionomer resin layer (A) and containing a polyethylene resin, and a polyethylene resin layer (B2) provided on the other surface of the ionomer resin layer (A) and containing a polyethylene resin, and the method for producing the biaxially stretched laminated film comprising: a lamination step for laminating the polyethylene resin layer (B1) and the polyethylene resin layer (B2) onto the ionomer resin layer (A) to obtain the laminated film; and a sequential stretching step for stretching the laminated film in the resin flow direction (MD direction) of the ionomer resin layer (A) and then stretching the laminated film in the direction (TD direction) perpendicular to the resin flow direction of the ionomer resin layer (A).

title: METHOD FOR FORMING THIN FILM
assignee: JUSUNG ENG CO LTD [KR]; 주성엔지니어링(주)
inventors: KIM YOUNG WOON [KR]; HWANG CHUL JOO [KR]; 김영운 et al.
abstract: The present invention provides a method for forming a thin film on a substrate in a chamber, the method for forming a thin film comprising the step of changing the position of the substrate at least once between a first position in the chamber, a second position different from the first position, and a third position different from the first position.

title: POLYIMIDE FILM AND METHOD FOR PRODUCING SAME
assignee: PI ADVANCED MAT CO LTD [KR]; 피아이첨단소재 주식회사
inventors: YEO MOON-JIN [KR]; CHAE SU-KYUNG [KR]; BACK SUNG-YUL [KR] et al.
abstract: The present invention provides a polyimide film and a method for producing same, the polyimide film comprising a polyimide that comprises a dianhydride monomer and a diamine monomer as polymerization units, wherein: the dianhydride monomer comprises benzophenonetetracarboxylic dianhydride, biphenyltetracarboxylic dianhydride and pyromellitic dianhydride; the diamine monomer comprises 1,3-bis (4-aminophenoxy) benzene, 1,4-bis (4-aminophenoxy) benzene, or a combination thereof, and paraphenylene diamine; and the film has a dielectric loss rate of 0.0030 or less, and has an adhesive strength with respect to a copper foil of 0.8 kgf/cm or more.

title: INSULATING FILM FOR OPTOELECTRONIC DEVICES AND MANUFACTURING METHOD THEREFOR
assignee: HERACHEM TECH CO LTD [KR]; 주식회사 헤라켐테크놀러지
inventors: YU SUN [KR]; YUN YOUNG HEE [KR]; YANG KI SEOK [KR] et al.
abstract: One aspect of the present invention relates to an insulating film for optoelectronic devices, the insulating film being manufactured from a curable composition comprising: a polysiloxane comprising ArSiO3/2 units in an amount of 90 mol% or more; and a crosslinking agent comprising an aminosilane, wherein the insulating film does not develop cracks even under high-temperature curing conditions and can exhibit excellent durability after curing.

title: FILM FORMATION DEVICE AND FILM FORMATION METHOD
assignee: TOKYO ELECTRON LTD [JP]; 東京エレクトロン株式会社
inventors: FUKAMI SHUN [JP]; TANAKA MASAYUKI [JP]; 深見　駿 et al.
abstract: A film formation device according to one embodiment of the present disclosure comprises: a processing container the inside of which can be depressurized; a shower head that supplies a gas into the processing container; and a pressure sensor. The shower head includes a lower member in which a plurality of gas holes are formed, and an upper member that forms a diffusion space for diffusing the gas between the upper member and the lower member. The pressure sensor is provided inside the upper member, with a pressure sensing surface thereof being exposed to the diffusion space.

title: INSULATING FILM FOR OPTOELECTRONIC DEVICES AND MANUFACTURING METHOD THEREFOR
assignee: HERACHEM TECH CO LTD [KR]; 주식회사 헤라켐테크놀러지
inventors: YU SUN [KR]; YUN YOUNG HEE [KR]; YANG KI SEOK [KR] et al.
abstract: One aspect of the present invention relates to an insulating film for optoelectronic devices, the insulating film being manufactured from a curable composition comprising: a first polysiloxane comprising ArSiO3/2 units in an amount of 90 mol% or more; a second polysiloxane comprising R1SiO3/2 units in an amount of 70 to 30 mol% and SiO4/2 units in an amount of 30 to 70 mol%; and a crosslinking agent comprising an aminosilane, wherein the insulating film does not develop cracks even under high-temperature curing conditions and can exhibit excellent durability after curing.

title: TITANIUM OXIDE FILM AND METHOD FOR PRODUCING SAME
assignee: NITTO DENKO CORP [JP]; 日東電工株式会社
inventors: HAYASHI YUJIRO [JP]; NAKAJIMA KAZUHIRO [JP]; OGITA TAKUYA [JP] et al.
abstract: A titanium oxide film (1) comprises a crystal that, when observed by a transmission electron microscope, exhibits a set of Ti2O3 diffraction spots in an electron beam diffraction image. The titanium oxide film (1) has a refractive index of more than 2.50 but not more than 2.80 when light having a wavelength of 550 nm is incident thereon.

title: COMPOSITION AND METHOD FOR FORMING FLUORINE-ADDED SILICON OXIDE FILM
assignee: AIR LIQUIDE [FR]; AIR LIQUIDE JAPAN G K [JP]; レール・リキード－ソシエテ・アノニム・プール・レテュード・エ・レクスプロワタシオン・デ・プロセデ・ジョルジュ・クロード et al.
inventors: GRAO MATTHIEU [JP]; WILLING GUILLEMIN [JP]; GIRARD JEAN-MARC [FR] et al.
abstract: Provided are a composition and a method with which a fluorine-added silicon oxide film can be effectively formed on a substrate. Disclosed is a composition for forming a fluorine-added silicon oxide film, said composition including one or a plurality of precursors, wherein the one or plurality of precursors include one or a plurality of fluorines that bond to silicon, do not include any fluorines that bond to carbon or nitrogen, and are reactive with hydroxy groups on the surface of a substrate. Also disclosed are a method for forming a fluorine-added silicon oxide film using said composition, and a method for producing a substrate coated with a fluorine-added silicon oxide film using said composition.

title: CURABLE RESIN COMPOSITION, DRY FILM, AND CURED PRODUCT
assignee: TAIYO HOLDINGS CO LTD [JP]; 太陽ホールディングス株式会社
inventors: INOUE GO [JP]; ISHIKAWA NOBUHIRO [JP]; SEKIGUCHI SHOYA [JP] et al.
abstract: Provided are: a curable resin composition from which a cured film having excellent flexibility while maintaining excellent resolution can be formed; and a dry film and cured product that can be obtained by using the curable resin composition. An embodiment of the present invention is a curable resin composition. The curable resin composition contains: a resin that includes one or more groups selected from hydroxyl groups and carboxyl groups; a compound including two or more (meth)acryloyl groups; a crosslinking agent; and a photoacid generator. The contained amount of the compound including two or more (meth)acryloyl groups is 30 parts by mass or greater per 100 parts by mass of the crosslinking agent.

title: LAMINATE, METHOD FOR PRODUCING LAMINATE, AND ANTIREFLECTION FILM
assignee: NITTO DENKO CORP [JP]; 日東電工株式会社
inventors: HAYASHI YUJIRO [JP]; NAKAJIMA KAZUHIRO [JP]; OGITA TAKUYA [JP] et al.
abstract: A laminate (1) includes a substrate (2), a protective layer (3), and a titanium oxide film (4) in this order toward one side in the thickness direction. The titanium oxide film (4) includes crystals that show a group of Ti2O3 diffraction spots in an electron beam diffraction image observed with a transmission electron microscope, wherein a refractive index when light with a wavelength of 550 nm is incident thereon exceeds 2.50 but 2.80 or less.

title: METHOD OF FORMING THIN FILM BY USING PI-BONDING MATERIAL
assignee: EGTM CO LTD [KR]; 주식회사 이지티엠
inventors: CHO KYU HO [KR]; KIM JAE MIN [KR]; HAN JI YEON [KR] et al.
abstract: According to one embodiment of the present invention, a method of forming a thin film by using a pi-bonding material comprises: a pi-bonding material supply step of supplying a pi-bonding material to the inside of a chamber in which a substrate is placed, so as to adsorb the pi-bonding material onto the substrate; a step of purging the inside of the chamber; a metal precursor supply step of supplying a metal precursor to the inside of the chamber so as to adsorb the metal precursor onto the substrate; a step of purging the inside of the chamber; and a thin film formation step of supplying, to the inside of the chamber, a reactant to be reacted with the adsorbed metal precursor, and forming a thin film.

title: CURABLE RESIN COMPOSITION, DRY FILM, AND CURED PRODUCT
assignee: TAIYO HOLDINGS CO LTD [JP]; 太陽ホールディングス株式会社
inventors: INOUE GO [JP]; ISHIKAWA NOBUHIRO [JP]; SEKIGUCHI SHOYA [JP] et al.
abstract: Provided are a curable resin composition capable of forming a cured product having excellent adhesion to a substrate, and a dry film and a cured product obtained by using the curable resin composition. An embodiment of the present invention is a curable resin composition. The curable resin composition contains: a resin having one or more selected from the group consisting of a hydroxyl group and a carboxyl group; a crosslinking agent; a photoacid generating agent; and a silicon-containing compound having two or more (meth)acryloyl groups.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR ANALYZING MULTILAYER THIN FILM CHARACTERISTICS THROUGH ALGEBRAIC ANALYSIS OF ELLIPSOMETRIC SIGNALS
assignee: UNIV INHA RES & BUSINESS FOUND [KR]; 인하대학교 산학협력단
inventors: YOO SEOK JAE [KR]; 유석재
abstract: The present invention relates to a method and an apparatus for analyzing multilayer thin film characteristics through algebraic analysis of ellipsometric signals and, more specifically, to a method and an apparatus for analyzing multilayer thin film characteristics through algebraic analysis of ellipsometric signals, whereby the refractive index and thickness of a multilayer thin film can be simultaneously analyzed through algebraic equation analysis of reflection or transmission signals of light obtained through ellipsometry measurement.

title: COMPOSITION FOR FORMING RESIST UNDERLAYER FILM AND METHOD FOR MANUFACTURING SEMICONDUCTOR SUBSTRATE
assignee: JSR CORP [JP]; ＪＳＲ株式会社
inventors: SAKAI KAZUNORI [JP]; TSUJI TAKASHI [JP]; TAKADA KAZUYA [JP] et al.
abstract: The present invention provides: a composition for forming a resist underlayer film, with which it is possible to form a resist underlayer film that has excellent resist pattern rectangularity; and a method for manufacturing a semiconductor substrate. This composition for forming a resist underlayer film contains a polymer that has a repeating unit represented by formula (1), and a solvent. (In formula (1), Y represents a (2 + k)-valent organic group having 1 to 20 carbon atoms. X0 represents a monovalent organic group having 1 to 40 carbon atoms. k represents an integer of 1 to 5. In cases where k is 2 or more, a plurality of X0 moieties may be the same as or different from each other. At least two partial structures represented by formula (a) are included in the k X0. In formula (a), R1 represents a monovalent organic group having 1 to 20 carbon atoms, and * represents a bond with the other part of X0.)

title: POLYOLEFIN MICROPOROUS FILM, SEPARATOR FOR NONAQUEOUS ELECTROLYTE SECONDARY BATTERY, AND NONAQUEOUS ELECTROLYTE SECONDARY BATTERY
assignee: TORAY INDUSTRIES [JP]; 東レ株式会社
inventors: OKAMOTO HIROYA [JP]; MATSUSHITA KATSUHIKO [JP]; LI DAN [JP] et al.
abstract: The present invention addresses the problem of providing a polyolefin microporous film that, when used as a separator for a nonaqueous electrolyte secondary battery, achieves both resistance to impact and resistance to internal short-circuiting at a high level without compromising cycle characteristics and output characteristics. The present invention is a polyolefin microporous film that has both characteristics (1) and (2). (1) The puncture strength per basis weight is not less than 0.9 N/(g/m2). (2) In a differential scanning calorimetry (DSC) measurement, the peak top temperature of the maximum peak in the second temperature increase process is not lower than 130°C but lower than 138°C.

title: COATING SYSTEM AND COATING LAYER FORMING METHOD
assignee: ENATECH CORP [JP]; 株式会社エナテック
inventors: YOSHIZUKA HIDETO [JP]; YAMAMOTO AKIHITO [JP]; WATANABE SHO [JP] et al.
abstract: The purpose of the present invention is to provide a coating system capable of improving efficiency while reducing contamination and damage risks of a substrate in a series of processing steps in which an easily damaged substrate such as a glass substrate is taken out from a storage part, a coating liquid is applied on an end surface of the substrate and cured, and then the substrate is stored in the storage part. This coating system (10) comprises: a coating device (11) that applies a coating liquid on at least an end surface of a substrate (1); a curing device (40) that cures the coating liquid applied on the substrate (1); and a transfer device (60) having a transfer hand (61) for holding the substrate (1). The transfer device (60) is configured to: transfer the substrate (1) from a storage part (70) for the substrate (1) to the coating device (11) by means of the transfer hand (61); transfers, to the curing device (40), the substrate (1) on which the coating liquid is applied by the coating device (11); and transfer, to the storage part (70), the substrate (1) on which the coating liquid has been cured by the curing device (40).

title: DEVICES FOR MULTI-LAYER SLOT DIE COATING AND COATING METHODS
assignee: QUZHOU MICROQUANTA RENEWABLE ENERGY TECHN CO LTD [CN]; QUZHOU MICROQUANTA RENEWABLE ENERGY TECHN. CO., LTD.
inventors: YAN BUYI [CN]; YAO JIZHONG [CN]; WU YE [CN] et al.
abstract: [0000]    Disclosed is a device for multi-layer slot die coating and a coating method. The device comprises a first coating die, a second coating die, and a drying module. One end of the first coating die is connected with a first paste. The other end of the first coating die is configured to coat the first paste onto a substrate to form a first coating layer. One end of the second coating die is connected with a second paste. The other end of the second coating die is configured to coat the second paste onto the substrate to form a second coating layer. The drying module is disposed between the first coating die and the second coating die to dry a surface of the first coating layer such that a solid coating interface that causes the first coating layer and the second coating layer not to interfere with each other is formed.

title: BATTERY ELECTRODE COATING DEVICE
assignee: LG ENERGY SOLUTION LTD [KR]; 주식회사 엘지에너지솔루션
inventors: JANG JIWOONG [KR]; AHN BYOUNG HOON [KR]; PARK SEUNG SEO [KR] et al.
abstract: The battery electrode coating device according to the present invention comprises: a coating die; spacer shims mounted on the coating die; and bolt-type fixing members for fixing the spacer shims to the coating die in the manner in which coupling parts thereof pass through the spacer shims and are then coupled to the coating die, wherein the portion of each coupling part that is positioned inside a through hole of a spacer shim comprises at least two steps having different diameters.

title: METAL FOIL WITH COATING LAYER, METAL-CLAD LAMINATE, AND METHOD FOR PRODUCING METAL FOIL WITH COATING LAYER
assignee: FURUKAWA ELECTRIC CO LTD [JP]; 古河電気工業株式会社
inventors: YOSHIDA SHO [JP]; TOMIZAWA KEIICHI [JP]; YAMOTO SATOKO [JP] et al.
abstract: Provided are: a metal foil with a coating layer, wherein the metal foil is a smooth metal foil, and the coating layer has a roughened surface on the side opposite to the metal foil; a metal-clad laminate obtained by laminating an insulating base material and the metal foil with a coating layer with the coating layer of the metal foil with a coating layer facing the insulating base material side; and a method for producing a metal foil with a coating layer.

title: METHOD FOR FORMING COATING LAYER ON SUBSTRATE AND COATING LAYER FORMED THEREBY
assignee: UNIV MING CHI TECHNOLOGY [TW]; Ming Chi University of Technology
inventors: JIAN SHUN-YI [TW]; LIU YU-CHENG [TW]; JIAN, Shun-Yi et al.
abstract: [0000]    A method for forming a coating layer on a substrate includes the steps of: providing a substrate which is made of a magnesium alloy; preparing a permanganate conversion solution that contains a permanganate salt, sodium vanadate, and a buffering agent; impregnating the substrate and an inert conductive material into the permanganate conversion solution, followed by electrically connecting the substrate to a positive electrode of a power supply to serve as an anode, and electrically connecting the inert conductive material to a negative electrode of the power supply to serve as a cathode; applying a voltage ranging from 2 V to 15 V to the substrate in the permanganate conversion solution using the power supply, so as to form a coating layer on the substrate, thereby obtaining a coated substrate; and removing the coated substrate from the permanganate conversion solution. A coating layer formed by the aforesaid method is also provided.

title: SELF HEALING PLASMA ELECTROYTIC OXIDATION COATING
assignee: HAMILTON SUNDSTRAND CORP [US]; Hamilton Sundstrand Corporation
inventors: KUTTIYADAN JITHIN [IN]; Kuttiyadan, Jithin
abstract: [0000]    An aircraft component including an aluminum substrate and a plasma electrolytic oxidation (PEO) coating disposed on the aluminum substrate. The PEO coating includes a plurality of cavities. A set of nano capsules disposed in the plurality of cavities, with at least a portion of the nano capsules in the set of nano capsules containing a corrosion inhibitor.

title: METHODS FOR COATING GRANULES AND THE GRANULES THEREOF
assignee: CERTAINTEED LLC [US]; CERTAINTEED LLC
inventors: CAMPONESCHI BROTHERSON ERIN LYNN [US]; GALLOWAY KEVIN [US]; TINKLENBERG JULIE [US] et al.
