title: VERFAHREN ZUR HERSTELLUNG VON TRÄGERPARTIKELN FÜR DIE KULTIVIERUNG BIOLOGISCHER ZELLEN UND DEREN ANWENDUNG FÜR DIE KULTIVIERUNG BIOLOGISCHER ZELLEN
assignee: FRAUNHOFER GES FORSCHUNG [DE]; UNIV DES SAARLANDES KOERPERSCHAFT DES OEFFENTLICHEN RECHTS [DE]; Fraunhofer-Gesellschaft zur Förderung der angewandten Forschung eingetragener Verein et al.
inventors: ZIMMERMANN HEIKO [DE]; GEPP MICHAEL [DE]; BALSTERS JOHNN-MAJD [DE] et al.
abstract: Die Erfindung betrifft Verfahren zur Herstellung von Trägerpartikeln für die Kultivierung biologischer Zellen, insbesondere getrocknete Hydrogel-Partikel, und solche Trägerpartikel umfassende Anwendungen und Bioreaktoren. Anwendungen der Erfindung sind bei der Kultivierung biologischer Zellen, insbesondere bei der Kultivierung (Expansion) von multipotenten und pluripotenten Stammzellen oder von differenzierten Zellen, z.B. für das Tissue engineering, gegeben. Die Erfindung betriff ferner einen zur Durchführung des Verfahrens ausgebildeten Getriertrockner. Das Verfahren zur Herstellung von Trägerpartikeln für die Kultivierung biologischer Zellen umfasst die Schritte: die Bereitstellung (S10) einer wässrigen Suspension von Hydrogel-Kügelchen, die Gefriertrocknung (S30) der Hydrogel-Kügelchen, so dass getrocknete Hydrogel-Partikel gebildet werden, das Lagern (S40) der gefriergetrockneten Hydrogel-Partikel, und das anschließendes Rehydrieren (S50) der Hydrogel-Partikel durch Zugabe eines wässrigen Kultivierungsmediums für die Kultivierung biologischer Zellen. Das Verfahren zeichnet sich dadurch aus, dass die Gefriertrocknung (S30) der Hydrogel-Kügelchen und das Lagern (S40) und Reyhdrieren (S50) der Hydrogel-Partikel im selben Behälter erfolgt, der ein Bioreaktor (10) zur Kultivierung biologischer Zellen ist. Vorteihaft können die Hydrogel-Partikel als Trägerpartikel für die Kultivierung biologischer Zellen effizient in hoher Qualität und in ausreichend großer Menge hergestellt werden. Ein weiter Vorteil ist, dass das Verfahren die Herstellung eines „ready-to-use“-Bioreaktors mit Trägerpartikeln als fertiges Kit ermöglicht.

title: GENERATION OF TISSUE-SPECIFIC STEM CELLS FROM SOMATIC CELLS
assignee: YEGANEH BEHZAD [CA]; YEGANEH, Behzad
inventors: YEGANEH BEHZAD [CA]; YEGANEH, Behzad
abstract: A method of generating adult stem cells from somatic cells is provided. The method involves isolating somatic cells from a donor tissue and culturing the isolated cells in a tissue-specific growth medium. The cultured cells are subjected to proteolytic detachments once they reach a sufficient level of confluency. The cultured confluent somatic cells isolated from a donor tissue are treated with a combination of growth factors and/or chemical compounds. The cells are then reprogrammed by subjecting the cells to a suspension culture treatment without any substrate or beads to attach and arc forced to rely on cell-to-cell contact. This treatment leads to formation of aggregates comprising cells that display stem-cell like characteristics.

title: COMPOSITION FOR LOCAL ADIPOSE TISSUE ENLARGEMENT AND APPLICATION
assignee: WANG CHUNTIAN [CN]; WANG CHUNTIAN
inventors: WANG CHUNTIAN [CN]; WANG, CHUNTIAN
abstract: A composition for local adipose tissue enlargement and application is disclosed, which relates to the technical field of beauty and body care products, comprising 4-10 parts of Anemarrhena asphodeloides Bunge extract, 1-3 parts of vitamin B12, 1-2 parts of geranium essential oil and 1-3 parts of ceramide. Pure plant extract components are selected in the composition, supplemented with vitamin B and ceramide. The effective components can be absorbed by the skin of the breast and the buttocks by external application, rubbing and massage, so as to promote the accumulation of adipose cells, achieve the effect of breast augmentation and buttock augmentation, avoid side effects caused by surgery and injection, and ensure safety and no irritation. Meanwhile, due to the presence of the ceramide, the composition can also maintain the function and the morphology of fibroblasts, maintain or improve the differentiation ability, promote tissue regeneration, and facilitate wound healing.

title: LIVER TISSUE-LIKE ORGANOID AND METHOD OF MANUFACTURING THE SAME
assignee: KOREA RES INST BIOSCIENCE & BIOTECHNOLOGY [KR]; KOREA RESEARCH INSTITUTE OF BIOSCIENCE AND BIOTECHNOLOGY
inventors: SON MYUNG JIN [KR]; SHIN YONGBO [KR]; MUN SEONJU [KR] et al.
abstract: The present invention relates to a method for preparing a liver tissue-like organoid (LTO) from a stem cell-derived liver organoid, and relates to a method for preparing LTO which comprises culturing the liver organoid in medium M1 comprising human bFGF, human VEGF-A, human PDGF-AB, human BMP4, human M-CSF and CHIR99021, and the liver tissue-like organoid (LTO) prepared by the method. The liver tissue-like organoid (LTO) of the present invention contains liver tissue-like biliary and vascular structures, as well as various hepatic cell types, including hepatocytes, cholangiocytes, hepatic stellate cells, endothelial cells, and immune cells, all of which maintain their specific functions. Therefore, the liver tissue-like organoid (LTO) can be usefully utilized in liver disease modeling, evaluation of toxicity and efficacy of drugs, and potential in vivo therapeutic applications.

title: TISSUE STATE MEASURING APPARATUS
assignee: UNIV NAT TSING HUA [TW]; NATIONAL TSING HUA UNIVERSITY
inventors: WANG TING-WEI [TW]; WANG, TING-WEI
abstract: The tissue status measuring apparatus includes an electrode set and a control module coupled to the electrode set. The electrode set is configured to emit a first sensing electric field toward a dielectric area and to form a capacitive loop with the dielectric area. The control module includes a driving unit and a processing unit. The driving unit is configured to output a driving signal to the electrode set to output the first sensing electric field. The processing unit is configured to measure a loop capacitance value of the capacitive loop. In response to a tissue under test being located within the dielectric area, the loop capacitance value of the capacitive loop is a first measured capacitance value. In response to a difference between the first measured capacitance value and a baseline capacitance value being greater than an abnormality threshold, the processing unit determines that the tissue under test has an abnormal tissue location.

title: IMPROVED METHOD FOR GENERATING INNER EAR ORGANOIDS

assignee: FUNDACION PUBLICA GALEGA DE INVESTIG BIOMEDICA GALICIA SUR FPGIBGS [ES]; UNIV SANTIAGO COMPOSTELA [ES]; FUNDACION PUBLICA GALEGA INSTITUTO DE INVESTIG SANITARIA DE SANTIAGO DE COMPOSTELA FIDIS [ES] et al.

title: METHOD OF GENERATING LIVER ORGANOID MODEL AND MODEL RECAPITULATING NAFLD HALLMARKS
assignee: TRANSLATIONAL HEALTH SCIENCE AND TECH INSTITUTE [IN]; TRANSLATIONAL HEALTH SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY INSTITUTE
inventors: TANDON RUCHI [IN]; GOSWAMI YAMINI [IN]; BAGHEL AKASH [IN] et al.
abstract: The present disclosure provides a liver organoid model that recapitulates the hallmarks of non-alcoholic fatty liver disease (NAFLD), comprising both parenchymal and non-parenchymal liver cell types. The organoid is formed from primary hepatocytes isolated from healthy individuals, NAFLD patients, or a combination thereof, and expresses molecular markers of hepatocytes, cholangiocytes, stem cells, stellate cells, and Kupffer-like cells, displaying steatosis, inflammation, and fibrosis. The method for generating this model includes isolating primary hepatocytes, culturing them in defined initiation, expansion, and differentiation media, and performing functional characterization and passaging. The resulting organoid serves as a platform for developing in vitro models of steatohepatitis, high-throughput screening of candidate compounds, and gene expression and imaging analyses, with further validation in animal models. This approach enables physiologically relevant disease modeling and evaluation of therapeutic candidates for NAFLD and steatohepatitis.

Additionally, the recombinant expression systems disclosed herein can be used to treat retinal degenerative disorders.

inventors: COHEN ALEXANDER R [US]; GILKEY RYAN DAVIS [US]; Cohen, Alexander R. et al.
abstract: Devices, systems, and methods for separating tissue by moving a material layer with respect to a tissue-separating end effector. The material layer is moved over a contact surface of the tissue-separating end effector. Contact of the material and the contact surface with tissue, with the moving material moving with respect to the contacted tissue, causes separation of contacted tissue. The tissue-separating end effector may be considered a blunt tissue dissector.

assignee: INSTITUTIA PUBLICA UNIV TEHNICA A MOLDOVEI [MD]; ПУБЛИЧНОЕ УЧРЕЖДЕНИЕ ТЕХНИЧЕСКИЙ УНИВЕРСИТЕТ МОЛДОВЫ

abstract: The invention relates to biotechnology, namely to a process for cultivating theHaematococcus pluvialisgreen microalgae in order to obtain biomass with an increased content of astaxanthin.The process for cultivating theHaematococcus pluvialisCNMN-AV-07 microalgae strain comprises cultivation on a medium containing 0.3 g/L NaNO3; 0.08 g/L K2HPO4; 0.02 g/L KH2PO4; 0.02 g/L NaCl; 0.05 g/L CaCl2; 0.01 g/L MgSO4·7H2O; 0.0001 g/L ZnSO4·7H2O; 0.015 g/L MnSO4·5H2O; 0.00008 g/L CuSO4·5H2O; 0.0003 g/L H3BO3; 0.0003 g/L (NH4)6Mo7O24·4H2O; 0.0175 g/L FeCl3·6H2O; 0.0075 g/L EDTA and distilled water the rest, to which on the 5th day of cultivation are added 0.010-0.011 mM of 10 nm Ag nanoparticles stabilized in citrate, the cultivation is carried out at a temperature of 26-28°C, continuous illumination with an intensity of 28 µM photons/m2.s in the first 10 days and 150 µM photons/m2.s in the next 4 days.The technical result of the invention consists in increasing the astaxanthin content in the biomass ofHaematococcus pluvialismicroalgae.

Systems and methods can include a training program building component operable to build a training program using AI and/or LLMs from the uploaded training materials of various file types. title: METHOD AND SYSTEM FOR PREDICTING POST-OPERATIVE DELIRIUM BY MEANS OF TEMPORAL CLUSTERING OF EEG STATES

inventors: BONCOMPTE LEZAETA GONZALO NICOLÁS [CL]; PEDEMONTE TREWELA JUAN CRISTÓBAL [CL]; BONCOMPTE LEZAETA, Gonzalo Nicolás et al.

abstract: The present invention describes a method for monitoring and analysing electroencephalography (EEG) signals to predict the probability of the development of post-operative delirium (POD) in patients undergoing surgery. The method involves receiving a patient's EEG signals, calculating the spectral power in predefined time windows using canonical frequency bands (delta, theta, alpha and beta) and comparing the calculated spectral powers with the centroids of at least two, preferably four, predefined brain state clusters. These clusters include low broadband power (LBP), high broadband power (HBP), alpha prevalent (AP) and delta prevalent (DP). On the basis of the comparison, the brain state is classified and the fractional occupancy of the LBP state, i.e. the proportion of time that the patient spends in this state, is calculated. The method then predicts the probability of developing POD according to the time spent in the LBP state. The invention also includes a system, a computer program product and a computer-readable storage means for implementing the method.

title: Method of deformation-thermal processing of non-oriented electrical steels
assignee: USTAV MAT VYSKUMU SLOVENSKEJ AKADEMIE VIED VEREJNA VYSKUMNA INSTITUCIA [SK]; Ústav materiálového výskumu Slovenskej akadémie vied, verejná výskumná inštitúcia

matched_tags: Alternative proteins brewer spent grain valorization
abstract: The proposed technological processing procedure for non-oriented electrical steels is aimed at ensuring a homogeneous coarse-grained microstructure with an increased representation of cubic crystallographic orientation for a wide range of isotropic electrical steels in the "Fully-finish" state, finally processed in the form of electric motor segments. The originality of the presented approach is based on the use of deformation-induced movement of ferrite grain boundaries. A controlled degree of plastic deformation is implemented in a bending straightener before punching out electric motor segments. Subsequently, the punched segments are dynamically heated to a temperature at which deformation-induced growth of ferrite grains occurs. The driving force of the process is the gradient of deformation energy between neighboring grains. The boundary moves towards a higher intensity of deformation energy. The grain with a lower intensity grows at the expense of the grain with a higher intensity of deformation energy. In this way, deformation stresses are eliminated and the possibility of a fine-grained microstructure in the area of the cutting edges is eliminated compared to the conventional procedure, which has a positive effect on reducing the watt losses of the cut segments.

abstract: The invention provides a daily ration formula for improving fattening performance and meat quality of down producing goats and application of the daily ration formula, and belongs to the technical field of animal nutrition and feed. Corn straw and caragana microphylla are used for jointly replacing 40-60% of high-quality forage grass, 0.07-0.13% of artemisia ordosica crude polysaccharide is added, the average daily gain of the down producing goats is remarkably increased, the feed conversion ratio is reduced, meanwhile, the feed conversion rate is increased, and meanwhile the fattening performance and meat quality of the down producing goats are improved. The meat quality is improved, including reduction of muscle water loss rate and cooking loss, increase of meat color redness value and the like; besides, the formula also improves the digestibility of nutrient substances, especially the digestibility of crude protein, improves the rumen fermentation function, and improves the concentrations of rumen ammoniacal nitrogen and mycoprotein. The formula comprises the following components in percentage by weight: 35% of corn, 15% of cavings, 15% of brewer's grains, 8% of barley grass, 8% of carrots, 27% of protein worms, 1% of grass water ash, 4% of haws, 2% of eggshell powder, 3% of calcium bentonite, 1% of table salt, 10% of immediate milk and 500ml/100kg of beer. The brewer's grains, protein worms and the like are used for replacing soybean protein, so that the breeding cost is reduced; the feed conversion rate is increased through the hawthorn and the calcium bentonite, the meat quality is improved through oxidation resistance of the carrots, stress is reduced through the beer and the hawthorn, and the feed is suitable for large-scale breeding of live pigs.

abstract: The present invention, in embodiments, relates to a multivalent vaccine comprising a combination of two or more different monovalent Shigella oligosaccharide protein conjugates and an adjuvant. One of the vaccine components can be a Shigella sonnei oligosaccharide- protein conjugate and the other three can be Shigella flexneri oligosaccharide-protein conjugates, specifically, S. flexneri 2a, S. flexneri 3a and S. flexneri 6, respectively. All conjugates feature sOS components acting as surrogates of the heterogeneous Shigella surface polysaccharide antigens characteristic of each one of the selected Shigella serotypes. The multivalent vaccine of the present invention is made for the prevention and/or treatment of disease caused by Shigella, in particular S. sonnei and S. flexneri.

abstract: An apparatus, method, and computer program product are provided that process an input or data derivative therefrom to generate one or more attention outputs; and combine at least the input or data derivative therefrom and the one or more attention outputs to obtain an output. The apparatus, method, and computer program product also generate a multi-branch attention block comprising one or more attention branches configured to process the input or data derivative therefrom to generate the one or more attention outputs, and an attention usage block configured to combine at least the input or data derivative therefrom and the one or more attention outputs to generate the output, where the input or data derivative therefrom is input to the multi-branch attention block

title: METHOD OF CONTROLLING A VEHICLE BASED ON ESTIMATION OF POWER DISSIPATION FROM A TIRE, AND COMPUTER SYSTEM
assignee: VOLVO TRUCK CORP [SE]; Volvo Truck Corporation
inventors: ASKERDAL MIKAEL [SE]; BALIGA NIKHIL [SE]; AGARWAL ROHIT [SE] et al.
abstract: A method including controlling a vehicle using a first set of control parameters adapted for a first road friction, estimated at a first point in time; receiving indications of a first temperature of a tire a first time derivative of the temperature of the tire; estimating a first power dissipation measure for the tire; receiving indications of a second temperature of the tire and a second time derivative of the temperature of the tire; estimating a second power dissipation measure for the tire; detecting a change in the power dissipation resulting from a change in road surface conditions; and controlling, in response to the detected change, the vehicle using a second set of control parameters adapted for a second road friction different from the first road friction.

title: END-TO-END RANGE-BASED CONTROLLERS FOR NAVIGATING ENVIRONMENTS
assignee: UNIV KENTUCKY RES FOUND [US]; University of Kentucky Research Foundation
inventors: POONAWALA HASAN ALIHUSAIN [US]; Poonawala, Hasan Alihusain
abstract: [0000]    Embodiments include a system for navigating an environment. In some embodiments, the system includes a robot, a sensor, and a computing device. The computing device may cause the system to receive a local map of the environment, define a desired path of the robot in the environment, and predict sensor readings of the sensor at a location on the local map and a location off the path using the local map. In some embodiments, the computing device causes the system to predict a spatial derivative of a parameterized controller at a location on the path, predict controller output values at a location on the desired path using the sensor readings, and compute controller parameter values such that that the spatial derivative and the controller output values are closer to satisfying a predetermined mathematical condition. Some embodiments evaluate whether the predetermined mathematical condition is satisfied.

title: PREDICTING IMMUNOGENIC T CELL EPITOPES IN PATHOGENS USING ANTIGEN AND PEPTIDE FEATURES
assignee: LA JOLLA INST FOR IMMUNOLOGY [US]; LA JOLLA INSTITUTE FOR IMMUNOLOGY
inventors: PETERS BJOERN [US]; ARLEHAMN CECILIA [US]; PETERS, Bjoern et al.
abstract: Provided herein are methods for identifying immunogenic peptides analyzing binding affinities of a set of possible immunogenic peptide epitopes by selecting sequence data from a template antigen-binding molecule from a set of possible template antigen binding molecules; using two or more machine learning algorithms to train a model and combining into an ensemble model; and generating sequence data of one or more immunogenic peptide epitope molecules. Also provided are methods of using and compositions, including epitope megapools, and methods for detecting the presence of: a Streptococcus sp., from any one of those sequences set forth in SEQ ID NOS: 1-10), or a subsequence, portion, homologue, variant or derivative thereof; a fusion protein; a pool of 2 or more peptides; or a polynucleotide that encodes one or more peptides or proteins, or a subsequence, portion, homologue, variant or derivative thereof; vaccines, diagnostics, therapies, and kits, comprising such proteins or peptides.

More particularly, the present disclosure provides a method of treating or preventing cancer by administering a therapeutically effective amount of a compound of Formula (I) or (II) to a subject in need thereof. More particularly, the present disclosure provides a compound of Formula (I) or (II) or a composition thereof for treatment of breast cancer by inhibiting the growth and/or viability of breast cancer cells.

assignee: MITSUBISHI MAT ELECTRONIC CHEMICALS CO LTD [JP]; 三菱マテリアル電子化成株式会社

X is selected from the group consisting of –F, –O–M+, –N–HM+, and –N–M+SO2Rf3. Y is selected from the group consisting of –SO2F, –SO3 −M+, –SO2N–HM+, –SO2N–M+SO2Rf3, and –I. Rf3 is –CnF2n+1 (n = 1-4). M is selected from the group consisting of hydrogen, alkali metal ions, alkaline earth metal ions, and onium ions).

title: METHOD FOR SYNTHESIZING NOVEL NANOSTRUCTURE
assignee: UNIV KYOTO [JP]; 国立大学法人京都大学
inventors: FUJITA DAISHI [JP]; FUJIKAWA TAKAO [JP]; MATSUDA FUYUKI [JP] et al.
abstract: The present disclosure provides: a three-dimensional molecule having a specific three-dimensional shape; and a method for producing the same. In one aspect, the present disclosure provides a three-dimensional molecule having a polyhedral shape. The polyhedron may be a bipartite biregular polyhedron which satisfies (p, q) biregularity, or a vertex-deficient form thereof or a barrel-type vertex-deficient form derivative (where p and q are each independently selected from integers of 2 to 6). A three-dimensional molecule according to the present disclosure can have a closed three-dimensional structure, unlike a metal organic framework (MOF) in which the number of appearances of a repeating structure is not limited.

title: STATION PRIVATIVE DE PRODUCTION D’HYDROGÈNE GAZEUX PRESSURISÉ
assignee: DB IND SA [FR]; DB INDUSTRIES SA
inventors: HILBERT JEAN-MARIE [FR]; BARRE DANIEL [FR]; HILBERT, JEAN-MARIE et al.
abstract: Le dispositif dénommé Station Privative de Production d’Hydrogène gazeux pressurisé, dénommé SPP-H2GP, déclinée par une gamme de stations à usage privé dont le rôle sera de produire et stocker une masse gazeuse d’hydrogène requise comme carburant gazeux pour les véhicules neufs ou récents disposant d’un moteur thermique. Ces véhicules seront équipés d’un kit d’injection et de stockage d’hydrogène gazeux pressurisé et disposeront ainsi d’une autonomie identique ou supérieure d’environ 25% aux véhicules à motorisation thermique utilisant des carburants minéraux.  La performance énergétique de l’injection d’hydrogène gazeux sous haute pression est environ 2,8 fois plus importante que celle d’un carburant minéral, sachant que cette technologie ne rejette que de la vapeur d’eau, ainsi, un réservoir contenant une masse comprise entre 15 à 20 kg d’hydrogène gazeux pressurisé, stocké à 84 MPa et injecté à pression constante de 70 MPa, permettra à un véhicule de moyenne catégorie une autonomie minimale de plus de mille kilomètres pour un stockage de15 kg et environ mille trois cent kilomètres pour un stockage de15 kg, tout en ne rejetant aucun élément polluant .

title: PRODUCTION/TRANSPORTATION PLAN CREATION APPARATUS AND PRODUCTION/TRANSPORTATION PLAN CREATION METHOD
assignee: HITACHI LTD [JP]; 株式会社日立製作所
inventors: TSUJIBE AKIHISA [JP]; OHYA KENJI [JP]; KUNO SHUNICHIRO [JP] et al.
abstract: The purpose of the present invention is to make a production plan in consideration of transportation efficiency and transportation capacity constraints. This production/transportation plan creation apparatus comprises a transportation plan generation unit and a production plan generation unit. The transportation plan generation unit: creates a shipping candidate date of each order; creates transportation draft plans in each of which orders having the same shipping candidate date on the same route are bundled; calculates a vehicle type and the number of vehicles for each of the transportation draft plans; excludes a transportation draft plan for which a vehicle cannot be arranged; and calculates a transportation cost for a transportation plan for which a vehicle can be arranged. The production plan generation unit: creates production completion time limit information for each draft from the transportation draft plans; makes a production plan that is in time for the production completion time limit information of each of the drafts; and calculates a production/stock cost.

title: BIOMASS SOLID FUEL PRODUCTION SYSTEM
assignee: MITSUBISHI UBE CEMENT CORP [JP]; ＵＢＥ三菱セメント株式会社
inventors: HIRAIWA YUUSUKE [JP]; NAKAMURA TOSHIAKI [JP]; 平岩　友祐 et al.
abstract: The present disclosure describes a biomass fuel production system with which it is possible to suppress the cost of producing biomass solid fuel.　This biomass solid fuel production system comprises first fuel production equipment configured to produce a first biomass solid fuel, and second fuel production equipment configured to produce a second biomass solid fuel. The first fuel production equipment includes: a first heating device configured to heat a first biomass raw material to generate the first biomass solid fuel; a first combustion furnace configured to combust a first pyrolysis gas generated by heating the first biomass raw material in the first heating device to generate a first combustion gas; and a first flow path configured to introduce a first low-temperature combustion gas that, of the first combustion gas, is discharged from the first heating device after heating of the first biomass raw material into the second fuel production equipment in order for the first low-temperature combustion gas to be used in production of the second biomass solid fuel.

title: PRODUCTION OF RECOMBINANT ASCORBATE OXIDASE
assignee: TOYO BOSEKI [JP]; NATIONAL RES INSTITUTE OF BREWING [JP]; 東洋紡株式会社 et al.

abstract: [Problem] To provide a cellulose fiber composition production method and a cellulose fiber-blended resin composition production method, with which it becomes possible to improve both elastic modulus and impact strength of a molded product of a cellulose fiber-blended resin composition. [Solution] A method for producing a cellulose fiber composition using, as starting materials, 100 parts by mass of cellulose fibers (A), 5-30 parts by mass of a hydrophobic compound (B) that is any one of a (meth)acrylic resin, a styrene-(meth)acrylic resin, and a polyolefin resin each having at least one structure selected from among an epoxy group, a carboxyl group, a carbamoyl group, a carboxylic anhydride, and a carboxylic acid salt in the molecule thereof, and 1-10 parts by mass of an alkaline inorganic compound (C), the method being characterized by including a step in which the total solid content concentration of a mixture containing the components (A), (B), and (C) is adjusted to 25-85%, and the mixture is sheared at a shear rate of 1,500 s-1 or more.

The present invention also relates to a 3D printing process with additive manufacturing for the production of the manufactured article.

title: FORGED MEMBER PRODUCTION METHOD
assignee: JAPAN STEEL WORKS LTD [JP]; JAPAN STEEL WORKS M&E INC [JP]; 株式会社日本製鋼所 et al.
inventors: YANAGIYA TAKEHIKO [JP]; OHSAKI SATORU [JP]; YOSHIDA MASATO [JP] et al.
abstract: A forged member production method according to one embodiment of the present invention comprises: a step in which the temperature of a workpiece, in which the γ'-phase has been dissolved in solid solution by maintaining a temperature T1 that is higher than a γ'-solid solution temperature Ts, is reduced from the temperature T1 to a temperature T2, which is 0-100°C lower than the γ' solid solution temperature Ts, and the γ'-phase is precipitated by maintaining the temperature T2 for a prescribed time; a step in which the workpiece, in which the γ'-phase has been precipitated, is cooled at a cooling rate of 100°C/h or less from the temperature T2 to a temperature T3, which is 800°C or less, and the precipitated γ'-phase is coarsened; a step in which the workpiece, in which the γ'-phase has been coarsened, is forged by being heated to a temperature T4, which is 0-100°C lower than the γ' solid solution temperature Ts, and strain is induced; and a step in which the workpiece, in which strain has been induced, undergoes static recrystallization by maintaining a temperature T5, which is higher than the γ' solid solution temperature Ts, for a prescribed time.

assignee: CONTITECH DEUTSCHLAND GMBH [DE]; CONTITECH DEUTSCHLAND GMBH

title: COMPOSITE FERTILIZER CONTAINING LIGNITE-CARBOHYDRATE-UREA, PROCESS FOR ITS PRODUCTION AND AGRICULTURAL APPLICATION THEREOF
assignee: MISKOLCI EGYETEM [HU]; MISKOLCI EGYETEM
inventors: DR VISKOLCZ BÉLA [HU]; HATVANI-NAGY ALPÁR FERENCZ [HU]; RAGULSZKI GÁBOR [HU] et al.
abstract: The present invention relates to a slow-release composite fertilizer containing lignite- carbohydrate-urea and a process for its production. The invention is based on the phenomenon that different sugar molecules are able to create deep eutectic with urea. According to the invention, they mix the liquid eutectic with lignite, whose porous structure enables the eutectic to flow into the pores, and to set by smart sorption. Thereby urea is gradually released in the soil, avoiding the ion shock of plants and preventing the leaching and decomposition due to rain.

title: SONG SCREENING METHOD, SONG PRODUCTION METHOD, SONG SCREENING APPARATUS, AND ELECTRONIC DEVICE
assignee: DOUYIN VISION CO LTD [CN]; 抖音视界有限公司
inventors: JIN SHIXING [CN]; WANG JIAYANG [CN]; 金师兴 et al.
abstract: The present disclosure pertains to the technical field of computers, and relates to a song screening method, a song production method, a song screening apparatus, and an electronic device. The song screening method comprises: acquiring features of a song screening target, the features of the song screening target comprising a target music feature and a target lyric feature; using a first machine learning model to determine a first matching degree between a music feature of a candidate song and the target music feature; using a second machine learning model to determine a second matching degree between a lyric feature of the candidate song and the target lyric feature; selecting, from among candidate songs, a song matching the target features according to the first matching degree and the second matching degree; and determining a target song according to the selected song.

inventors: IMOTO ITSUKI [JP]; KUMAGAI KEITA [JP]; AKIYAMA SATOSHI [JP] et al.
abstract: Provided is a method that makes it possible to produce a modified aluminosilicate more efficiently than conventional methods.　This method for producing a modified aluminosilicate comprises: a first step for obtaining an aluminosilicate (A-1) by bringing a gel-like or sol-like silica, zeolite, and an ammonium salt represented by formula (1) into contact with each other; a second step for treating the aluminosilicate (A-1) obtained in the first step with an acid; and a third step for bringing the product obtained in the second step into contact with a compound including at least one element selected from the group consisting of group-4 elements and group-5 elements in the periodic table, and then drying and sintering the same. (In formula (1), C represents a carbon atom, N+ represents a nitrogen cation, X- represents a halogen anion or a hydroxy anion, R and R1 each independently represent a hydrogen atom or a hydrocarbon group optionally having a heteroatom, m1 and m2 each independently represent an integer of 0-5, n1 and n2 each independently represent an integer of 0-5, the sum of n1 and n2 is 1-10, and R and R1 which are present in a quantity of more than one can bind to each other to form a ring structure.)

title: ION SENSOR MEMBER USING CARBON NANOTUBE COMPOSITE MATERIAL HAVING BOUND THERETO METAL-ORGANIC FRAMEWORK MODIFIED WITH ORGANIC MOLECULES, ION SENSOR, AND METHOD FOR MANUFACTURING ION SENSOR
assignee: IUCF HYU [KR]; 한양대학교 산학협력단
inventors: CHOI SEON-JIN [KR]; KIM YEON-JOO [KR]; LEE DONGHEE [KR] et al.
abstract: Disclosed are an ion sensor member using a carbon nanotube composite material to which a metal-organic framework modified with organic molecules is bound, an ion sensor, and a method for manufacturing an ion sensor. An ion sensor member according to an embodiment may include a composite material in which a metal-organic framework is uniformly bound to the surface of carbon nanotubes. In this case, the metal-organic framework may be modified by functionalizing an organic molecule including at least one unshared electron pair.

title: MATERIAUX ET ARTICLES PREPARES A PARTIR DE POLYSACCHARIDES
assignee: LES NOW PAILLES [FR]; LES NOUVELLES PAILLES
inventors: TEILHOL JEAN-PHILIPPE [FR]; BESNIER JEAN-BAPTISTE DOMINIQUE [FR]; LEBLANC NATHALIE MAGALI [FR] et al.
abstract: Matériau pour la fabrication d’articles compostables, comprenant les composants suivants dans les proportions : 65-95% de source de polysaccharide comprenant au moins 80% d’amidon ;5-35% d’au moins deux polyols ; 0-10 % d’au moins deux additifs ; q.s.p eau ; les pourcentages étant des pourcentages massiques exprimés par rapport à la masse totale du matériau.  Figure 1.

title: A POLYMER, A COMPOSITION COMPRISING THE SAME, THE USE THEREOF, AND A METHOD FOR PREPARING THEREOF
assignee: ELC MAN LLC [US]; ESTEE LAUDER COMPANIES INNOVATION R & D CHINA CO LTD [CN]; ELC MANAGEMENT LLC et al.
inventors: YAO JIZONG [CN]; DENG BINWEI [CN]; CAO FENG [CN] et al.
abstract: The present invention relates to a polymer, a composition comprising the same, the use of the polymer or the composition for personal care products, and a method for preparing the polymer or the composition. The polymer has the structure of the following formula I, wherein R1, R2, R3, R4, R5, and Z are as defined herein, and n has a value such that the polymer has a number average molecular weight Mn from 20, 000 to 50, 000, and the atomic content of element Se in the polymer is from 0.10 at% to 10.00 at%, based on the total amount of atoms other than hydrogen in the polymer. The inventors have found that the modified polysaccharide polymers (e.g., hyaluronic acid) with the structure described above have significantly improved anti-oxidation capability in addition to properties of the polysaccharide polymers themselves (e.g., moisturizing property). Moreover, by combining it with another polymer of the same or similar structure but of different molecular weight, the two will produce a synergistic effect in terms of anti-oxidation.

title: COMPOSITION COMPRENANT UN MÉLANGE DE POLYMÈRES ET UN POLYOL
assignee: OREAL [FR]; L'OREAL
inventors: KASAI TAKEHIKO [JP]; MITSUDA SHINOBU [JP]; IKEDA YUICHI [JP] et al.
abstract: COMPOSITION COMPRENANT UN MÉLANGE DE POLYMÈRES ET UN POLYOL La présente invention concerne une composition comprenant : (a) au moins un polymère cationique ; (b) au moins un acide gras ; (c) au moins un polysaccharide non ionique non cellulosique qui est différent du (a) polymère cationique ; (d) au moins une huile ; (e) au moins un polyol ; et (f) au moins un tensioactif facultatif, la quantité du(des) (f) tensioactif(s) facultatif(s) dans la composition étant inférieure à 1 % en poids, de préférence inférieure à 0,5 % en poids, et plus préférentiellement inférieure à 0,1 % en poids, par rapport au poids total de la composition. La composition selon la présente invention est stable et capable de former un film qui présente une résistance améliorée au frottement.  Figure pour l'abrégé : néant

title: WASHING AND FOAMING COMPOSITION FOR KERATIN FIBRES COMPRISING AT LEAST ONE GLUCAMIDE, A PARTICULAR MIXTURE OF SURFACTANTS AND AT LEAST ONE CATIONIC POLYSACCHARIDE
assignee: OREAL [FR]; L'OREAL
inventors: GOYENVALLE JULIEN [FR]; ROCHARD MARJORIE [FR]; MARLIAC MARIE-ADELINE [FR] et al.
abstract: The present invention relates to a cosmetic composition, notably a hair composition, in particular a foaming composition for washing keratin materials comprising several anionic surfactants, at least one glucamide compound, at least one amphoteric or zwitterionic surfactant and at least one cationic polysaccharide. The invention also relates to the process for the cosmetic treatment of keratin materials, in particular keratin fibres, comprising the application of the composition according to the invention to said keratin materials.

title: HYBRID POLYMER COMPRISING A POLYSACCHARIDE POLYMER AND PEPTIDE CHAINS
assignee: CLARIANT PRODUKTE DEUTSCHLAND GMBH [DE]; MAX PLANCK GESELLSCHAFT [DE]; CLARIANT PRODUKTE (DEUTSCHLAND) GMBH et al.
inventors: GACANIN JASMINA [DE]; SYNATSCHKE CHRISTOPHER [DE]; WEIL TANJA [DE] et al.
abstract: The present invention relates to a hybrid polymer comprising a polysaccharide polymer and certain peptide chains, to blends, hydrogels and formulations comprising the hybrid polymer, and to the use of the hybrid polymer as a rheology modifying agent.

title: PRODUCTION METHOD FOR DEGRADING COCOA SHELL INTO POLYSACCHARIDE FOR GRAFTING ONTO POLYMER AND YARN THEREOF
assignee: CHANG SI RONG [TW]; CHANG Si-Rong
inventors: CHANG SI-RONG [TW]; CHANG, Si-Rong
abstract: [0000]    A production method for degrading cocoa shell into polysaccharide for grafting onto polymer includes: preparing anaerobic thermophilic lignin-decomposing bacteria and cocoa shell powder; adding the cocoa shell powder into a decomposing bacteria culture solution with anaerobic thermophilic lignin-decomposing bacteria to obtain a cocoa shell degradation aqueous solution; obtaining a degraded saccharide liquid from the cocoa shell degradation aqueous solution to undergo high temperature melting with sorbitol and citric acid so as to polymerize into a polysaccharide powder; then placing the polysaccharide powder, N-isopropylacrylamide (NIPAAm), and an initiator into a reaction vessel filled with ethanol to obtain a polysaccharide-grafted N-isopropylacrylamide (NIPAAm) powder; and finally, performing a blending process with a polymer to complete covalent bonding of the polysaccharide-grafted N-isopropylacrylamide (NIPAAm) powder and the polymer. In addition, a plastic masterbatch can then be made for drawing into yarns and weaving into fabrics.

title: INJECTABLE BIOMATERIAL FOR MULTI-FUNCTIONAL PEPTIDE AND SMALL MOLECULE DRUG DELIVERY
assignee: CONDUCTINK LLC [US]; CONDUCTINK, LLC
inventors: PAONE LOUIS SALVATORE [US]; GALIE PETER ADAM [US]; PAONE, Louis Salvatore et al.
abstract: An injectable carrier composition for drug delivery includes an amphiphilic tri-block copolymer surfactant in an amount from 10-25 wt.%; a non-sulfonated polysaccharide with at least 20% of subunit groups functionalized by 5-Norbornene 2-methylamine, present in an amount from 0.1-1.0 wt.%; a small molecule protein inhibitor in an amount from 0.1-1.0 wt.% or a large molecule antibody, present in an amount from 0.01-0.1 wt.%; and a peptide having a sequence containing either an amino or carboxy terminus GCG motifs, the peptide present in an amount from 0.1 to 1.0 wt.%. At room temperature, the carrier composition comprises a polymer network in solution, and upon injection to a subject having a temperature from 34-40°C, the polymer network of the carrier composition is configured to change to a hydrogel. Methods of making and methods of use are provided.

title: Uses of Dendrobium polysaccharides and vancomycin-sensitive bacteria, and compositions containing the same
assignee: HONG KONG AUTHENTICATION CENTRE OF VALUABLE CHINESE MEDICINES [CN]; Hong Kong Authentication Centre of Valuable Chinese Medicines
inventors: HAN QUANBIN [CN]; HUO CHUYING [CN]; LI LIFENG [CN] et al.
abstract: Disclosed are beneficial uses of Dendrobium polysaccharides, and compositions comprising them and vancomycin-sensitive bacteria for intestinal disorders. The present disclosure relates to a method of treating an intestinal disorders, such as an inflammatory bowel disease, comprising administering Dendrobium polysaccharide to an individual in need thereof. The present disclosure also relates to a method of treating an intestinal disease comprising administering vancomycin-sensitive bacteria to an individual in need thereof, wherein said individual has taken or is about to take Dendrobium polysaccharide.

title: PROCEDE DE DETECTION D’UN TYPE DE PILE OU D’ACCUMULATEUR
assignee: DELTA DORE [FR]; DELTA DORE
inventors: CHABANNES ANDRÉ [FR]; LAMBERT DAVID [FR]; CHABANNES, André et al.
abstract: La présente invention concerne un procédé et un dispositif de détermination du type de pile ou d’accumulateur utilisé dans un dispositif. Selon l’invention :  - on mesure (E400, E404) la tension délivrée par la pile ou de l’accumulateur lorsque la pile ou l’accumulateur délivre un courant inférieur à une première valeur prédéterminée, et un courant supérieur à la première valeur prédéterminée,  - on calcule (E405) une résistance équivalente série de la pile ou de l’accumulateur à partir des deux mesures et du courant au moins supérieur à la seconde valeur prédéterminée,  - on détermine (E407, E408) que le type de pile ou d’accumulateur est du premier type en fonction des tensions et de la résistance équivalente série.  Figure à publier avec l’abrégé : Fig. 4

title: COMPOSITION FOR ALLEVIATING STRESS COMPRISING GABA AND CISTUS INCANUS EXTRACT AS ACTIVE INGREDIENTS
assignee: MILAEBIORESOURCE CO LTD [KR]; 주식회사 미래생명자원
inventors: KIM SEONG JIN [KR]; YOU SUN HWA [KR]; LEE SEUNG SU [KR] et al.
abstract: The present invention relates to a composition for alleviating stress, the composition comprising GABA and a Cistus incanus extract as active ingredients. In particular, the present invention relates to enhancing the efficacy of GABA by using a Cistus incanus extract.

title: INSULATION RESISTANCE MEASUREMENT DEVICE
assignee: NUVOTON TECHNOLOGY CORP JAPAN [JP]; ヌヴォトンテクノロジージャパン株式会社
inventors: KATASE GINGA [JP]; MIHASHI TETSUYA [JP]; RYU TAKASHI [JP] et al.
abstract: An insulation resistance measurement device (20) comprising: a first series circuit that is connected between the negative electrode of a battery (1) and the ground, and that has a first resistor (21), a capacitor (22), and a first switch (23) connected in series; a second switch (25) that discharges the capacitor (22); a current detection circuit (24) that detects a current flowing through the first series circuit and outputs a current detection signal; and a control circuit (26) that controls the first switch (23) and the second switch (25), wherein the control circuit (26) calculates the resistance values of insulation resistances (101 and 102) on the basis of the current detection signal obtained when the first switch (23) is on and the second switch (25) is off.

title: COMPOSITIONS AND METHODS TO INCREASE RESISTANCE TO PHYTOPHTHORA ROOT ROT
assignee: PIONEER HI BRED INT [US]; PIONEER HI-BRED INTERNATIONAL, INC.
inventors: ABBITT SHANE E [US]; CRAMER ANNALIESE ROSE [US]; LI BAILIN [US] et al.
abstract: The present disclosure provides compositions and methods for producing plants having resistance to diseases caused by Phytophthora such as, for example, Phytophthora root rot (PRR). The methods involve expressing in plants a heterologous nucleic acid associated with increased resistance to Phytophthora. Additionally, compositions and methods useful in producing, identifying and/or selecting plants and plant materials comprising the heterologous nucleic acid associated with increased resistance to Phytophthora are provided.

title: ELECTROLYTE BLENDS FOR LOWERING RESISTANCE AND ENHANCING CYCLE LIFE
assignee: UNIFRAX I LLC [US]; UNIFRAX I LLC
inventors: PEEBLES CAMERON [US]; PEEBLES, Cameron
abstract: Electrolyte blends for lowering resistance and enhancing charge-discharge cycle life in lithium-ion batteries (LiB) containing silicon include a lithium additive in a solvent. The solvent may include diethyl carbonate (DEC) and/or lithium difluorooxalatoborate (LiDFOB).

title: TRANSGENIC PLANTS HAVING INCREASED RESISTANCE TO FUNGAL DISEASES AND METHODS OF PRODUCING SAME
assignee: MONSANTO TECHNOLOGY LLC [US]; MONSANTO TECHNOLOGY LLC
inventors: CLINTON WILLIAM [US]; LEVI NOAM [US]; MERRILL KEITH [US] et al.
abstract: The present disclosure provides compositions and methods for making transgenic plants expressing a resistant Lr34 protein that exhibit increased resistance to fungal diseases, and transgenic plants produced by these methods, and plant parts thereof. The present disclosure provides transgenic plants, and plant parts thereof, that are resistant or immune, or have reduced susceptibility, to Asian Soybean Rust (ASR) and other fungal pathogens, while demonstrating minimized or reduced undesirable off-types. The present disclosure provides effective transgenic expression of Lr34 in soybean varieties to reduce the need for one or more fungicide applications, and/or protecting against fungal pathogens developing resistance to both the chemical control agents and other native or engineered disease resistance genes.

title: CASE HARDENED STEEL HAVING EXCELLENT CRACKING RESISTANCE
assignee: SANYO SPECIAL STEEL CO LTD [JP]; 山陽特殊製鋼株式会社
inventors: KURITA SHUN [JP]; MITANI AKIO [JP]; 栗田　俊 et al.
abstract: The purpose of the present invention is to provide a case hardened steel with which it is possible to obtain a steel material that has excellent cold workability, particularly excellent cracking resistance, while ensuring hardenability. The present invention provides a case hardened steel which contains, in mass%, 0.15% to 0.30% inclusive of C, 0.05% to 1.00% inclusive of Si, not less than 0.10% but less than 0.50% of Mn, 1.3% to 2.5% inclusive of Cr, 0% to 0.5% inclusive of Ni, 0% to 0.5% inclusive of Mo, 0% to 0.050% inclusive of Al, 0% to 0.20% inclusive of Ti, 0% to 0.10% inclusive of Nb, 0% to 0.0050% inclusive of B, and 0% to 0.0300% inclusive of N, with the balance being made up of Fe and unavoidable impurities, wherein: P and S in the unavoidable impurities are 0.030% or less and 0.025% or less, respectively; and the score of a ferrite band in the structure of a cross-sectional surface that is parallel to the hot rolling direction is 1-3.

title: METHOD FOR PRODUCING VASCULAR ENDOTHELIAL CELLS DERIVED FROM PLURIPOTENT STEM CELLS
assignee: RIKEN [JP]; 国立研究開発法人理化学研究所
inventors: MASUMOTO HIDETOSHI [JP]; ABULAITI MOSHA [JP]; 升本　英利 et al.
abstract: This method for producing vascular endothelial cells derived from pluripotent stem cells comprises: a preparation step for preparing vascular endothelial progenitor cells derived from pluripotent stem cells; and a stress application step for applying a fluid shear stress to the vascular endothelial progenitor cells.

title: AUTOMATED SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR GENERATING SIMILARITY METRICS IN MULTIMODAL DATA STREAMS
assignee: MIRRIM LLC [US]; Mirrim LLC
inventors: GALANIS JENNIFER [US]; Galanis, Jennifer
abstract: A system and method of quantifying and evaluating interpersonal communications. Audio and physical gestures/movement output of subjects of an interaction are analyzed to determine the quality of the interaction. Features of the interaction may be classified and compared to predefined signals, and similarity metrics in behavior between different subjects are measured to assess level of rapport. A rapport rating is generated based on the degree of correlation and confirmed by measuring stress levels of each subject.

title: Soybean Cultivar P351365
assignee: CONFLUENCE GENETICS LLC [US]; Confluence Genetics, LLC
inventors: DUNCAN LOGAN M [US]; KOHLHASE DANIEL R [US]; Duncan, Logan M. et al.
abstract: [0000]    A soybean cultivar designated P351365 is disclosed. Embodiments include the seeds of soybean P351365, the plants of soybean P351365, to plant parts of soybean P351365, and methods for producing a soybean plant produced by crossing soybean P351365 with itself or with another soybean variety. Embodiments include methods for producing a soybean plant containing in its genetic material one or more genes or transgenes and the transgenic soybean plants and plant parts produced by those methods. Embodiments also relate to soybean cultivars, breeding cultivars, plant parts, and cells derived from soybean P351365, methods for producing other soybean cultivars, lines or plant parts derived from soybean P351365, and the soybean plants, varieties, and their parts derived from use of those methods. Embodiments further include hybrid soybean seeds, plants, and plant parts produced by crossing P351365 with another soybean cultivar.

title: SECURITY DEVICE WITH ENHANCED TAMPER RESISTANCE
assignee: MCGREW JAMES THOMAS WALTER [US]; MCGREW, James Thomas Walter
inventors: MCGREW JAMES THOMAS WALTER [US]; MCGREW, James Thomas Walter
abstract: An assembly for use in a locking mechanism is disclosed. The assembly includes a first component having a pin head portion and an elongate shaft portion extending therefrom, and a second component configured to receive at least a portion of the elongate shaft portion. The second component cooperates with the first component to resist unauthorized manipulation or rotation of a lock core during attempted picking or bypass techniques, while permitting authorized operation by an associated key.

title: METHOD FOR REDUCING STRESS OF LARGE-SIZED SILICON CARBIDE CRYSTAL
assignee: NINGBO HIPER TECH CO LTD [CN]; 宁波恒普技术股份有限公司
inventors: LIU PENG [CN]; ZHOU RONGGUO [CN]; ZOU LU [CN] et al.
abstract: The present invention relates to the technical field of silicon carbide crystal growth. Disclosed is a method for reducing the stress of a large-sized silicon carbide crystal. The method comprises: providing in a growth device a thermal insulation mechanism for reducing the thermal distribution in a crystal; suspending a seed crystal in the growth device, wherein the thermal insulation mechanism located between the seed crystal and a raw material is provided with a channel for the transmission of a raw material vapor flow; and growing the seed crystal, wherein the seed crystal can move freely laterally during the initial growth stage. The method for reducing the stress of a large-sized silicon carbide crystal provided in the present invention can reduce the stress of the crystal during initial growth.

title: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR REDUCTION OF WELDING RESIDUAL STRESS
assignee: POSCO CO LTD [KR]; 주식회사 포스코
inventors: LEE JAE-YIK [KR]; 이재익
abstract: One aspect of the present invention is to provide an apparatus and a method capable of effectively reducing welding residual stress without going through multiple post-welding processing steps after a weld is formed.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR ACQUIRING INTERNAL STRESS AND STRAIN OF STRUCTURE, OPTICAL SYSTEM, AND COMPUTER-READABLE MEDIUM
assignee: UNIV CHINA MINING [CN]; 中国矿业大学（北京）
inventors: JU YANG [CN]; FEI YU [CN]; REN ZHANGYU [CN] et al.
abstract: Embodiments of the present application provide a method and apparatus for acquiring the internal stress and strain of a structure, an optical system, and a computer-readable medium. The method comprises: pre-constructing a three-dimensional model carrying speckles, the speckles being made of a semi-transparent material, and the region of the three-dimensional model where there are no speckles being made of a transparent material; using a pre-configured optical system to obtain a pre-deformation speckle image, a post-deformation speckle image, and fringe images; performing calculation on the basis of the fringe images to obtain an internal stress field of the three-dimensional model; and performing an integer-pixel search on the pre-deformation speckle image and the post-deformation speckle image to obtain an initial value of a shape function, solving for a sub-pixel displacement on the basis of using an N-order shape function in a stress concentration region and using an M-order shape function in a stress plateau, and calculating the internal strain of the three-dimensional model on the basis of the sub-pixel displacement. That is, stress and strain can be calculated on the basis of speckle images and stress fringe images obtained in a same experiment, and the stress can be used to assist in the calculation of the strain, thereby further improving strain measurement accuracy.

title: FORCE SENSING APPARATUS WITH STRESS-CONCENTRATION SECTIONS FOR SENSING FORCES ASSOCIATED WITH A VEHICLE BRAKING SYSTEM
assignee: HONEYWELL INT INC [US]; HONEYWELL INTERNATIONAL INC.
inventors: RAO JIE [US]; GAO JUN [US]; TIAN RUYUAN [US] et al.
abstract: [0000]    Various embodiments described herein relate to providing a force sensing apparatus with stress-concentration sections for sensing forces associated with a vehicle braking system. In this regard, a force sensing apparatus includes a metal elastomer element, a set of sensing elements, and a circuit board element. The metal elastomer element includes a set of stress-concentration sections formed on a surface of the metal elastomer element. The set of sensing elements are disposed on the set of stress-concentration sections. The circuit board element includes a shape associated with the surface of the metal elastomer element. The set of sensing elements are configured to detect a brake force based on one or more deformations associated with the set of stress-concentration sections formed on the surface of the metal elastomer element. The set of sensing elements are further configured to transform the brake force into one or more electrical signals.

title: PROGRAM REFRESH FOR NON-VOLATILE MEMORY CELLS
assignee: SILICON STORAGE TECH INC [US]; Silicon Storage Technology, Inc.
inventors: SURICO STEFANO [IT]; BARTOLI SIMONE [IT]; SIVERO STEFANO [IT] et al.
abstract: A programming method for a semiconductor device that includes programming a first memory cell to a first program state that is associated with a first program verify voltage and a first reference voltage such that the first memory cell has a first threshold voltage that meets or exceeds the first program verify voltage. The first program verify voltage is greater than the first reference voltage. A first read operation is performed which determines the first threshold voltage of the first memory cell has drifted down to between the first program verify voltage and the first reference voltage. In response to this determination, the first memory cell is programmed to increase the first threshold voltage of the first memory cell to meet or exceed the first program verify voltage.

title: NON-TRANSITORY COMPUTER-READABLE RECORDING MEDIUM STORING SUPPORT APPLICATION PROGRAM FOR TERMINAL DEVICE, AND METHOD FOR CONTROLLING TERMINAL DEVICE ACCORDING TO SUPPORT APPLICATION PROGRAM
assignee: BROTHER IND LTD [JP]; BROTHER KOGYO KABUSHIKI KAISHA
inventors: EGUCHI AIRI [JP]; EGUCHI, Airi
abstract: [0000]    A terminal device may, according to a support application program, in a case where a first instruction corresponding to a printing-related operation related to printing is acquired from the OS program and an end user license agreement related to the computer program has not been agreed, display, on a display of the terminal device, an end user license agreement screen. In a case where the first instruction is acquired from the OS program and the end user license agreement has been agreed, the end user license agreement screen may not be displayed. In a case where an operation of not agreeing to the end user license agreement is received on the end user license agreement screen displayed in response to the first instruction being acquired from the OS program, execution of a process corresponding to the printing-related operation may be limited.

title: APPARATUS, METHOD, AND PROGRAM
assignee: OMRON TATEISI ELECTRONICS CO [JP]; オムロン株式会社
inventors: HASEGAWA NAOTO [JP]; IWAMURA SHINTARO [JP]; SHIRATA SEITO [JP] et al.
abstract: Provided is a technique for importing, into an apparatus, a plurality of components constituting an assembly and information on a coupling relationship between the components. An apparatus (100) comprises an acquisition unit (201) that acquires a file created in a Universal Scene Description (OpenUSD) format. The file includes 3D shape data of each of the plurality of components constituting the assembly, and the coupling information indicating the coupling relationship between the plurality of components. A storage unit (202) for storing pieces of definition information (210) of a plurality of mechanisms is further provided. The definition information (210) of each of the plurality of mechanisms includes a coupling relationship between components constituting each of the plurality of mechanisms, and is associated with additional information corresponding to each of the plurality of mechanisms. Each of the pieces of additional information includes information for reproducing operation of the corresponding mechanism in a development environment of a control program. The apparatus (100) comprises: a determination unit (203) that determines whether the definition information (210) indicating the same coupling relationship as the coupling information of the file is present in the pieces of definition information (210) of the plurality of mechanisms; and a generation unit (204) that, when the definition information (210) indicating the same coupling relationship as the coupling information is present, generates a data set (220) usable in the development environment of the control program on the basis of the plurality of components, the coupling relationship between the plurality of components, and the additional information.

title: MEDIUM STORING PROGRAM EXECUTABLE IN INFORMATION PROCESSING APPARATUS, AND DISPLAY METHOD
assignee: BROTHER IND LTD [JP]; BROTHER KOGYO KABUSHIKI KAISHA
inventors: KUNIMOTO SHINTARO [JP]; KUNIMOTO, Shintaro
abstract: A non-transitory medium stores a program executable by an information processing apparatus. The program has a setting function to transmit, from the information processing apparatus, a setting command to set setting values for a plurality of items with respect to image processing apparatuses connected via a communication interface of the information processing apparatus. The program causes the information processing apparatus to perform a search process of searching for the image processing apparatuses via the communication interface, and a display process of grouping the image processing apparatuses found by the search process into a first group which supports the setting command, a second group which supports the setting command but which restricts changing a part of items settable by the setting command, and a third group which does not support the setting command, and causing a user interface of the information processing apparatus to display the grouped image processing apparatuses.

title: GENERATING A CONTROL PROGRAM FOR A TARGET PLATFORM AND CONFIGURING A TARGET PLATFORM CONFIGURED AS A CONTROLLER
assignee: DSPACE GMBH [DE]; dSPACE GmbH
inventors: MAIR MICHAEL [DE]; HILLEBRAND SEBASTIAN [DE]; HEIN RENATE [DE] et al.
abstract: [0000]    A computer-implemented method is provided for generating a control program for a target platform from a graphical control model of a development platform. The graphical control model includes a block diagram having a plurality of blocks. The graphical control model references a definition database in which information relating to the graphical control model is stored. The definition database includes at least one target specification object. The method includes: generating the control program according to target platform-specific generation rules for the control program comprised in the target specification object, wherein the target specification object is referenced by one or more blocks of the graphical control model, and wherein the target platform-specific generation rules for control program portions that correspond to the blocks referencing the target specification object are taken into account when generating the control program.

title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR PROGRAM VOLTAGE MANAGEMENT IN MEMORY SYSTEMS
assignee: YANGTZE MEMORY TECH CO LTD [CN]; Yangtze Memory Technologies Co., Ltd.
inventors: XIANG LI [CN]; KE KE [CN]; HUANG WEI [CN] et al.
abstract: [0000]    The present disclosure relates to program voltage management in memory devices and systems. An example method for programming memory cells of a memory device is provided. The method includes increasing a voltage of a first word line of the memory device from a first voltage to a second voltage in a first time period. The method further includes increasing the voltage of the first word line from the second voltage to a target program voltage in a second time period. The method further includes increasing a voltage of a second word line of the memory device from a third voltage to a fourth voltage. The second word line is adjacent to the first word line. The voltage of the second word line starts to increase from the third voltage after the voltage of the first word line reaches the second.

title: APPARATUS AND METHOD FOR PROVIDING USER-CUSTOMIZED PROGRAM FOR IMPROVING COGNITIVE ABILITY
assignee: SILVIA HEALTH INC [KR]; 주식회사 실비아헬스
inventors: KO MYUNGJIN [KR]; 고명진
abstract: An apparatus and a method for providing a user-customized program for improving cognitive ability are provided. The method comprises the steps of: providing a first questionnaire for a cognitive test to a terminal of a user; upon receiving a first response to the first questionnaire from the user terminal, calculating dementia risk of the user on the basis of the first response; providing a first training program for a preset first period to the user terminal on the basis of the dementia risk; providing, to the user terminal at the end time point of the first period, a second questionnaire for a lifestyle assessment based on the first response; upon receiving a second response to the second questionnaire from the user terminal, calculating a first lifestyle score of the user on the basis of the second response; and providing a second training program for a preset second period to the user terminal on the basis of the first lifestyle score.

title: METHOD, SYSTEM, PROCESSING CIRCUITRY, AND COMPUTER PROGRAM PRODUCT FOR ADJUSTING AN MRI CENTER FREQUENCY
assignee: CANON MEDICAL SYSTEMS CORP [JP]; CANON MEDICAL SYSTEMS CORPORATION
inventors: WHEATON ANDREW JAMES [US]; WHEATON, Andrew James
abstract: A method, system and computer program product for controlling a Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) apparatus such that a center frequency used to obtain MRI image data is corrected based on plural chemical models (e.g., using known relative locations of fat versus water in plural spectra).

title: COMMUNICATION METHOD, APPARATUS AND DEVICE, AND MEDIUM AND PROGRAM PRODUCT
assignee: GUANGDONG OPPO MOBILE TELECOMMUNICATIONS CORP LTD [CN]; OPPO广东移动通信有限公司
inventors: ZHOU HUIXUAN [CN]; LUO CHAOMING [CN]; LU LIUMING [CN] et al.
abstract: The present application belongs to the field of wireless communications. Disclosed are a communication method, apparatus and device, and a medium and a program product. The method is executed by a non-access point device, and comprises: receiving a first frame, which carries uplink transmission information, wherein the non-access point device comprises a non-AP STA and/or a non-AP MLD.

title: MOBILITY MANAGEMENT METHOD, COMMUNICATION DEVICE, STORAGE MEDIUM, AND PROGRAM PRODUCT
assignee: ZTE CORP [CN]; 中兴通讯股份有限公司
inventors: WEI HAO [CN]; ZHANG MENGJIE [CN]; 魏浩 et al.
abstract: Provided are a mobility management method, a communication device, a storage medium, and a program product. The method comprises: upon establishing a connection with a terminal, constructing an association relationship between a communication identifier of the terminal and a first sensing identifier; configuring a corresponding sensing and communication identifier for the association relationship; and performing mobility management on the terminal on the basis of the sensing and communication identifier.

title: COMPUTER-READABLE RECORDING MEDIUM HAVING STORED THEREIN MACHINE LEARNING PROGRAM, MACHINE LEARNING METHOD, AND COMPUTER-READABLE RECORDING MEDIUM HAVING STORED THEREIN INFERENCE PROGRAM
assignee: FUJITSU LTD [JP]; Fujitsu Limited
inventors: TOYOTA KODAI [JP]; URA AKIRA [JP]; TOYOTA, Kodai et al.
abstract: [0000]    A non-transitory computer-readable recording medium having stored therein a machine learning program for causing a computer to execute processing including: determining a window interval having a peak and a feature related to the window interval based on a spectrum related to partial autocorrelation for each of the plurality of window intervals indicating a variation of an index of time-series data; and performing machine learning of a model that predicts the variation of the index after a first time point from the variation of the index before the first time point using the determined feature.

title: INFORMATION PROCESSING METHOD, INFORMATION PROCESSING DEVICE, AND PROGRAM
assignee: SONY GROUP CORP [JP]; ソニーグループ株式会社
inventors: LIAO WEIHSIANG [JP]; TAKIDA YUTA [JP]; IKEMIYA YUKARA [JP] et al.
abstract: The present disclosure relates to an information processing method, an information processing device, and a program that make it possible to improve the performance of a downstream task. Provided is an information processing method comprising inputting music data to a music-based model trained using a data set and extracting a plurality of intermediate feature quantities having different information granularities from an intermediate layer of the music-based model, and training a model of a downstream task of the music-based model using the extracted intermediate feature quantities. The present disclosure can be applied, for example, when training a model of a downstream task including music tagging, music transcription, music source separation, and music mixing.

title: INFORMATION PROCESSING SYSTEM, INFORMATION PROCESSING METHOD, AND PROGRAM
assignee: TOYOTA CHUO KENKYUSHO KK [JP]; 株式会社豊田中央研究所
inventors: SAKIMURA HIROTO [JP]; NAGAYA TAKAYUKI [JP]; KOUDA KATSUNORI [JP] et al.
abstract: One aspect of the present invention provides an information processing system comprising at least one processor configured to execute a program so that each of the following steps is performed: an acquisition step in which biological information of a user is continuously acquired; an update step in which a state score quantitatively indicating the user's health state or psychological state is estimated on the basis of the continuously acquired biological information and a learning model, and a cumulative score obtained by continuously integrating the estimated state scores is updated; and a display control step in which visual information relating to the cumulative score is displayed, thereby enabling the user to continuously grasp the health state or the psychological state.

title: PLANNING PROGRAM, PLANNING METHOD, AND INFORMATION PROCESSING DEVICE
assignee: FUJITSU LTD [JP]; 富士通株式会社
inventors: URA AKIRA [JP]; KIMURA KOSAKU [JP]; 浦　晃 et al.
abstract: A planning program according to the present invention causes a computer to execute a process for: accepting specification of a task; causing a large language model to iteratively perform, on the basis of the specified task and a set of functions which includes a first function that executes a process corresponding to a specific function and a second function that causes the large language model to select a function to be called from among candidates of permitted functions, planning in which subtasks are expanded to a hierarchy lower than the hierarchy of the specified task and the first function or the second function to be executed for the subtasks is selected; and outputting a tree-structure plan in which the subtasks are expanded for each hierarchy as a result of the iterative planning.

title: SPEECH TRANSLATION METHOD, ELECTRONIC DEVICE, STORAGE MEDIUM, AND PROGRAM PRODUCT
assignee: BEIJING ZITIAO NETWORK TECHNOLOGY CO LTD [CN]; LEMON INC [KY]; Beijing Zitiao Network Technology Co., Ltd. et al.
inventors: HAN TAO [SG]; LIN YISHENG [SG]; PHAM VAN TUNG [AU] et al.
abstract: [0000]    Embodiments of the present disclosure provide a speech translation method, an electronic device, a storage medium, and a program product. The method includes: inputting an audio clip in a source language into an audio feature extractor in a speech translation model to extract, via the audio feature extractor, an audio feature corresponding to the audio clip; and inputting the audio feature into a language model in the speech translation model to obtain, via the language model, a translated text in a target language that corresponds to the audio clip, where a first scaling factor is used for the language model during fine-tuning, a second scaling factor is used for the language model during determination of the translated text, and the second scaling factor is less than the first scaling factor.

title: CONTENT GENERATION METHOD AND APPARATUS, ELECTRONIC DEVICE, MEDIUM, PRODUCT, AND PROGRAM
assignee: BEIJING ZITIAO NETWORK TECHNOLOGY CO LTD [CN]; 北京字跳网络技术有限公司
inventors: LI CHENG [CN]; MO YURUN [CN]; PENG YUNXI [CN] et al.
abstract: The present disclosure relates to the technical field of computers, and relates to a content generation method and apparatus, an electronic device, a medium, a product, and a program. The content generation method of the present disclosure comprises: recognizing a first image to generate a first text describing a scene of the first image in natural language; on the basis of the semantics of the first text, using an associative generation function to generate a second text, wherein the second text is used for describing a scene associated with the scene of the first image; generating a second image on the basis of the second text; and displaying the second image.

title: INFORMATION TRANSMISSION METHODS AND APPARATUSES, TERMINAL DEVICE, NETWORK DEVICE, CHIP, STORAGE MEDIUM, AND PROGRAM PRODUCT
assignee: GUANGDONG OPPO MOBILE TELECOMMUNICATIONS CORP LTD [CN]; OPPO广东移动通信有限公司
inventors: LIU ZHE [CN]; CHEN WENHONG [CN]; 刘哲 et al.
abstract: The embodiments of the present application provide information transmission methods and apparatuses, a terminal device, a network device, a chip, a storage medium, and a computer program product. A method comprises: a terminal device sends first information, the first information being used for indicating or determining first channel state information, and the first channel state information being channel state information for communication between the terminal device and the network device within a first distance range.

title: STORAGE MEDIUM STORING PRINT APPLICATION PROGRAM, CONTROL METHOD, AND INFORMATION PROCESSING APPARATUS
assignee: CANON KK [JP]; CANON KABUSHIKI KAISHA
inventors: KOBAYASHI MASATO [JP]; KOBAYASHI, MASATO
abstract: A mechanism that enables a user to use a photo correction function in printing using a standard driver that does not have the photo correction function. A non-transitory computer-readable storage medium storing a print application program, which supports a standard driver that is provided by a provider of an operating system and is built in the operating system in advance, causing a computer to execute a control method including displaying a screen to receive a setting to a photo correction function that is not provided by the standard driver on an information processing apparatus, and causing the information processing apparatus to generate print data that can cause a printing apparatus to execute the photo correction function with the setting received through the screen.

title: TASK DETERMINATION METHOD AND APPARATUS, COMMUNICATION DEVICE, STORAGE MEDIUM AND PROGRAM PRODUCT
assignee: BEIJING XIAOMI MOBILE SOFTWARE CO LTD [CN]; 北京小米移动软件有限公司
inventors: LAI QINGYU [CN]; ZHANG HUILONG [CN]; 来庆宇 et al.
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a task determination method and apparatus, a communication device, a storage medium and a program product. The method is executed by a first device, and comprises: acquiring multi-modal data, wherein the multi-modal data comprises a plurality of pieces of data, and the plurality of pieces of data belong to at least two types; on the basis of the multi-modal data, determining a semantic intention by means of a coder and a decoder; and, on the basis of the semantic intention, determining an utterance intention corresponding to the multi-modal data, wherein the utterance intention is used for indicating a first task. The solution of the present disclosure can improve the task execution capability of communication devices deployed in the air.

title: DEVICE, METHOD, AND PROGRAM FOR ACQUIRING ELECTROCARDIOGRAM DATA FROM ELECTROCARDIOGRAM IMAGE ON BASIS OF ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE
assignee: MEDICAL AI CO LTD [KR]; 주식회사 메디컬에이아이
inventors: JO YONGYEON [KR]; PARK JAEHO [KR]; 조용연 et al.
abstract: The present disclosure provides a device, method, and computer program for acquiring electrocardiogram data from an electrocardiogram image on the basis of artificial intelligence. A method performed by a computing device including at least one processor according to an embodiment of the present disclosure comprises the steps of: identifying a first target region including an electrocardiogram graph in an electrocardiogram image; identifying, for each lead, an electrocardiogram graph included in the identified first target region; converting the electrocardiogram graph identified for each lead to acquire first electrocardiogram data corresponding to each lead; and reconstructing the acquired first electrocardiogram data on the basis of a pre-trained first neural network model to acquire second electrocardiogram data corresponding to each lead.

title: HEAT-RESISTANT FILTER MATERIAL, BAG FILTER, AND METHOD FOR MANUFACTURING HEAT-RESISTANT FILTER MATERIAL
assignee: F&A NONWOVENS CORP [JP]; 株式会社エフアンドエイノンウーブンズ
inventors: TAKASE YOUZOU; IWAKI FUMINORI; 高瀬陽三 et al.
abstract: The present invention is a heat-resistant filter material that includes a felt material. The felt material includes 50 mass% to 94 mass% of silica fibers, 1 mass% to 10 mass% of conductive fibers, and 5 mass% to 49 mass% of crimpable heat-resistant organic fibers. The heat-resistant filter material preferably further includes a ground fabric integrated with the felt material. Preferably, one or both sides of the heat-resistant filter material are coated with a fluororesin layer and the average crimp count of the heat-resistant inorganic fibers per 25 mm fiber length is 5 to 25. Due to the foregoing, a heat-resistant filter material that has high collection properties, low pressure loss, and reduced risk of dust explosion is provided.

title: THERMALLY EXPANDABLE FIRE-RESISTANT MATERIAL AND METHOD FOR MANUFACTURING SAME
assignee: SEKISUI CHEMICAL CO LTD [JP]; 積水化学工業株式会社
inventors: SASAGAWA NAOKI [JP]; HAGA SHOUHEI [JP]; 笹川　直樹 et al.
abstract: Provided is a thermally expandable fire-resistant material comprising an expansion layer containing a binder resin and thermally expandable graphite. The thermally expandable fire-resistant material has a displacement amount of 5 mm or less when a test body comprising a sash body and a frame body having an opening, in which the thermally expandable fire-resistant material is attached to three sides of an outer peripheral surface of the sash body and the sash body is fitted into the opening, is heated according to a heating curve conforming to ISO 834 for 10 minutes in a state where a load of 10 N is applied to the sash body.

title: AST-3424 FOR TREATMENT OF CANCER PATIENT RESISTANT TO IMMUNE CHECKPOINT INHIBITOR
assignee: ASCENTAWITS PHARMACEUTICALS LTD [CN]; 深圳艾欣达伟医药科技有限公司
inventors: DUAN JIANXIN [CN]; QI TIANYANG [CN]; MENG FANYING [US] et al.
abstract: The present invention relates to AST-3424 for treatment of a cancer patient resistant to an immune checkpoint inhibitor, and relates to a treatment method for a human malignant tumor, and particularly to a method for an AKR1C3-activated anticancer prodrug compound AST-3424 to treat a cancer patient resistant to an immune checkpoint inhibitor, and a pharmaceutical use. Disclosed are a method for using an AST-3424 monotherapy or combination immunotherapy regimen to treat a cancer/tumor patient resistant/insensitive to an immunotherapy regimen, a use of the AST-3424 monotherapy or combination immunotherapy regimen in preparation of a drug for treating the cancer/tumor patient resistant/insensitive to the immunotherapy regimen, and a method for cross-administration of AST-3424 and the immunotherapy regimen to treat the cancer/tumor patient, wherein the immunotherapy regimen is preferably selected from among drug therapy regimens comprising the immune checkpoint inhibitor/an immune cell therapy.

title: FORMALDEHYDE-FREE HIGHLY WATER AND ABRASION RESISTANT OVERLAY FOR BUILDING PRODUCTS
assignee: ARCLIN USA LLC [US]; ARCLIN USA LLC
inventors: SCHAUWECKER CHRISTOPH [US]; RICE BRANDON [US]; DION ANDY [US] et al.
abstract: A paper based overlay is provided. The overlay has a paper impregnated with a resin composition having an acrylic resin having a glass transition temperature in a range of from about -20 ºC to about 40 ºC and a resin content from about 15 to about 35 wt. % based on the weight of the overlay and an adhesive is applied at the back of a substrate. The acrylic composition may include wax in the amount of about 0.005 to about 3.5 wt.% based on the weight of the resin composition. A method of producing the overlay is also provided. The overlay is highly water and abrasion resistant with low volatile content.

title: INSECTICIDE COMPOSITION AND USE THEREOF
assignee: CALLINGTON HAVEN PTY LTD [AU]; CALLINGTON HAVEN PTY LTD
inventors: DONG SIMING [AU]; WYNN-HATTON PAUL [AU]; DONG, Siming et al.
abstract: The present disclosure relates to the field of disinsection, particularly to an insecticidal composition for disinsection of a space, for example the interior space of an aircraft. In one embodiment, the present disclosure relates to an insecticidal composition for disinsection of a space wherein the insect is resistant to an insecticide, such as a pyrethroid resistant mosquito.

title: Tangle Resistant Flag System and Related Methods
assignee: FREE WAVE FLAGS LLC [US]; Free Wave Flags, LLC
inventors: BARTLAM ERIC R [US]; Bartlam, Eric R.
abstract: [0000]    A tangle resistant flag includes a flag edge portion and an elongated member. The elongated member is coupled to the flag edge portion. The elongated member is configured to prevent the flag from becoming tangled around a flagpole.

title: LIGATURE RESISTANT DOOR LOCK INTERFACE
assignee: SECURITECH GROUP INC [US]; Securitech Group, Inc.
inventors: BERGER MARK J [US]; MATE DAVID [US]; Berger, Mark J. et al.
abstract: [0000]    A ligature resistant door lock interface is disclosed herein. In some embodiments the interface may include a pushbutton configured to lock an associated door lock. In some embodiments, the door lock may be a mortise lock. The interface may have sloped exterior surfaces and have a relatively large diameter. In some embodiments, the interface may be overridden, which allows an operator to unlock the door from an exterior side, regardless of whether the pushbutton is held in a depressed position.

title: COMBINATION OF KAT6 INHIBITOR AND AR PROTAC
assignee: JIANGSU HENGRUI PHARMACEUTICALS CO LTD [CN]; 江苏恒瑞医药股份有限公司
inventors: SHI WEI [CN]; WANG JIANFEI [CN]; HUANG RUOYU [CN] et al.
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a combination of a KAT6 inhibitor with an androgen receptor-targeting proteolysis targeting chimera (AR PROTAC).
